**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---

subject: Our Challenge Coin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Patriot,
A friend of mine wanted to do something special to help the campaign. He works with metal and produced our campaign's very own challenge coin.
He produced a very limited number and they're a sight to behold. So far my campaign has only been making them available to attendees on our Unsub Live tour but we've decided to make them publicly available for a very limited time.
Anyone who donates $250 or more today (Cyber Monday) and tomorrow (Giving Tuesday) will get a coin along with fifty entries in our current giveaway for the AKG Occam Warfighter rifle. And once these coins are gone they're gone. Make your contribution today at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/Xzt9x0vZEdcdEqS8pVnb7Q/7OQ0cYRsv76378RsAAle4eLw).
While we've done really well raising funds so far thanks to you and have even outraised our opponent, he still leads us in cash-on-hand by three to one and that doesn't include the near limitless money that the swamp will spend to come save him.
Every coin will raise us enough to pay for about one TV ad or 750 mailers. This is invaluable in getting our message out to the voters.
Please give what you can. We'll be shipping these limited edition coins out later this week. Get yours today while you can at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/1NEFDOWdLpSkI34DIZDRjA/7OQ0cYRsv76378RsAAle4eLw).
Thank you.
Respectfully,

Brandon Herrera

Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee

Being back on _Hardball_ with old pal Chris Peleo-Lazar--who was filling in for his boss, Chris Matthews--felt exactly like that...joining an old pal to talk some politics. It was a damn good time, like watching a Bogart flick.
Or seeing Steve Bannon serve time (though his 4 months in the clink should've been multiplied out by his BMI).
We started with what I call my "Unified Theory of Trump," which I laid out again for our viewers' viewing pleasure (we hope), because it has proven itself true every day that lumbering lummox has been alive. Trump isn't complicated. He's not a five-dimensional chess grandmaster; he has a hard time keeping up in one dimension.
And what is the theory? [Trump is a guy who responds almost exclusively to one emotional stimulus: ](https://substack.com/redirect/a5e0a950-5633-4279-9f10-36bc791e44ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**["He said nice things about me."](https://substack.com/redirect/a5e0a950-5633-4279-9f10-36bc791e44ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** (Or alternatively, he didn't, and then the sociopath comes out).
That's the Rosetta Stone to decoding everything from pardons to foreign policy to why he'll publicly humiliate his own allies whenever they stop fluffing his ego. Bribes (allegedly, yawn), over-the-top-Baghdad-Bob compliments, breaking the law to keep him out of prison. They all count as "he was nice."
Chris and I laughed -- because the absurdity of this emotionally ill-equipped jabberwocky often makes it hard to keep a straight face -- but we also dug into how dangerous that childish fragility becomes when it's strapped to presidential power.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/24965375-cd13-4cbe-a7a8-e4ae7660c157?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
From there, it was easy to talk about the flip side of "nice," too, i.e., Trump's vengeance tour: the mass intimidation of civil servants, the obsession with punishing dissent, and the chilling message being sent to anyone in government who still believes in the rule of law.
[When Chris brought up Trump's dumpster-brained, bound-to-fail-per-usual push to court-martial Mark Kelly](https://substack.com/redirect/772f3dde-0fd5-4b1c-8e3a-dc23682d0afc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), I made the point as plainly as possible: this is not about policy disagreements. This is the President of the United States threatening military personnel for refusing _illegal orders._ That's not strength. That's not leadership. That's a weak man trying to enforce loyalty through fear.
We also hit the political terrain -- Ohio's shifting winds, the disastrous economics of Trump's general existence at 1600 PA Avenue...I mean tariffs, the growing appetite for leaders who speak to affordability and dignity.
I emphasized what I say often: Democrats win when they connect their values to lived experience. When they show up for working people, mock cruelty without mocking voters, and expose Trump's incompetence as a clown act--but not "he's stupid," though it's hard not to say that sometimes.
But as _-- and this is very importan_t--_a source of real economic and personal harm_. As I said towards the end of my _Hardball_ segment, Hitler, Idi Amin, Pol Pot...all were considered childish, ridiculous buffoons. [Buffoons have committed some of the worst acts of wanton cruelty in the history of the world](https://substack.com/redirect/1796d7df-c1ff-4730-adf0-3c24bb149eb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
On a MUCH lighter note, I got to talk about my love affair with stuffing. The true bipartisan uniter of Thanksgiving. Why do we only eat this on this one day, when I could literally live off it, the way Trump-supporting "celebrities" live off the 80s?
But as I sat with it for several days, there's something else the conversation stirred in me, and it's where I want to end.
When I look around the country right now, I see places where hope is real; you can feel it in the air. It's not manufactured, not performed, not marketed.
**[Aftyn Behn in TN-7](https://substack.com/redirect/fb7575bc-1e99-49eb-ad78-c248725940a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ is one of those places right now](https://substack.com/redirect/fb7575bc-1e99-49eb-ad78-c248725940a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). _You can feel the enthusiasm around her because it 's rooted in authenticity_. People aren't showing up because she flatters them.
They're showing up because Behn _represents_ them -- their fears, their needs, their future. That's the kind of energy that can't be faked, or created by crushing a pile of Adderall on your desk the size of Seb Gorka's head, and snorting like you're Johnny Depp in "Blow."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fe5ab9b1-24df-4989-bbac-fbc60e85487b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And then, with every ying, there is most certainly a yang, and here the opposite end of the spectrum delivers to us parking-lot-lawyer extraordinaire, **Alina Habba**. Poor thing, she was officially ruled _not_ the U.S. Attorney for New Jersey and is unlawfully serving in that position.
Maybe she can make up for it by going on like 20 podcasts once again to tell drooling right-wing incellulites how hot she is? (yes, this happened).
In any case, the court didn't just pull back the curtain on Alina. It said out loud what was already obvious: this was theater, cosplay, a pretend job title handed out by a pretend emperor, like when you were a kid and exclaimed, "I'm Captain Kangaroo!"
Habba wasn't real authority. She was a prop. And in this moment, America knows the difference.
Aftyn Behn is the real deal.
Alina Habba is a criminal heel.
| | A guest post by[Christopher Peleo-Lazar](https://substack.com/@christopherpeleolazar?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)| [Subscribe](https://substack.com/redirect/963c786f-00a3-4c40-bc9e-0e5b6e65f83c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---|---

name: David Hogg
subject: We need leaders who fight for working families, voting rights, and climate justice.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is why our mission is so important.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251201-1&t=1&akid=2897%2E587540%2EYgxeR1)
Peter, it is infuriating to watch the Trump administration wreak havoc on our government and enact their dangerous, destructive agenda.
We need to be taking pages out of Mitch McConnell’s playbook that he used for years to stop Obama, to stop Biden, and prevent Democrats from passing our agenda. Everything has to be on the table to stop and slow Trump.
On top of that, we need to be organizing against vulnerable Republicans and turning the screws on them. We have to make their lives as painful as possible and line up the incentives for them to oppose Trump.
And finally we have to look ahead to upcoming elections and get behind people that are filled with rage over Trump’s actions and have a burning fire within them to stop Trump. People who will fight aggressively for a vision of this country that allows us to have more affordable housing, better healthcare, and provides some real economic opportunity and security.
That’s where we come in.
**[Can you pitch in $5 now to power our mission to elect the next generation of leaders?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251201_1_infuriating.nEn-oQ&refcode=em20251201-2897&amount=5&t=2&akid=2897%2E587540%2EYgxeR1)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251201_1_infuriating.nEn-oQ&amount=5&refcode=em20251201-2897&t=21&akid=2897%2E587540%2EYgxeR1)**
This is no joke. _Every single day counts in the fight ahead._
**Here’s the truth:** The GOP is already gearing up for the next fight. If we don’t keep our fundraising on track, the billionaires and corporate elite will keep pouring money into the Republican right-wing agenda while Democrats and progressives are left scrambling.
**But we’re not going to let that happen.** We may not have the special interests on our side, but I know that the grassroots can be even more powerful.
**We need leaders who fight for working families, voting rights, and climate justice. Leaders who will not back down when things get tough.**
That’s exactly why Leaders We Deserve exists. Now, we need your help to make sure we can keep electing the young, progressive leaders we deserve.
**[Can you chip in $5 now to help power our game-changing work?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251201_1_infuriating.nEn-oQ&refcode=em20251201-2897&amount=5&t=22&akid=2897%2E587540%2EYgxeR1)**
Thank you for being part of this movement,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251201-1&t=23&refcode2=2897_587540_YgxeR1&akid=2897%2E587540%2EYgxeR1)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=2897%2E587540%2EYgxeR1)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2897%2E587540%2EYgxeR1)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: They Published 4 Articles in One Day to Save Him
body:
Plus: Why 71% of conservative women are moms — and only 40% of liberals are. | New for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5c248c40e9&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | |

We're back from Thanksgiving — and what we found waiting for us in [Sunday's Albuquerque Journal stopped us in our tracks](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ecfe071d54&e=567664f14c). If you want to understand how the system really works, this episode is required viewing.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=917891fac0&e=567664f14c)
| |
**🔥 JOURNAL DROPS 4 ARTICLES TO SAVE KELLER IN ONE DAY**
One week before the mayoral runoff. One Sunday newspaper. FOUR articles all working toward the same goal.
**We break down exactly how the Albuquerque Journal coordinated its coverage to protect Mayor Tim Keller** — the same mayor 65% of voters just rejected. We're talking about a new tax disguised as a "business improvement," a homelessness article that treats an 8-year incumbent like a fresh face, and an opinion piece from someone who has a very personal reason to keep things exactly as they are.
When you see how this works, you'll never read the news the same way again.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=10d033d67c&e=567664f14c)
---
| | **🚨 MEDIA BLAMES TRUMP FOR TERROR ATTACK**
An Afghan refugee traveled across the country to attack two National Guard members in Washington DC. A 20-year-old woman lost her life. A 24-year-old man is fighting for his. The media's response? Blame Trump for putting them there in the first place. We show you the actual crime stats since the Guard arrived. We play the clips from Tom Holman and Sarah Adams that should terrify every American. And we explain why the number "10,000" should be keeping you up at night.

**👶 71% OF CONSERVATIVE WOMEN ARE MOMS — LIBERAL WOMEN? JUST 40%**

New data just dropped on birth rates — and the divide is stunning. We're talking a 31-point gap. Entire cities are collapsing while others are booming. We get into what's really driving this and why it matters for the future of the country — no matter where you fall politically.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=cb7333ce6e&e=567664f14c)
---
| |

**🥲 THE CHEVY AD THAT MADE MARK TEAR UP ON AIR**

We end the show with a Chevrolet ad that Krysty sent to Mark with a simple message: "Good luck." He did not, in fact, have good luck. You'll want tissues for this one.
---
|
---

](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4b40a81fff&e=567664f14c)
✅ **SUBSCRIBE** to [our channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=63086693d3&e=567664f14c) and hit the 🔔 for updates

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c1280ba80f&e=567664f14c)

Thank you for being part of this community — real talk, real issues, and no spin.

**Mark & Krysty Ronchetti **

name: MAGA UPDATES
subject: LEAKED! Deep State’s Plan to SABOTAGE MAGA (CONFIDENTIAL)

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Will you endorse my campaign?

body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1075%2E181023%2EB3efYu)
Team: I have an important question for you today.
**[Will you endorse our campaign for governor of Michigan? Add your name in support today →](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/Endorse_dec2025?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251201_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1075%2E181023%2EB3efYu)**
[ENDORSE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/Endorse_dec2025?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251201_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=1075%2E181023%2EB3efYu)
---
Throughout my career, I’ve never backed down from big fights. Whether investigating extremist groups, making our Department of Motor Vehicles a national model for government efficiency, or making our elections more secure and transparent, I have been committed to public service that _actually makes a difference._
That’s exactly what I’ll do as our next governor: make Michigan more affordable, improve our schools, increase access to affordable, good-quality health care, and bring well-paying jobs to our state.
**Your support is what makes this work possible.** _Especially when my opponents are backed by dark money groups spending big to undo the progress we’ve already made._
So much is at stake in this toss-up race, and I’m counting on people like you to have my back to win this race.
**[Please add your name to personally endorse our campaign and show your support for our movement.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/Endorse_dec2025?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251201_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1075%2E181023%2EB3efYu)**
[ENDORSE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/Endorse_dec2025?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251201_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1075%2E181023%2EB3efYu)
---
I’m so grateful to have you on my team.
Let’s go!
Jocelyn

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=6&akid=1075%2E181023%2EB3efYu)

Ferndale, MI 48220

Hey folks,
My badass friend Rachel Cohen is back on _Endless Urgency_. What started as a chill post-Thanksgiving catch-up turned into a firestorm of a convo--covering Hegseth's potential war crimes, executive overreach, and why so many people feel like the system's straight-up abandoned them. Rachel doesn't just speak truth to power--she drags it into the light, breaks it down, and demands better from all of us.
Here's a taste of what we got into:
* **[00:02:16]** The Pete Hegseth scandal--what we know, what the White House denies, and what it says about who gets to play God.
* **[00:05:00]** Rachel connects U.S. drone strikes to crumbling alliances and the real-world fallout of unchecked militarism.
* **[00:13:01]** We trace how these powers evolve--from post-9/11 legislation to Trump's ever-looser definition of "terrorist."
* **[00:27:01]** Aftyn Behn's underdog campaign in Tennessee--what she's getting right, and what national Dems _still_ don't get.

**[If you value clarity over comfort--and want to back independent media that punches up, not down--join us. ](https://substack.com/redirect/2d557147-8500-4fbc-9107-e399f6f1303e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[Endless Urgency](https://substack.com/redirect/2d557147-8500-4fbc-9107-e399f6f1303e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[runs on heart, hustle, and your subscriptions. $8 at a time. Become one today.](https://substack.com/redirect/2d557147-8500-4fbc-9107-e399f6f1303e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

Right now, we are building the foundation we need to win in 2026. We’re putting the pieces in place to protect Jon Ossoff’s Senate seat and to compete in every corner of Georgia. The work we do right now is what makes the difference next November, Peter. This is how we build power in Georgia — brick by brick, even when it’s hard. Especially when it’s hard. name: Team Deb Haaland
subject: Discover the story behind Deb's fight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
Deb understands the challenges so many families face.

| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1337?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=2&akid=6004%2E400544%2EWodpiH)
---
**Meet Deb Haaland:** a 35th-generation New Mexican, a proud member of Laguna Pueblo, a single mom who once relied on food stamps and Medicaid, and the first Native U.S. Secretary of the Interior. She’s now running to be the next governor of New Mexico.
Deb understands the challenges so many families face. She worked catering gigs and ran a small salsa business to make ends meet, overcame homelessness, and is 35 years sober.
**Her journey is why she fights for New Mexico’s working families, so others don’t have to face the same hardships she did.**
| [Discover the story behind her fight >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1337?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=3&akid=6004%2E400544%2EWodpiH)

name: GOTV PAC
subject: TN-07 is why we do what we do
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
When we launched GOTV PAC, we made a commitment to spend every donation efficiently, to be transparent about our work, and to reject the hair-on-fire, scammy tactics that have poisoned political fundraising.
We promised to treat our audience with respect, and that means telling you the truth and speaking to you like an adult.
So here's what's going on right now: We've gone all in on Tennessee’s 7th District.
It’s a tough one, we’re not pretending otherwise, but here’s why we’re doing it: if we can cut Donald Trump’s 22-point margin down to even 5 points, we will have sent a message that Republicans can’t ignore – and we will have reminded disenfranchised voters everywhere that their power still matters .
That’s what this PAC was built for. Not noise or gimmicks. Real work that lifts up the voters who get written off.
If you believe in this work and in doing politics better, in focusing on turnout, not theatrics, we’re asking you to help keep us fueled through tomorrow and beyond: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12012025]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12012025]
No false promises. No scare tactics. Just the honest truth: this is a long shot worth taking, and with your help, we'll make it count.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-UFTIeK5E0CCzhE2NytL8Q2?unsubscribedata=PVLKkcv%2FmyvxReFjbLUyhowqAY0v51ZwmAZkHeO2QkMxJBWEifrl0xCJdegK4iag9E6sYgwy%2B3MsiqMTt7BrlkD13puuPqxlVyvDaxRFhoBd1k6z4UDjJh7bJkZeqh%2FZkUe%2FqS0Dhgfl%2Bw%2BdHZEC%2F2aID83ULcg36mKpy7gB5gMlVOBTNv3emEO%2Fd6LTQtcM92MkxFcC15GERr5x1lLxm5S%2FgsNojTjjZZ27YZdw6dpgBnUKEHFCMkp5m8XHVVvG%2F6rXGhyqW6VwtcIjnN6pOrRJSLoQmNmjlzoMvP6u4wezSuZ1hgBSE8io5%2F3f6ENmwzMYznBShFGz6RdR2C2GXg6ssKPv1XPKR8PcG0GgaL%2BEExr8Tr79fzcvLH1ixZVs%2FrCUV8ZvWHQ9ZAIlNS1bSYq1byH%2BTXxSG44U2gOtKoI%3D .

name: Rep. Aftyn Behn (via democrats.org)
subject: I’m running in the LAST congressional race this year...
body:
---
[](https://ak.democrats.org/go/28156?refcode=em_20251201_5421_fr&amount=20&t=1&akid=5421%2E22930333%2EPIIqA8) **Derek, I’m Aftyn Behn. I’m running in the LAST congressional race this year, and I would love your support — because hell will freeze over before I let Republicans get away with their agenda unchecked.** Here in Tennessee, **Election Day is tomorrow** and Republicans are SCARED. We’ve shrunk their margin to single digits, so they’re running multiple six-figure ad campaigns against me. [**Here’s how you can help, Derek: I’m inviting anyone across the country who wants to join this fight to split a donation to my campaign and the DNC today.**](https://ak.democrats.org/go/28156?refcode=em_20251201_5421_fr&amount=20&t=2&akid=5421%2E22930333%2EPIIqA8) **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-behn-2025-split?refcode=&amount=20&refcode2=5421_22930333_PIIqA8&akid=5421%2E22930333%2EPIIqA8)** I’m a state representative and community organizer. I got into this race after Republicans passed their Big Bullshit Bill to yank health care away from millions. My Trump-backed opponent _supports_ the bill. By voting him out, we can show the entire country that we will not stand for a system that is rigged against us. **I know that this team powered massive Democratic wins earlier this month, and now I hope you’ll support my campaign and the DNC in this final fight this year.** [**Derek, please split a $20 donation today between my campaign and the DNC so we can keep our TV ads on the air, scale up our direct voter outreach, and combat Republican outside spending in this final stretch before polls close tomorrow:**](https://ak.democrats.org/go/28156?refcode=em_20251201_5421_fr&amount=20&t=3&akid=5421%2E22930333%2EPIIqA8) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Aftyn Behn and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-behn-2025-split?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_20251201_5421_fr&refcode2=5421_22930333_PIIqA8&akid=5421%2E22930333%2EPIIqA8)**

Aftyn

* * *
On a holiday dedicated to goodwill and giving thanks, Trump **once again** used the word “retarded”, directing it towards Minnesota Governor Tim Walz, the father of a neurodivergent son.
It's just one front in his war on Americans with disabilities:
* Mocking a reporter's physical disability
* Deadly cuts to healthcare
* Gutting special ed
* The disgusting list goes on and on and on...

**As the founder of Able Dems, this fight is personal.**
Growing up as a wheelchair user with a stutter, I was called “retarded.” People underestimated me - as they do with many Americans with disabilities.
But I never gave up - and today, I’m asking you to fight alongside me to defeat MAGA Republicans.
**[Support our cause by donating today. body:
Wow.
| Hi, this is Aftyn Behn. I’m running in the last House race of 2025 here in TN-07.

**Trump is begging MAGA to go vote – he’s PANICKING about securing this seat.** Take a look at what the president just posted: [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97887?t=6&akid=22096%2E878179%2E0s6AHJ) [Will you split a donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project right now to flip TN-07 blue?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97887?t=7&akid=22096%2E878179%2E0s6AHJ)

Donald Trump is scrambling because he knows what it would mean for us to win the last House race of 2025:

That voters are rejecting MAGA extremism across the country.

That we can rewrite the playbook for what’s possible for Democrats in the Deep South.

That we’ll be heading into 2026 one seat closer to retaking the House and putting a check on this administration.

**No wonder he’s scared.**

The New York Times called our race “the unlikely new front in the fight for control of Congress.” We’ve got the eyes of the nation on us, and the only way we win tomorrow is if we work together.

[Please split a donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project so we can fight back!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97887?t=8&akid=22096%2E878179%2E0s6AHJ) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Aftyn Behn and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97888?t=9&akid=22096%2E878179%2E0s6AHJ)

body:
Why we're sending you this shipment from Connecticut...
| | | |
---
---
|
---
We have a bit of a strange situation here at the warehouse in Connecticut... We recently did an inventory audit and found a surplus of two of our most popular tactical blades. Rather than let them sit collecting dust, we decided to do something special for new customers as a "welcome to the neighborhood" gift. For the next **150 people** , we are giving away a massive **Smith & Wesson bundle for FREE.** All we ask is that you cover the small shipping & handling fee to get it to your door. **[>> Claim your FREE Smith & Wesson Knife Bundle](https://links.tacticalusa.com/a/1534/click/6211/11767687/1e2b57f21ce2674b3e8ad0be00c65fc41b2e0e7d/37cb6df25b9ba4632df933df6927fb678027540b?ana=InV0bV90ZXJtPVRVU0EgQU0gTGVhZHMmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVRVU0EgQU0gLSBUYW50byArIEJvb3QgMSAtIDEyLzIgJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg==)** When you grab this deal, you aren't just getting one cheap blade. You are getting two serious pieces of hardware: **1\. The Smith & Wesson M&P® Tanto Rescue Knife** This is a beast of an EDC tool. It features a 3.79" corrosion-resistant blade, a glass breaker, and a seatbelt cutter. It’s engineered for efficiency and ready for any emergency. **2\. The Smith & Wesson HRT Boot Knife** A double-edged dagger with a razor-sharp 7Cr17MoV steel blade. It’s full tang (solid strength from tip to handle) and comes with a leather sheath for easy carry. **The Catch?** There isn't one, but there is a hard limit. We only have **150 of these bundles** set aside for this giveaway. Once they are claimed, this page comes down, and we will not be restocking this specific double-offer again. Don't let this shipment go to someone else. **[Secure your bundle here while supplies last.](https://links.tacticalusa.com/a/1534/click/6211/11767687/b182d468a8f19e6e7415b9561c397d5f44f7f155/37cb6df25b9ba4632df933df6927fb678027540b?ana=InV0bV90ZXJtPVRVU0EgQU0gTGVhZHMmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVRVU0EgQU0gLSBUYW50byArIEJvb3QgMSAtIDEyLzIgJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg==)**

subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgrrauidoto0iqhfc5ac320ef85hf091j4qk02jg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cdjmcoj1cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoogpdh36dpnbc5ik1q8vmsf5mojcaucg4156pf0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cdjmcoj1cdh2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9q0kmq1l0gv9suie96egn3v2032f9mpsjt2a648_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cdjmcoj1cdh2bs)

Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Gage Hoekstra
subject: ICYMI: Indiana’s Braun, Houchin named most effective GOP congressional lawmakers in housing, education
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Former U.S. Sen. Mike Braun — now governor of Indiana — and U.S. Rep. Erin Houchin were among the 118th Congress’ most effective lawmakers
Former U.S. Sen. Mike Braun -- now governor of Indiana -- and U.S. Rep. Erin Houchin were among the 118th Congress' most effective lawmakers No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-e-alyjtz-hhlljjcji-n/) **IN CASE YOU MISSED IT** [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alyjtz-hhlljjcji-r/) **Indiana 's Braun, Houchin named most effective GOP congressional lawmakers in housing, education** [Click Here to Read the Full Story](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alyjtz-hhlljjcji-y/) Then-U.S. Sen. Mike Braun appears at an event for Republican gubernatorial candidates in Carmel on Jan. 25, 2024. (Photo by Whitney Downard/Indiana Capital Chronicle)The report used 15 metrics to rank the Capitol's lawmakers across 21 policy areas. Leslie Bonilla MuñizNovember 27, 2025
[https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/2025/11/27/indianas-braun-houchin-named-most-effective-gop-congressional-lawmakers-in-housing-education/](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alyjtz-hhlljjcji-j/)Former U.S. Sen. Mike Braun -- now governor of Indiana -- and U.S. Rep. Erin Houchin were among the 118th Congress' most effective lawmakers, in an issue-specific analysis by the Center for Effective Lawmaking.The center is a nonpartisan collaboration between the University of Virginia's Batten School and Vanderbilt University.Researchers there used 15 indicators of effectiveness to calculate scores for lawmakers who served from January 2023 to 2025. The metrics gauge how many bills a lawmaker sponsored, how substantial the policy proposals within were, and how far those ideas moved though the legislative process.Then, they identified the top two performers -- a Republican and Democrat -- across 21 policy areas. The results were published last week. U.S. Rep. Erin Houchin was one of the nation's most effective lawmakers on education during the last congressional term. (Courtesy photo)Braun was named the most effective Senate Republican on housing policy. He got points for sponsoring two "substantive" pieces of housing-related legislation, one of which passed the Senate chamber, but didn't become law.Houchin was named the most effective House Republican on education matters. She sponsored one "substantive and significant" education proposal that became law, plus two "substantive" bills that died early on.Committee chairs are often among best performers, but neither Braun nor Houchin led committees handling their respective top policy areas.A broader analysis of the 118th Congress, [released](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alyjtz-hhlljjcji-t/) in March, identified Braun as the ninth-most effective lawmaker in the Senate, as well as the chamber's fourth-best Republican.He was lauded for introducing 116 bills, seven of which passed the Senate and four of which became law. Braun was also listed among first-term senators "exceeding expectations" by outperforming a benchmark."With Sen. Braun concluding his service in the Senate to become Governor of Indiana in January 2025, it is clear that there will be one less effective lawmaker among the more senior ranks in the Senate moving forward," researchers wrote at the time.### [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alyjtz-hhlljjcji-i/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alyjtz-hhlljjcji-d/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alyjtz-hhlljjcji-h/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alyjtz-hhlljjcji-k/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alyjtz-hhlljjcji-u/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alyjtz-hhlljjcji-o/) [Click Here to Support Your Indiana Republican Party](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alyjtz-hhlljjcji-b/) ** PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. ****NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. ****WWW.INDIANA.GOP.** | Indiana Republican State Committee 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com [Preferences](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.updatemyprofile.com/y-alyjtz-293A8D27-hhlljjcji-c) | [Unsubscribe](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-u-alyjtz-hhlljjcji-q/)
---

| Donald Trump's brash decision to rig the maps in 2026 could backfire on him spectacularly.
Here's where things stand right now:
In November, California, under Gov. Gavin Newsom's leadership successfully passed a redistricting law which passed with 65% of the vote.
Then, Virginia Democrats announced a bold plan to redraw their maps and eliminate as many as 4-5 GOP seats.
But it's not nearly enough, with all of the red states Trump is gerrymandering, California and Virginia are but a drop in the bucket.
It is on us to pick up the torch from where they left off. With the GOP preparing a gerrymander in Florida that could take as many as a dozen seats, blue states like Colorado have a duty to redistrict and level the playing field. They started it and we must finish it if we hope to survive until 2028 with our Democracy intact.
Today Fair Fight Colorado launched the ballot initiative that will give Coloradans a chance to vote on redrawing Colorado's maps -- but our effort will be Dead On Arrival unless we can harness the grassroots energy and enthusiasm this situation calls for.
[Trump is betting that we won't have the guts do this. We have our backs to the wall and we desperately need your support to pull this off. We need as many people giving $25, $10, or whatever amount is meaningful to them, to make redistricting in Colorado a reality:](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_bXobCaAdhX9CNZrBab5wQHIyGyuvtek3FPIuirXn1QQWIatMBwfZTqokk4bsEe3VR9kXe-3Me7Z_YOPm91Fyl0M_nAkz9ZGMynhLWhJkLR3t-JJtXK3y5uUAqfNPJWxdlUBoQ9qMAylhLBuN4jdqMDXDTkntVUp4asXrX70hKrbTP0W-VGYNXNFRL6z2HxqzbZ54sn-hTwQ5LHAtLfsH_fGhXcCxpQq&c=SUlABQ-wtWnJfOgS2s0y6a7nbDO2cfDrFpvDBYopSxSGJ3HcnWXj1g==&ch=Oyb5g0pQKbo4mBplmSL5OOt7gzYKaVb-vlN05CEXbXLBmQciQZ3b-g==)

[Or multiply your impact with a monthly contribution to counter MAGA election rigging.](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_bXobCaAdhX9CNZrBab5wQHIyGyuvtek3FPIuirXn1QQWIatMBwfZTqokk4bsEe3VR9kXe-3Me7Z_YOPm91Fyl0M_nAkz9ZGMynhLWhJkLR3t-JJtXK3y5uUAqfNPJWxdlUBoQ9qMAylhLBuN4jdqMDXDTkntVUp4asXrX70hKrbTP0W-VGYNXNFRL6z2HxqzbZ54sn-hTwpi859l6iG3tvA5djx879-&c=SUlABQ-wtWnJfOgS2s0y6a7nbDO2cfDrFpvDBYopSxSGJ3HcnWXj1g==&ch=Oyb5g0pQKbo4mBplmSL5OOt7gzYKaVb-vlN05CEXbXLBmQciQZ3b-g==)
We simply cannot afford to get squeamish when it comes to pushing back against Trump's effort to rig the maps and steal the 2026 midterms. The stakes are too high.
Thank you for rolling up your sleeves and getting involved in the fight.
-- Team Fair Fight Colorado

name: Team Evergreen
subject: This Giving Tuesday, let's secure climate progress in the states
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Every dollar makes a difference
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4281186/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
|
### **Happy Giving Tuesday!**
Countless worthy causes are in need of support today, and if climate and clean energy are issues you care about most, we hope you’ll consider ours! Because a gift to Evergreen Action right now is an investment in a healthy climate, affordable clean energy, and a livable future. [SUPPORT EVERGREEN](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4281187/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Hi friend,

Giving Tuesday is here, and today’s our chance to lay the groundwork for more climate progress at the state level, where real wins are within reach— _and_ gaining momentum.

We’re working towards an ambitious goal: **$25,000** to fund targeted campaigns that will expand affordable, clean energy like wind and solar, cut energy costs for families, and build a safer, healthier future.

[**BY MIDNIGHT.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4281188/87SdQ4wZ)

**And we can’t do it without YOU.**

**Here’s why this matters:** With federal clean energy investments getting decimated and power bills continuing to climb, state leaders need our help. Evergreen is stepping in with **cutting-edge policy solutions** that lower gas and electric bills, make homes more affordable and efficient, cut pollution from transportation and buildings, and so much more.

You obviously care about making our climate safer and our future more affordable, friend, and so **we hope you will make an investment in our work to accelerate climate progress in the states and help us cross the finish line in our Giving Tuesday campaign.**[**Whether your gift is $5, $50, or $500, every donation helps and is greatly appreciated.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4281189/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[MAKE A GIFT](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4281190/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Every dollar you give on Giving Tuesday powers our work to ensure states continue to lead on climate in the face of federal rollbacks and attacks. **Because here’s the truth:** Evergreen has been working for years in places like Michigan, Pennsylvania, New York, and Wisconsin to help decision makers get more affordable clean energy online, and we’ve won some major victories. **With your help, we can keep it going.**

So, let’s get to it. [**Make a donation to support Evergreen Action today.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4281191/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
| With gratitude and determination,

Team Evergreen |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: His words are now our mission
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend, Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkb2u3CwQhq8Gd17BgMEuXHz6VpZSnNOmRPzM7o5igwN4ffuRk5MLSDea551HGr3fP-yHo5XS89NtOIc32VLti-qZS6yuYMpnPspGtVJOFjgMvYCewxUTXZxD1BI6nIXRShslpOles3AAgzR-iHIKWnltdDRqUo-RD9oL09F8mQRwEEIMcriNQxj5pI0A6aMxD6b4sUfXsN5CThXL2zV6I6WUrymnW8hbt86v1vbK5H8MFgZLxXAUvLmEMbcrwWBpR0mUnv2eKbX-qI7BguMA6L3vhZmgV8bzfpJG9vgIbvRBywCRyaXmowS0IUdk8v7_t09jlOIM9NE2u2GkY2Pyjpuj9Wv554LJ-8uV6OoP68LPLxTctjt6pgvm055oT0p_WU4NU2Py7royx_2kdaWqDVP8edl_P9v-uZ33DL8CAAD__18knaQ)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkb2u3CwQhq8Gd17BgMEuXHz6VpZSnNOmRPzM7o5igwN4ffuRk5MLSDea551HGr3fP-yHo5XS89NtOIc32VLti-qZS6yuYMpnPspGtVJOFjgMvYCewxUTXZxD1BI6nIXRShslpOles3AAgzR-iHIKWnltdDRqUo-RD9oL09F8mQRwEEIMcriNQxj5pI0A6aMxD6b4sUfXsN5CThXL2zV6I6WUrymnW8hbt86v1vbK5H8MFgZLxXAUvLmEMbcrwWBpR0mUnv2eKbX-qI7BguMA6L3vhZmgV8bzfpJG9vgIbvRBywCRyaXmowS0IUdk8v7_t09jlOIM9NE2u2GkY2Pyjpuj9Wv554LJ-8uV6OoP68LPLxTctjt6pgvm055oT0p_WU4NU2Py7royx_2kdaWqDVP8edl_P9v-uZ33DL8CAAD__18knaQ)
---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. # AMERICA FIRST. NAVY VETERAN.
# PROVEN LEADER.
---
| |
---
---
| Dear Peter,
Today is Giving Tuesday, a moment for people to support the efforts and causes that mean the most to them.
As we finish the year and celebrate the Christmas and Hanukkah holidays, gratitude and giving naturally come into focus. We think about what matters and where we want to lend our support.
On a day like this, I'm reminded that a campaign is only as strong as the people who choose to stand behind it.
As our campaign for Florida's 23rd District moves forward, contributions of any amount help us share our message with neighbors across South Florida. This district deserves leadership that listens, shows up, and puts our community first, and your support helps us reach every corner of District 23.
If you share this vision for our community, I hope you'll consider joining Heather and me and supporting our campaign today.
With gratitude,
---
|
---
| George

As we finish the year and celebrate the Christmas and Hanukkah holidays, gratitude and giving naturally come into focus. We think about what matters and where we want to lend our support. On a day like this, I'm reminded that a campaign is only as strong as the people who choose to stand behind it. As our campaign for Florida's 23rd District moves forward, contributions of any amount help us share our message with neighbors across South Florida. This district deserves leadership that listens, shows up, and puts our community first, and your support helps us reach every corner of District 23. If you share this vision for our community, I hope you'll consider joining Heather and me and supporting our campaign today. name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: What I saw in Julesburg
body:
Lauren Boebert voted for this. She voted to gut the care her constituents depend on.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OVy1SVcQBoGTsAUMNCWMLDCRvtn0-m45hNV_y_PYaeQx-qLzBg2QK3xld3p-xO4weiu4Psnjmom_JMcR4p3LdQxry0JcTb1bnOqDNI32zZXkG5bB6987YZJK4DeJU5v95BUgUdt9UpuNIsN8TADap4tn41mO-v_8o282f5YBj6_XpNLR3R7gFC7WKn0KyHt55crUrWfHcqbTCO8SzPE2ZY7e9xAPLBed&c=PkAEHgJOB_PYxKzWLyrwxHdUS5BH4jlELxBZTUjCERHFT-vUfrJaGQ==&ch=e3nDs7ibxTMF_992U2VAq3zGQW3K1T_3r-SnI54qXcqinEzUC42jyQ==)

---
| Peter, I recently visited Sedgwick Health center in Julesburg, Colorado. They serve seniors, run the local nursing home and keep their ER open around the clock. According to the hospital, 80% of their patients rely on Medicaid and Medicare. But now that the GOP's "Big, Beautiful Bill" has become law, Sedgwick will lose 25% of its Medicaid reimbursement - and all of their services might not survive it. Lauren Boebert voted for this. She voted to gut the care her constituents depend on. I know firsthand how critical accessible health care is for Coloradan families. I fought tooth and nail to get my parents the care they needed when they were both diagnosed with cancer. No one should have to beg for help when they're sick or struggling - but that's exactly the reality Boebert just voted for.
As one rural hospital CEO put it: "Where you live shouldn't determine if you live." He's right. And I'll never stop working to ensure our neighbors get the care they need - no matter their ZIP code. That's why I'm on the road - meeting with hospital leaders, families and local officials who know what's really at stake. But this kind of campaign takes resources, Peter. Every trip we take, every ad we place, every door we knock on - it's all powered by grassroots folks like you.
[So I have to ask: Will you pitch in $25 or more before midnight to help me beat Boebert, flip this seat and stand up for Coloradans?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OVy1SVcQBoGTsAUMNCWMLDCRvtn0-m45hNV_y_PYaeQx-qLzBg2QK3xld3p-xO4wH5Epa10FGZ9Wmiwv_dnRMjB6kW9cZeK3chbOPzqVTM87uHpDv-fIUkQCy9Brzc2PvB1nsieA_U0sQ7ChSWpOYnrPbm1vjuF27R-f1laLH2EoW2reEEw9SGtJgVj9s6njU8Avt9LWzKh0c3bo0FJ-gbsz_U4MJgXmR1bOULEO1-M=&c=PkAEHgJOB_PYxKzWLyrwxHdUS5BH4jlELxBZTUjCERHFT-vUfrJaGQ==&ch=e3nDs7ibxTMF_992U2VAq3zGQW3K1T_3r-SnI54qXcqinEzUC42jyQ==)

clean_body: Lauren Boebert voted for this. She voted to gut the care her constituents depend on. | | | | | == | | == | Peter, I recently visited Sedgwick Health center in Julesburg, Colorado. They serve seniors, run the local nursing home and keep their ER open around the clock. According to the hospital, 80% of their patients rely on Medicaid and Medicare. But now that the GOP's "Big, Beautiful Bill" has become law, Sedgwick will lose 25% of its Medicaid reimbursement - and all of their services might not survive it. Lauren Boebert voted for this. She voted to gut the care her constituents depend on. I know firsthand how critical accessible health care is for Coloradan families. I fought tooth and nail to get my parents the care they needed when they were both diagnosed with cancer. No one should have to beg for help when they're sick or struggling - but that's exactly the reality Boebert just voted for. As one rural hospital CEO put it: "Where you live shouldn't determine if you live." He's right. And I'll never stop working to ensure our neighbors get the care they need - no matter their ZIP code. That's why I'm on the road - meeting with hospital leaders, families and local officials who know what's really at stake. But this kind of campaign takes resources, Peter. Every trip we take, every ad we place, every door we knock on - it's all powered by grassroots folks like you. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Thanks for believing in this campaign. | Peter, I recently visited Sedgwick Health center in Julesburg, Colorado. They serve seniors, run the local nursing home and keep their ER open around the clock. According to the hospital, 80% of their patients rely on Medicaid and Medicare. But now that the GOP's "Big, Beautiful Bill" has become law, Sedgwick will lose 25% of its Medicaid reimbursement - and all of their services might not survive it. Lauren Boebert voted for this. She voted to gut the care her constituents depend on. I know firsthand how critical accessible health care is for Coloradan families. I fought tooth and nail to get my parents the care they needed when they were both diagnosed with cancer. No one should have to beg for help when they're sick or struggling - but that's exactly the reality Boebert just voted for.
As one rural hospital CEO put it: "Where you live shouldn't determine if you live." He's right. And I'll never stop working to ensure our neighbors get the care they need - no matter their ZIP code. That's why I'm on the road - meeting with hospital leaders, families and local officials who know what's really at stake. But this kind of campaign takes resources, Peter. Every trip we take, every ad we place, every door we knock on - it's all powered by grassroots folks like you. [So I have to ask: Will you pitch in $25 or more before midnight to help me beat Boebert, flip this seat and stand up for Coloradans?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00171fRqvfzVH_YHomv5OmESr0cD9TidslR1tncSXtVL8iltTmggEvoxRsRxFegPpxa0IIweSN6HJ_aYrx5iQ-vNzfbYUg66hPPE4TOlpEOFdvIrnZSP8g61Vmm1EqtgJyIXlBV9DiK5sd5sx7IlZdjq6y3tkGDNNKGxnWnhV32vJTomfAhkwG0BGwIgjpLf4GTr-6tzU50zBS1kUIvZx9-c5PXYrBgSNhCRjXmnSvEf3w=&c=lsGzOSU68Rul7Ehj4pA_CWw-VhF1Y7LEEI05xaOl7fDQDFMhJ5LMxg==&ch=FnlzMsT6YTF1kW5rQlT77I3AvAAeqn7dGVj6JZoDAcau0FS8VbF-nA==)

subject: Justin Story Issues Statement on Escalating Situation in Venezuela and US Naval Deployment
body:
Justin Story comments on the situation in Venezuela amid personal connection to his wife’s country of origin & experience as a US Marine Corps pilot

| | | | | [|
---](https://votejustinstory.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aa75fb334e8c06de90a8e46d5&id=e58d2638e9&e=90ad5fc3c5)
| | | | | |
**PRESS RELEASE**

**Former Marine Fighter Pilot and Republican Congressional Candidate, Justin Story, Issues Statement on Escalating Situation in Venezuela and US Naval Deployment******_Justin Story comments on the situation in Venezuela amid personal connection to his wife’s country of origin and experience as a US Marine Corps F/A-18 fighter pilot_ ___**“As someone who has flown combat missions from the deck of an aircraft carrier and served alongside Marines who know the cost of freedom, I can say with absolute confidence that our military presence sends a clear message. The United States stands with free people who refuse to live under tyranny.”**_ _**– Justin Story**_
---
|
---
| | **December 2, 2025****Contact: justin@votejustinstory.com**
---
| |
(**St. Cloud, Florida**) — Today, Justin Story, former U.S. Marine Corps F/A-18 fighter pilot and Republican candidate for Congress in Florida’s 9th District, released the following statement regarding the United States positioning the USS Gerald R. Ford Strike Group in the Caribbean in response to the crisis unfolding in Venezuela. “Regardless of the surrounding politics, President Trump has positioned the USS Gerald R. Ford Strike Group in the Caribbean. As a former Marine Corps F/A-18 carrier pilot, I have seen firsthand the power and lethality our strike groups project under the wings of our Navy and Marine Corps pilots and fellow aviators. Combined with the 22nd Marine Expeditionary Unit (Special Operations Capable), this is a textbook example of the most powerful fighting force within our military. It is a certainty the Maduro Regime’s days are numbered.
“The millions of Venezuelan refugees around the world, including my wife, whose voices sat in silence, are now heard. When the rightfully elected government of Edmundo González and María Corina Machado take office, they will face the monumental task of rebuilding a nation that has suffered the consequences of socialism.
“As someone who has flown combat missions from the deck of an aircraft carrier and served alongside Marines who know the cost of freedom, I can say with absolute confidence that our military presence sends a clear message. The United States stands with free people who refuse to live under tyranny.” For further information, visit VoteJustinStory.com or contact justin@votejustinstory.com. ###

---
| |

Among those he has interviewed are serial killer Jeffrey Dahmer and former Russian president Boris Yeltsin. The city of San Antonio is asking for input on how to improve its famous River Walk. ## Colder Temps Predicted
Temperatures across North Texas will likely [dip below freezing](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAQRb8Gd1hmYoMpKF7jLq_d0sIwjkeLTQQkJPv1K-cXthrpjGZ07v26zldLgY7bf7ujKa81zgfWHLAUTHN2W4zBbZEcpkfAvNJhA_3gDB0MXADvYPaWwnvuG2-WzmvRoBFK9lLJUfXNZtANehjlMirnUY3SCVCIzuoFRykvuiFzPhPQgYBOCGgHpQdcrbZWL0JdFOs79FRiasuGBV82r-Edn5haF_cmmK2Ue2aXfwwmBlOttXVLPlOcewbT54TBdKJzxFQ2_oF8pZQL9_bNdywYUwzxRs4GXukomPhOviJ-82rT_rgzmJpk_L1SCJTlKXbbLYWPR_lbe08DvwEAAP__CfqHPg) for the first time this season this morning, and parts of the Panhandle [could see snow](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAURL_G7mzBNYZQULzGXV67pXUDl4BEjAVsnOzXr5xf2HI00pnR-bquV4wpbvf_-CDTXj6vGx01UWtU1mpDzsmGHC2V70TVxw1T_KEVGMwDh4HB6jCm9yp6Z27Mad6T4UoKqeRFiT4YN11mRbMWeJnUJKzTjOHNyVl7kqh8H80J48CAA-McxlnpmTxqRH3jalKdYORiy2VsgRq9sPr0zk8qo82PPpnQ2l676V8HSwfLcRyjDSVvZ3tmwhaodLBgadEm6mDZcmlh-KCGuuVj8LmQxdoG4MAlF2rcw94X4_YjphSrPE_cHxjTZ7P9zdTTwG8AAAD__6QAfcY) on Thursday ahead of a warmup as the weekend approaches. Currently, the La Niña weather pattern—driven by cooler-than-average temperatures in the Pacific Ocean near the equator—is expected to keep the polar jet stream from dipping too far into Texas throughout the winter, producing [warmer and drier](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAQhp_G3rDgYht7YOiSLV07WmdzBFQMEZCQ9Okrd8kDdLvTJ3369H9dlgs678L1E3dS5WniEqhmT6VQWvJmY_SbjW6jdPeUjQvo3Q8twGFgAhiHRaPzr6VvtVq5nkVLSsixH-U4yb61Cvi2TvMoen6a9TQMk-mlGHQ_aZiM5NA6dcgEcBDAhYBukPNABmfEeRXyJJuek3Ylpq5YKvTEbPwrPih1W9xbr2wpt9ycPho4N3CutXbfTwwHPF7CYim9L7b6eG3gbGNlHllwARkGzZBVTPtBV7bFu9cMjaGtMLzn4kJm1YVCib2FbVL6Vp33Lo9H5HVH5_-ayv-WfCj4DQAA__97r4ld) weather. According to a [long-range prediction](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAQhZ8Gd7Zg8E9cUNzGXW67pTWGISBhsICNk336lfMKW8_onO87X_f1jj74-PiPO6n6smmNdJZAtVJei3YpBe2S15S_AxXrIwb_QytwGFoBLYfVoA_vtW-M2riZRUNKTGM_TuNt6hunUAKRReLzJq28zZvg0vSIm9E3Ic3QeHWFCeAggAsB3TDNA1mcEedNTHJiPSfja8pddVTphcWGd3pS7nTam6BcrUdh8h-DhcFynme3vwtGjDVFn64nBstldV0Jq6PMYMFcvQ7EYLGYd8qlxbBjRN1-3D49bYnpbEGIXg5y7A53NFmZ4_Qh-DJeYI8dffhw1L-t91TwGwAA__9XhIT0) from the Farmers' Almanac, North and Central Texas could see snow around the middle of this month, and rain is expected for much of the state the week before Christmas. Historically, the Panhandle has a roughly 10% chance of experiencing a white Christmas.
## School Choice Program Rules Finalized
Rules for the state's new $1 billion school choice program were [finalized](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OgzAQBeDTQGdkT_wTChfb0GXbLa0JHoIlgyPbCcmefgU5wvaj9-Z7Pxd3wRDDevvGhWx9TcmttJVItVJ2ZZxTiuOcwkj5EalMYcUYfskBB8UEMA7OY4hvJ1tvr9z3oiUrjJba6LOR7WxHddaAEkF4RCG1PnOlpDde9NRzJdtg9zABHARwIaBTplc0YY_YX4U5mUZy8qGm3NWZKr2wTPGdnpS7MS1ttHOt99KcvhoYGhi2beum9DL4KDWs-0kDw25qYDjeZ4eEHUHsI2QfIrvndMu4tNn6-xZiDEXv7bcFQzzK6v8melr4CwAA__9OYnxe) by the Texas comptroller's office last week. Authorized by the legislature earlier this year, Education Freedom Accounts will provide most students participating in the program with approximately $10,300 to pay for [private school tuition](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb_GdF7ZsxivCxdp6F7alGjAA4xkMLK9vN18fcRGyg-knrlH595fX8MXcuR9-Ykb-fqa07DTd4lUK-WhTGtKcVoTT5SfkcrMO0b-TQMoMFKDVDAE5Pge2ib4UQWnG_Ladm1nu4dtm9WPnTXOKLKzBfUwswF0FsiFMHZaGWzYXzANCjQoreFmrDM0o0N0o7Z3K1pFgWvKt7pSpReWOb7TSfk2pa2Jfq31KOL-Q0AvoMdx0vfrIqA_UqkC-k9GHplPrCT_lpJnek4r5SKXJweKvFORU9prvsiF8d-HPHJaMm4yUyQsFAT0-gHagXYC-ib7cHxzjFy6S3XZkOPHrP7fnqeHPwEAAP__ZzWLqA). Students with disabilities could receive up to $30,000, while those who are homeschooled are eligible for $2,000. New York-based Odyssey will [receive up to $50 million](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOszAQRk8DnRGeGAyFi7-hy99uiYwZYksDRvYEkj39iuwRtp95et_7uo93Gyhsj_92RcOvJY4bnpmQGdOYnY-RnI_BYXoS5iVslsI3jlBDIySIGsbZBnqPqpzNVM-9LNFI3apWt51WpTfKQqewnmynoQOclJxuS-eUljB1XdOXwVwwCTVIqKWEqtF9g4vtre0nqW-6UDXOgWOq2CPjy-aF3vHAVLm4lmQ8856L278ChgKG8zyra8KS4soeM1vGfF0WMNjEwREWMHwwIiOh4yxcXHe7vcUZiIRH2sWMB1LcReAsfiuIIz6dxyT2FB_JrmUy8349hNxeio_VBvoY8d86HgZ-AgAA__9kfouF) to administer the program. Private schools and vendors can apply for eligibility on Dec. 9, while families can apply for funding on Feb. 6, 2026. Families should learn if they have been accepted by early May. Acting Comptroller Kelly Hancock's office published the final rules after [conducting a public hearing](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGP4yAQhX8N7rBgbExcUFzjLtdeaY3NEKMjIQJiJ_vrV2SVX7DdaJ5m3vvev_N8Rh_87fIXr2TK08X5RkcOVAqlOa9bjGHdol8pPQJl528Y_BfNIEBxCVzAbNGH19w31izCjrIhI_XQD3o46b7ZjHMr6qXDQZ_E4JRQSi1O0UInO2LXY-NNfSZBgAQhJbRKj4ocjojjInWnWS_I-hJTWzYq9MTswivulNo1XptgtlLumXV_GEwMpuM42v8ZSxUZTJWGwfQ-YzBVKwaTlHVWH4EnCoSZMv8AWv7m5S4mfk9-x0L8pw2-x8e6UV3HS8Lq0SRj74cPweehpr1c0Yd3uPK7SncD3wEAAP__yb6MRg) in September and receiving more than 200 written comments on a draft proposal. "_These administrative rules, like the program itself, put Texas parents in the driver’s seat_ ," [Hancock said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkTHTmzAMQH8NbOKwADsMDF3Yvq4dOcUW4IuxcsbkS_rre3Adune29U7v6dfX9EU--Lj8pI2H_J5livy9B86Z07TbVSTYVbzldATeZx8p-N88YY0dKIQaJ0c-fKa2dMO9dr0qeVBGt9rom2nLdVDa8p3wpnvHNybum1tNWuvWGHRt15Z-OGEKa1RYK4VVZ_qOZ-qJ-rsyjSnamp3Pkqq8cuY37XP4yItTZWUrw7Dm_NyL5keBY4Gjle2Zk4TAqbo-V4u8ChzpLkcucNzYeQLLMXMqcDxtCxyvFRR2QDb7uMA1Cf-w4MEhfGClaMU-gGKUI1re4UoCVx2g6ODBH3CUzxdJfznsDkvZS4Q5MTvZgKyVI-YdnkmWRBuczVTdmNY0Css0uOe3D8Hv-tRfNvLhss3_d6PXgH8CAAD__3C_qaY) in a statement.
## Pecos River Murals Show 4,000 Years of History
Researchers from Texas State University and the Shumla Archaeological Research and Education Center in Val Verde County have [constructed a timeline](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2SozAQhU8DGRRqkGQFCjYh86YbUm2psbpWRpSkMfacfgpfYeL36ns__67LFTnydv-LD7L1taZlo6NEqpXyUlxIKbqQ2FH-ilRW3jDyNy0wgOwEdAMsHjm-l6n19jZ4I1qyQqtJaXXRUxus8VJ5ic7dRg9OKjA44KqNh_Xi3ahatidMwAACBiGgl9pIWtEgmpvQo26mgTzXlPsaqNILyxrf6Um5d-nRRhtq3Usz_mlgbmA-jqN3IaftVBuYzzkNzJgru0ingUrtPphuJ5dKl5P73-3IW-XtXjoQIORFm34Pe5ut3w-OkYs6e9wfyPETW3931tPCTwAAAP__rC1_XQ) for dozens of pictographs along the Pecos River, using radiocarbon dating to find that some are nearly 6,000 years old. In an [article](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQgOGnMVuQ7wAbDx66sKVrR3Sxj3CSgyPshqRPX6Wv0Bf4P-n_Os9nkiTb9ZNu7OtzyfPGR0lcK-9zCWvOKaxZAu_ficsiGyX54Rk1DifAk8Y5kqTX3DfRX3R00LAHa3pjzWj7ZvWWh44vYzQudAQ0OqtZjz1oZ00_OteIf8cANQJqAGwH6wZeyBG5C9jOql5zlJr3tq5c-UllSa_84L0N-dYkv9Z6L6r7UDgpnI7jaEsQ3gK3eb8qnGIWhRPf46JwAt0CoFE4lSAUHy3Fp0U9NLuP90NSkmLe4vVGkv6A-r8tD4-_AQAA___9OXRW) published in the November issue of _Science Advances_ , the researchers discovered that the pictographs were painted over a period of about 4,000 years using the [same materials and methods](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAQRL9G6tYgadGKChVp3F3alMKSWloLr7gGSfvO-fpAQf7g6gFm5r3fH8sHsnC-_cKd5vaVdMn0WYVao7LUuKlK3JQjladQTZxR-A8tzjgP1oFxy4os72Xo1zmYdbI9zXa8DJfx8mMc-m3245iGMHn0GIKdgndT8kRnCmdrVz_1PB9l1hlnnbHWnfw4eUo4IU7BjuexGwyt3LSc2kaNvrAmeeuLyinq3su8tfao3fln566du2K5kx4Mp0ytc9e2EeBOhSNWUFmpNiga7_BAzo3zrUKhF6EAwmCMgTdhgahH9nzuoAkCCVMCzCsgPLRWDkKAOVJtBQWE8x2awk5V_09liFp3Fb29O3fty7w-PlmE6-XAue3I8u99-57z1-z-BgAA__-TdZrd), indicating the practice was passed down from one generation to the next. The murals portray consistent symbols, and many are [nearly the same age](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D_yoyAUB_DTaKcDT4VQUGxjl223dAg85M0QcICNcU-_k1zhd4HP98-f-3Y3FCntv80TdXv7vCU8a8TWsGzVhpyjDZkslr8Rq6dkIv3DDRgsA4eBweYMxWube6cfzCneo-ZSzEKKm5z7oEGyCQRfQN0mtziY50V4xZ3wbPLCqZ70B-PAgAPjHMZFqgW9UcaoB5eT7GaGjlouYwvY8G2qj1d-YRltfvZRh9aO2k2_Olg7WM_zHE2yhKkNudBOqY4JWwfrZ9gQqLZcrsEUGwzmmPerg_WrDgfZlvdijlAHxjiDaV76ot1xUoxUxafJ_jQUv8HtZ3e9NPwPAAD__6vvf44), suggesting they represent a unified "visual narrative" of cultural beliefs that influenced Mesoamerican societies like the Aztecs and Mayans. "_Perhaps the most exciting thing of all is that today Indigenous communities in the U.S. and Mexico can relate the stories communicated through the imagery to their own cosmologies_ ," said Texas State University anthropology professor [Carolyn Boyd](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFygzAQheHTQAeD1oCgUJGGzmlTMou0mJ0IySOtsZ3TZ8gVcoH3f_O-rvMV2XO4feJORl5rnAM9sycRSnO2W4zebpEtpYenvHJAzz80QwNdpaBqYHbI_j23pTNL40ZVklG6b3vdD7otN-OUIjcumsYBFt0PrkNcBnCX0Q3W2aZkc44paEBBoxTUnR47WnFEHBelL7poG3IsMdWykdAL8-rf8aBU27iX3mwi91xcPgqYCphOfi2vLDW5RwFTokyY7FZhcBWHEA8UjqGA6cwWMN3JxlwlPihVKdrvCpPUm-y-TMbdn-w95_5E3HZk_9eU_z11GPgNAAD__2NjfuM).

Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Colder Temps Predicted Temperatures across North Texas will likely for the first time this season this morning, and parts of the Panhandle on Thursday ahead of a warmup as the weekend approaches. Currently, the La Niña weather pattern—driven by cooler-than-average temperatures in the Pacific Ocean near the equator—is expected to keep the polar jet stream from dipping too far into Texas throughout the winter, producing weather. According to a from the Farmers' Almanac, North and Central Texas could see snow around the middle of this month, and rain is expected for much of the state the week before Christmas. Historically, the Panhandle has a roughly 10% chance of experiencing a white Christmas. School Choice Program Rules Finalized Rules for the state's new $1 billion school choice program were by the Texas comptroller's office last week. Authorized by the legislature earlier this year, Education Freedom Accounts will provide most students participating in the program with approximately $10,300 to pay for . Students with disabilities could receive up to $30,000, while those who are homeschooled are eligible for $2,000. New York-based Odyssey will to administer the program. Private schools and vendors can apply for eligibility on Dec. 9, while families can apply for funding on Feb. 6, 2026. Families should learn if they have been accepted by early May. Acting Comptroller Kelly Hancock's office published the final rules after in September and receiving more than 200 written comments on a draft proposal. "These administrative rules, like the program itself, put Texas parents in the driver’s seat ," in a statement. Pecos River Murals Show 4,000 Years of History Researchers from Texas State University and the Shumla Archaeological Research and Education Center in Val Verde County have for dozens of pictographs along the Pecos River, using radiocarbon dating to find that some are nearly 6,000 years old. In an published in the November issue of Science Advances , the researchers discovered that the pictographs were painted over a period of about 4,000 years using the , indicating the practice was passed down from one generation to the next. The murals portray consistent symbols, and many are , suggesting they represent a unified "visual narrative" of cultural beliefs that influenced Mesoamerican societies like the Aztecs and Mayans. "Perhaps the most exciting thing of all is that today Indigenous communities in the U.S. and Mexico can relate the stories communicated through the imagery to their own cosmologies ," said Texas State University anthropology professor . | Flying together with our sponsor Double the hope for families in need! Hi Peter,

Aftyn Behn’s special election is happening **TODAY in Tennessee** – but we are writing with two important updates about this race.
1\. ) According to _The Hill_ , recent polling shows that this race will be TIGHT. **In fact, the latest polling showed Behn and her opponent Matt Van Epps neck and neck. A truly UNBELIEVABLE metric in a district that Trump won by 22%.**
Aftyn is an INCREDIBLE candidate and voters are FIRED UP about the possibility of someone like her representing them in Washington.
2\. ) TRUMP has taken notice of this phenomenon and, in true Trump form, has been attacking Aftyn on Truth Social. His attack? That she “openly disdains Country music.”

clean_body: That can only mean one thing 😙| | | | | = Hi Peter, Aftyn Behn’s special election is happening TODAY in Tennessee – but we are writing with two important updates about this race. 1\. ) According to The Hill , recent polling shows that this race will be TIGHT. In fact, the latest polling showed Behn and her opponent Matt Van Epps neck and neck. A truly UNBELIEVABLE metric in a district that Trump won by 22%. Aftyn is an INCREDIBLE candidate and voters are FIRED UP about the possibility of someone like her representing them in Washington. 2\. ) TRUMP has taken notice of this phenomenon and, in true Trump form, has been attacking Aftyn on Truth Social. His attack? That she “openly disdains Country music.” = Tennessee ranks among the lowest for maternal care outcomes AND female representation in government. We know we need women in the rooms where decisions are being made about OUR bodies – and Tennessee is a perfect example of what happens when men are the ones making all the laws. subject: Sparks Fly at Confrontational Lewiston School Committee Monday Night
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Sparks Fly at Confrontational Lewiston School Committee Monday Night (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=2d8f46c2a6&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Jon Fetherston on Dec 02, 2025 06:59 am
The controversy surrounding Ward 5 school committee member Iman Osman’s residency erupted into a full-scale public reckoning Monday night, as residents and even fellow school committee members accused the board of deliberately avoiding accountability and refusing to enforce its own basic eligibility rules. While the Lewiston school committee narrowly voted last week not to investigate [...]

Eligible Lewiston residents will have the chance to go to the polls on February 24 to participate in a special election to fill the House District 94 seat recently vacated by former Rep. Kristen Cloutier (D), Maine’s secretary of state announced on Monday. Comprising a swathe of central Lewiston running from the Androscoggin River up [...]

The Trump administration’s sharp escalation of immigration enforcement is creating new uncertainty across Maine’s immigrant and refugee communities, recent reports suggest. A confluence of factors is leading to this new pressure. Federal officials have slashed refugee admissions, increased deportations and detention actions, and began reviewing immigration cases approved under the previous administration. At the same [..]

Paying homage to that stubborn, all-American, in-your-face spirit, an iconic southern-Maine business is refusing to compromise its red-meat principles. “Turkey burgers will not be served for the 72nd year in a row,” Rapid Ray’s owners posted on Facebook to widespread applause. “Not all heroes wear capes,” Travis Herring of Saco said, praising Ray’s no-woke-burger policy. It’s taken nearly three decades but the missing historic Curtis Island Lighthouse fog bell has been found – 70 miles away on Deer Isle. The Camden Harbor bell warned mariners from 1896 until 1970. Can’t you think standing up?” The room fell silent. Buckley looked angry, serious, ponderous. He took a few moments to gather his [...]

Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]
