The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | First Invеstmеnt Updаtеs brоught tо уоu bу Іnception Media, LLC. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

name: Team Downing
subject: China is taking over the USA one farm at a time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
It’s time to draw a line in the sand. Please read:

Peter,
Whether you want to admit it or not, the Chinese Communist Party is quietly taking over America one farm at a time.
China already owns land in **27 states** , including properties alarmingly close to U.S. military bases. **
* **Our ****farmers are being undercut.**
* **Our food supply is at risk.**

Peter, Alaska needs to have a serious conversation about the Permanent Fund. _**I'll start with this:**_
We must **STOP** playing politics with it. Neither the State nor ANY politician can promise a full PFD. That's the truth, and most politicians won't be honest with you about it. I have fought to protect the PFD since 2003 in the Legislature, and I will continue to do so as your governor. Right now, the Fund isn't sustainable as is. Lawmakers can dip into it and use it as a political tool, spend it recklessly, and shrink the payout for over 700,000 Alaskans. We can fix this by combining the funds into one secure endowment via constitutional amendment. That way it cannot be raided, changed, or stolen from the people of Alaska. We rely on this fund for critical infrastructure, education, and many more state-funded and people-driven initiatives. If we don't work together to fix the issue, the Fund may be gone forever. It's time for politicians in Juneau to sit down, get to work, and protect this for the people of our great state. As governor, I promise to put YOU first, not special interests or greedy politicians. I was labeled **_"uncorruptible"_** and I intend to keep it that way. If you believe in smart, experienced, and uncorruptible leadership, I hope you take a minute to read more about me and my campaign and then consider **[_donating $3_](http://links.mail.nancyforalaska.com/u/click?_t=070db738c7d848a188c7a9e8a29f1bde&_m=7b1bcf9a7b1d47759075cf90d1cd4aa4&_e=dpI5YzpXGknpVYIyQwqhi4IOZjqXiqvQ3lQDxvq3UT2Ptx961IQqVPsVEjSEjbdBr3qJshAR28vcKeLbj4paJYZvOpoTieuYNwWBEN7ZN2MHsfR9D_G5hhCV_O0bJW0TKN_5xf65QJK4N-y6xuSq8r_mEc5ren9BNPJ69CnjjJurErUfbTgJhn_ajGKG1iRYGucKW2f95PABxKiuTDo2My9BcmXLlFlB4XtU80s8SDkTl5uVd6r-6DEcM6AV_aypslTeQr6anwKSRMveHS5AsFppZYWLKSauufweCiFAt4k0D0Jrf754kOYlBTUL76QlcPSML30yhwuTueHxwNL78yBIevoNTnJQkI4drbC2WZBW1D4HICZF5hNcoMAOhdcGsQlITQtCMdXOZJAQOMXEg5Cw_vvYaOtK4dH7iNsOmKc_J6FFeGr_eOJlSVBoc366VmDiGilqUzW8qwJ0Ql-mKJWJfja7lyWgc64DHwt6K27jEgtGEzfU13x5_xEuVPC5PnT3uJtUkKQNxwiiHQxoQCmhiPTN2t-0T5YngPuWLvIQ_4nXDrvw_HV1fiulaktxt2UKit67w5tKY4lFoQ93yhQWZ9d8Ws4lc0GAJovK4kpu6zIMIeNJt9ho8GN_1MdJ9aCRmgth_9HIePBczK_z6Bsz_Yp2ujuMTK-sLl1xsMU%3D)** or more.

We can fix this by combining the funds into one secure endowment via constitutional amendment. That way it cannot be raided, changed, or stolen from the people of Alaska. We rely on this fund for critical infrastructure, education, and many more state-funded and people-driven initiatives. If we don't work together to fix the issue, the Fund may be gone forever. It's time for politicians in Juneau to sit down, get to work, and protect this for the people of our great state. As governor, I promise to put YOU first, not special interests or greedy politicians. I was labeled "uncorruptible" and I intend to keep it that way. If you believe in smart, experienced, and uncorruptible leadership, I hope you take a minute to read more about me and my campaign and then consider or more. mailto:info@nancyforalaska.com?subject=Question for Nancy Thanks for thinking smart and supporting a stronger Alaska, Nancy Dahlstrom Alaska's Lt. Governor & 2026 Republican Candidate for Governor | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom For Governor P.O.Box 770725, Eagle River, Alaska 99577

subject: Why I’m running

body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120397080/586161158/186742633?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Relaunch1_251202_T1_1_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTMyMjVkMy03ZWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjC6l1A8Fhww_imy_utJeT0wGbZYnVvOonSvA4ZVtD8=) Derek – Today, I’m officially kicking off my reelection campaign – to keep up the fight for Virginia’s families, to stand up to the policies in Washington that are skyrocketing the cost of living, and to continue to bring people together to get it done.

And I’m personally asking you to join me in this important work. I need your bold ideas, your enthusiasm, and your commitment to making life better for your kids and grandkids with me on the campaign trail.

[_**And yes, I need your support in the form of a $5, $15, or $25 contribution. Your donation today is an investment in the campaign – and the future – we’re building together. My team set a goal of earning 5,000 donations this week to kick off our campaign with the grassroots strength we need to win. Every donation, no matter the size, helps us build momentum, reach voters, and get the job done.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120397082/586161161/186742633?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Relaunch1_251202_T1_1_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTMyMjVkMy03ZWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjC6l1A8Fhww_imy_utJeT0wGbZYnVvOonSvA4ZVtD8=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120397084/586161162/186742633?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Relaunch1_251202_T1_1_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTMyMjVkMy03ZWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjC6l1A8Fhww_imy_utJeT0wGbZYnVvOonSvA4ZVtD8=) [Become an Official Campaign Kickoff Donor >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120397087/586161166/186742633?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Relaunch1_251202_T1_1_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTMyMjVkMy03ZWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjC6l1A8Fhww_imy_utJeT0wGbZYnVvOonSvA4ZVtD8=) Look, I’ve always been focused on what’s next, on what’s on the horizon. I started a cell phone company back when everyone was still using landlines.

When I was first elected governor, it was on the promise to move Virginia forward. And we did. And, in the Senate, I’ve been focused on the challenges our country faces next:
* _Expanding broadband and economic opportunity to rural America._

* _Preparing our intelligence communities for 21-century threats in our increasingly interconnected world._

* _And standing up to Trump’s policies that raise prices and gut health care while he hands massive tax breaks to billionaires._

**But our work is far from over.**

Since the AI revolution, we’ve seen the job market in a freefall – while prices continue to rise. And Donald Trump and his crowd in Washington? They don’t have a clue what to do about it. They don’t even seem to care.

Instead of being paralyzed by fear – or worse – making futile attempts to turn back the clock, we need to ensure that innovation gives everyone a fair shot.

**This moment calls for big ideas.** A systematic economic re-tooling to prepare for the impacts of artificial intelligence, a complete overhaul of affordable housing and childcare, and universal health care coverage.

**We need a vision to chart a new path and effective leadership to get it done. That’s why I’m running for reelection to the United States Senate.**

[_**And I’m asking you to join me. Will you step up today to become one of the 5,000 donors my campaign is counting on before Friday? Contribute any amount right now to become an Official Campaign Kickoff Donor >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120397089/586161168/186742633?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Relaunch1_251202_T1_1_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTMyMjVkMy03ZWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjC6l1A8Fhww_imy_utJeT0wGbZYnVvOonSvA4ZVtD8=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120397093/586161169/186742633?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Relaunch1_251202_T1_1_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTMyMjVkMy03ZWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjC6l1A8Fhww_imy_utJeT0wGbZYnVvOonSvA4ZVtD8=) Our work starts now.

More soon,

Mark Warner [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120397095/586161171/186742633?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Relaunch1_251202_T1_1_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTMyMjVkMy03ZWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjC6l1A8Fhww_imy_utJeT0wGbZYnVvOonSvA4ZVtD8=)

name: Suzanne Beecher
subject: Will you pray
body:
She’s fighting censorship at the Supreme Court

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z76n9c1v8pk1q3k7saqnk4h2hn9vobv03724fb20_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cdie1ob2c3h2bs)

## **[Sign Your Name to Commit to Pray for Kaley's Supreme Court Case](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zulmusovpotuor9t6tg3u11q03ppu1n3naqpvs58_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cdie1ob2c3h2bs)**
Dear Fellow American, We're less than a month away from one of the biggest free speech cases at the U.S. Supreme Court!

Kaley Chiles will stand alongside her ADF attorneys to challenge a Colorado law that censors her speech in counseling conversations. It forbids licensed counselors like Kaley from having conversations that could help clients regain comfort with their sex--_even if that 's the client's goal._

It's a clear violation of the First Amendment. But this case also points to a much deeper, spiritual battle.

Laws like this one allow lies to spread--lies like one's sex can be changed and God makes mistakes with His creation. And these laws suppress truth from going forward by forbidding people like Kaley from speaking it.

Kaley is stepping up to challenge this law. And a win in her case could help roll back similar laws in 22 other states.

**I want you to think about that for a moment. One young woman 's courageous stand could reach countless lives with the truth.**

I've had the privilege of getting to know Kaley over the last few months, and I have been so encouraged by her unwavering hope in the Lord and commitment to the truth.

It's not been an easy road. The law threatens exorbitant fines and even loss of her license if she follows her convictions in the counseling room. She's also facing tremendous backlash for choosing to push back on this law--and more is sure to come. Our enemy, the father of lies, will work to oppose the truth and those who speak it at every turn.

But your prayers can make a difference. As we prepare for oral argument in Kaley's case on October 7th, will you please pray...
* **For Kaley** -- that God would strengthen and encourage her in the weeks leading up to her case, and that she would sense His peace in the months to come as we await the Court's decision
* **For her ADF attorneys** --that they would have clarity of mind and speech as they go to the Supreme Court, and that they would represent the Lord and our clients well
* **For our culture** --that God would use this case to open more eyes to the harms of gender ideology, and that hearts would turn toward the truth of knowing Him

**__**
[ Commit to Pray](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhdes8k7ujkot7brk22ssdv7950hpb0788c4h09g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cdie1ob2c3h2bs)

Thank you for your prayers--it's such an encouragement to know that friends like you are going to the Lord on our behalf!

In Christ, **Suzanne Beecher**
Legal Counsel
Alliance Defending Freedom

P.S. [Please sign your name to let Kaley and our ADF team know that you're praying for them as we prepare for this case at the U.S. Supreme Court!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z38v2s32nr535jfpfv7e6p5d7ddfiln1s5h33ok0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cdie1ob2c3h2bs)

subject: Join Us This Month!
body:

| Friends--
Join us this month in Yorktown and Virginia Beach as we continue spreading the word about affordability in Virginia.
December 5th: Health Care Heist: Taking it to the People
Stop the Healthcare Heist! Join us at this busy intersection for Part 2 of our action, where we're fighting to extend critical ACA credits and make healthcare truly affordable. Your voice is the missing piece--come stand with us!
---
| |
---
| | [JOIN US](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c5YYv2VfJpmx0PF6Vq0Y2xPC9Fa4rpPI2By-fJHC2ub7aHbYUFT948SAMg1QjLiDkelOLkVj368SFpbB4MPOK5pUows_qtp09a6XclhnwmayeXFLzUFWoxvYh3ezwV5jGr3ZDSj34QOuCbmwyW52d2FLC_TXFtKRq_zTYkDl1AAbn7f3P6o-CQzqzoPZtztZIdPy06kC_-qWOn747qgs0xvXKVys1GCuxnSnxhCGbsNB8Ui0nM9zKEWms7a_ojeoAov6j_lWjHCSdohzUvpOAie4gC7lvfYQgumWTcpfkBKmQW5CEXgzyQ==&c=UILCb9cmHB8DqjOsfLf_9-cCQCgh48kJMXOB8ANRYZPNSUGhOsYoCg==&ch=O9qxDPWZ1kh1lZdkTQYMAI99mnspX_RaQziDxlwy6PYJMlwA8CcQ6w==)

Join us for a discussion on affordability issues. Life is expensive--and it's only getting more costly. Box 10102 | Norfolk, VA 23513 US | | | | | | |

# Ivermectin Update
---
| |
---
| HB 25 from the 89th Second Special Legislative Session, the bill to allow pharmacists to **dispense Ivermectin to Texas patients without a physician’s prescription** , is set to take effect this week (Thursday, December 4 to be exact). This bill was a huge victory for the grassroots; it started as an idea but quickly became a movement - hundreds of online public comments, 7000 petition signatures, countless emails and phone calls to legislative offices, and several hours of debate on the Texas House floor. However, it will likely be **several weeks** before the new law is actually implemented in your local pharmacy. The bill’s verbiage grants the Texas State Board of Pharmacy the authority to propose rules regarding OTC Ivermectin, and typically the **rules adoption process involves a 30-day public comment period** before the new rules are in effect. While this seems inordinately slow, the comment period will allow for medical liberty supporters to**review and provide input on the proposed rules**. _Stay tuned because TFVC will issue an Action Alert once the rules have been posted, giving you the tools to quickly and effectively submit your thoughts_!
---

**Please consider chipping in today.**

name: MAGA UPDATES
subject: DOOMSDAY SCENARIO: Why Our Future Is Being STOLEN Right Now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado
body:
This is an existential crisis. Colorado must pick up the torch, join the fight, and meet this moment head on
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016B31kAR92nl46hH1JzCbdD8HrQqU-BVNl4d9l7f24XZ4ac6e_1RnB2IiyuwZWM0ipE1l1HTHrSN2GCQkzL5JNgll1PKgfm9xmKvHOHPfp2Ydw0oUjaWp-oZ3FKir1_DFWC4iNbY-L5EN9T6bpFhpjslSSq3z19RWAYe7rgpJVTtYPkBhx825lsSCmp0q_gGUqlcOevDBvNvAXNYUssECYm3duxfcUVyb&c=XD5csbG-AyXO3QKaObDCUPp9G1kGM4iy42TgJ-O90sU5TWDqeJTdXA==&ch=QIsZ2YxnqOIbdDVHViDnjQ2AgP4lDhXJ3WbpZVHrGSlE_xDp6OyWiw==)
---
| Peter,
Donald Trump's approval ratings just dropped to the lowest they have ever been -- a paltry 36%.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016B31kAR92nl46hH1JzCbdD8HrQqU-BVNl4d9l7f24XZ4ac6e_1RnB2IiyuwZWM0ipE1l1HTHrSN2GCQkzL5JNgll1PKgfm9xmKvHOHPfp2Ydw0oUjaWp-oZ3FKir1_DFWC4iNbY-L5EN9T6bpFhpjslSSq3z19RWAYe7rgpJVTtYPkBhx825lsSCmp0q_gGUqlcOevDBvNvAXNYUssECYrkaJ_L6J_IP&c=XD5csbG-AyXO3QKaObDCUPp9G1kGM4iy42TgJ-O90sU5TWDqeJTdXA==&ch=QIsZ2YxnqOIbdDVHViDnjQ2AgP4lDhXJ3WbpZVHrGSlE_xDp6OyWiw==)
---
If Republicans lose the House in 2026 (which they are presently on track for as shown by the above polling) Trump becomes a lame duck president unable to carry out any major policy initiatives for the remainder of his term.
For MAGA everything is on the line which is why they've resorted to rigging the upcoming midterms via red state redistricting. A last ditch effort to shore up their majority and save the Trump presidency from imminent doom.
Right now their plan is working. They are on track to steal enough House seats to make their House majority bulletproof. No matter how massive a blue wave we accomplish, the math won't work out for Democrats, we will lose the midterms despite every factor being in our favor.
For Democrats this is an existential crisis. Faced with these circumstances we have two options:

1. Lay down, let Republicans enshrine one party rule for generations to come, and pat ourselves on the back for not resorting to gerrymandering
2. Or, we start fighting back and beat them at their own game.

California and Virginia just chose option 2 but it won't be enough. More blue states must join the fight or it is game over.
Yesterday, Fair Fight Colorado announced that blue state Colorado will join this fight. We are pushing forward with a ballot initiative that will let Coloradans decide on a new Congressional map that lets us fight back against MAGA election rigging - however the success of this effort is by no means assured.
The entire MAGA redistricting strategy was based upon their expectation that we would take it and not fight back. [If we can prove them otherwise that plan will backfire and the rest of Trump's term will be an utter failure. Please, can you rush a donation of $25, $10, or whatever amount is meaningful to you to bring Colorado into this critical fight? ](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016B31kAR92nl46hH1JzCbdD8HrQqU-BVNl4d9l7f24XZ4ac6e_1RnB2IiyuwZWM0iZ-FNgBzGnOb_p8ClL4Xbu53A_qpvqrp5goH6SQk2riL3V_BiPGG6wcsqjWggdY3JN3MjV-13UtGcXa8ef3hSJ9SyzEtTJsX3AYmGkdrtPzrmkMEHt2SSqkax7TB0JhZjUXPTvb1IJK_RCqPgfNibUSrzSs1fCLXIWEg-kcAS3mrydHhKJ-2BOg==&c=XD5csbG-AyXO3QKaObDCUPp9G1kGM4iy42TgJ-O90sU5TWDqeJTdXA==&ch=QIsZ2YxnqOIbdDVHViDnjQ2AgP4lDhXJ3WbpZVHrGSlE_xDp6OyWiw==)

clean_body: This is an existential crisis. Colorado must pick up the torch, join the fight, and meet this moment head on | | | | | == | Peter, Donald Trump's approval ratings just dropped to the lowest they have ever been -- a paltry 36%. | == If Republicans lose the House in 2026 (which they are presently on track for as shown by the above polling) Trump becomes a lame duck president unable to carry out any major policy initiatives for the remainder of his term. For MAGA everything is on the line which is why they've resorted to rigging the upcoming midterms via red state redistricting. A last ditch effort to shore up their majority and save the Trump presidency from imminent doom. Right now their plan is working. They are on track to steal enough House seats to make their House majority bulletproof. No matter how massive a blue wave we accomplish, the math won't work out for Democrats, we will lose the midterms despite every factor being in our favor. For Democrats this is an existential crisis. Faced with these circumstances we have two options: 1. Lay down, let Republicans enshrine one party rule for generations to come, and pat ourselves on the back for not resorting to gerrymandering 2. Or, we start fighting back and beat them at their own game. California and Virginia just chose option 2 but it won't be enough. More blue states must join the fight or it is game over. Yesterday, Fair Fight Colorado announced that blue state Colorado will join this fight. We are pushing forward with a ballot initiative that will let Coloradans decide on a new Congressional map that lets us fight back against MAGA election rigging - however the success of this effort is by no means assured. The entire MAGA redistricting strategy was based upon their expectation that we would take it and not fight back. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == | | | | This is the fight of our lives. Thank you for doing your part in this historic moment. -- Team Fair Fight Colorado | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | | | | Donate by mail: Fair Fight Colorado 1601 Arapahoe Street FL 10 Denver, Colorado 80202 | | | Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado. # **Kristi Noem recommends "full travel ban" after DC shooting**
Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem said Monday she recommended to President Trump **[a"full travel ban on every damn country that's been flooding our nation](https://substack.com/redirect/0c45cf86-20cb-42eb-87b8-1f266d2ac51a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with killers, leeches, and entitlement junkies," following the fatal shooting of two West Virginia National Guard members in Washington, D.C., last Wednesday by an Afghan national who entered the country in 2021.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0c45cf86-20cb-42eb-87b8-1f266d2ac51a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump administration cracks down on Afghan immigration:** U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services indefinitely paused processing of immigration requests from Afghans on Wednesday after the shooting by Rahmanullah Lakanwal, who entered via a program for those who assisted the U.S. during its two-decade war in Afghanistan, with U.S. Army Spc. Sarah Beckstrom, 20, dying from her wounds Thursday while U.S. Air Force Staff Sgt. Andrew Wolfe, 24, remains in serious condition.
* **Green card review expanded to 19 countries:** USCIS Director Joseph Edlow said Thursday the agency is reexamining green cards from 19 countries of concern per presidential direction, based on a June White House memo restricting migration from Afghanistan, Burundi, Chad, Congo, Cuba, Equatorial Guinea, Eritrea, Haiti, Iran, Laos, Libya, Myanmar, Sierra Leone, Somalia, Sudan, Togo, Turkmenistan, Venezuela and Yemen, with DHS saying the full list of countries impacted by Noem's recommendation will be revealed soon.

# Nikki Haley's son blasts GOP for ignoring Gen-Z
Nalin Haley, **[son of former U.N. Ambassador Nikki Haley](https://substack.com/redirect/a599d5b1-9772-4e79-9ba1-4a42d294effa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , criticized Republican leadership Monday for failing to address unemployment and affordability crises devastating young Americans despite doing everything expected of them.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1878e043-4c58-4e65-9ca4-3c65b45009d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Congressional critique:** The Gen Z conservative activist told "Fox & Friends" that GOP leaders haven't acknowledged problems facing young people, calling Congress "nothing more than a glorified nursing home" where members "either don't know the problems that we're facing or they're ignoring them"
* **Employment and education crisis:** Haley reported one-third of recent college graduates are unemployed, revealing his entire friend group from prestigious schools remains jobless as they compete with foreign workers accepting half their salary and artificial intelligence, asking "how can we compete with that?"
* **Housing market nightmare:** First-time homebuyer age has surged to an all-time high of 40 compared to 33 just five years ago, according to National Association of Realtors data, with Haley noting his parents' late-90s house purchased for $90,000 is now worth over $400,000.
* **Haley proposed banning H-1B visas to prioritize American workers,** ending housing subsidies for illegal immigrants in favor of first-time homebuyer assistance, and blocking corporations and the Chinese Communist Party from purchasing entire neighborhoods.

* * *
## Bipartisan House Coalition pushes criminal justice database to combat federal overreach
An unusual alliance of conservative Freedom Caucus members and progressive Democrats is advancing legislation to create a database of **[federal criminal laws](https://substack.com/redirect/38eeace5-2702-4915-a793-ff07b3f821db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , aiming to address what they view as government regulation turning ordinary Americans into criminals.
* **Unlikely partnerships:** The bill led by Rep. Chip Roy, R-Texas, with support from Reps. Andy Biggs, R-Ariz., Lucy McBath, D-Ga., and Steve Cohen, D-Tenn., represents bipartisan cooperation driven by shared concerns about government overreach and Americans facing criminal liability for violations they don't understand.
* **Regulatory concerns highlighted:** Roy argued thousands of federal rules beyond "basic, Ten Commandments-like laws" create criminal penalties for everyday activities, citing EPA regulations that can make farmers criminals for routine land use, with violators sometimes jailed for breaking obscure regulatory codes derived from generic environmental statutes.
* **Database requirements:** The legislation would make the federal government to catalog all existing criminal laws and regulations while directing the Department of Justice to report prosecution numbers under each offense over the past 15 years, with McBath stating it ensures "Americans will no longer have to fear being excessively punished."
* **The House is expected to consider the bill this week,** potentially as early as Monday evening, marking another instance of Roy crossing partisan lines after previously partnering with Democrats on stock trading ban legislation.

name: Kendall Qualls
subject: This is why I got off the sidelines
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
I got off the sidelines to fight for America

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsakt2dgjgm4fmp7safam6k84nqugmbtf64sg52g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1ctg64o32c5h2bs)
---
| | Friend,
Minnesota is a warning for the nation: far-Left leaders like Tim Walz choose radical policies over the safety and prosperity of everyday Americans.
Higher taxes, reckless spending, and extreme social policies are hurting families, small businesses, and communities across the state.
**We can’t let this continue.** That’s why Kendall Qualls is running for governor: to restore conservative leadership and put Minnesota back on the path to safety, opportunity, and growth.
Even a donation of just $1 helps build a grassroots movement that can stand up to the Democrats’ agenda. **_[Will you support Kendall’s fight to FIRE Tim Walz by chipping in today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeheplc11opdsjjt0ka5f7hjgtv86bjrr509euoo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1ctg64o32c5h2bs)_**

---
[CHIP IN $1](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqlgmesog2he93cpou1eh97l973jr2msfkdrfdtg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1ctg64o32c5h2bs)
| | Tim Walz has turned his back on the people he’s supposed to serve. And to make matters worse, the national Democratic machine is backing him for a THIRD term as governor. We can’t allow things to continue like this.
**This fight isn’t just about Minnesota, it’s about protecting America from policies that threaten our economy, our freedoms, and our communities.**
**_[Will you chip in now to help Kendall Qualls fight back against Walz and the radical Left, defend conservative values, and take Minnesota back?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4p9ldelp1mvkk678dcj1l0016lctctsnbngcl20_rp22sh2s8i6eor1ctg64o32c5h2bs)_**

---
[CHIP IN $1](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z92n61o2k9ck7o69mjd0ankv2dkloog5h8hc4kdg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1ctg64o32c5h2bs)
| | Your support makes all the difference. With conservatives across the country standing together, we can stop Tim Walz and his allies from spreading their dangerous agenda any further.
Thank you for taking action today to defend Minnesota and America’s future.
Sincerely,Team Qualls
---
[RUSH IN $1](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc7m9imf9uug322j1953b8i6rtblkiqcgo2sa5vo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1ctg64o32c5h2bs)
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zevgar8mublomk2fvqub7t6lc0rk68b3gh5igkbg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1ctg64o32c5h2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlc4bj8od2nrcorfpl0m5gj5qc2j1qkf2gpthv50_rp22sh2s8i6eor1ctg64o32c5h2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

[DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0h254bo4dp48idso47fhv2098bcdnvo666v0j9g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1ctg64o32c5h2bs)
|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztnutl1vi0pkjcm6ib6tp6p66s52ldp9qss32010_rp22sh2s8i6eor1ctg64o32c5h2bs)
---
| | **The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts.**
[Shop the official Kendall Qualls Store today and wear your support with pride.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkf15q8qmeihri73jgqdltsbhedgqkscss8c97ag_rp22sh2s8i6eor1ctg64o32c5h2bs)
When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.
Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together.
---

name: Mike Johnson
subject: I need to speak with you first about something very important to me.

subject: URGENT EXTENSION NOTICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor
body:
We only have until midnight tonight...
We only have until midnight tonight...
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e636040/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvYTN6enh5SGdTOQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMDI/LbmNsNXFQU1pOUg/qP2hpZHM9bmNvb01TTG9laHJNdjVscw/gaS718g/s1q6fb2b5e8)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
Our grassroots support is truly incredible...
---
Thousands of America First patriots just came through for me at the final hour to help us CRUSH our very first monthly goal since I launched my campaign for governor.
---
**_But deadline be damned, we have to keep our foot on the gas and keep this momentum going. The race is already within the _margin_ _of_ _error_ , and Hochul is LOSING more ground with every passing day! _**
---
Polls now show a huge MAJORITY of New Yorkers – including New Yorkers from all political backgrounds – don’t want to see her reelected.
---
However, Hochul, Mamdani, and their Democrat allies aren’t going to simply roll over and accept defeat.
---
They’re flooding New York with MILLIONS OF DOLLARS to stall our surging momentum so they can keep Hochul and her new Far Left puppet-master Zohran Mamdani in power.
---
_To win a blue state like New York, we desperately need every dollar we can muster to counter their multimillion-dollar ad buys and take our own America First message directly to the voters._
---
That’s why I’ve secured an internal **24-HOUR DEADLINE EXTENSION** until _11:59 P.M. TONIGHT_ to help us raise the additional funds required to level the playing field against Hochul and Mamdani.
---
[**So please, make a contribution of ANY amount before 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to take advantage of this extension – _and help us unlock a *REAL* 600% MATCH from New York State._**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Elise Stefanik

body:
This race, right now, is the firewall
| | | | **
🚨🚨🚨
BREAKING POLL:
_"MARGIN-OF-ERROR RACE"_**
Friend,
**A brand new poll just broke. We're up – _barely._**

**This poll shows this is a margin-of-error race, and we must kick things into overdrive.**

_That means laying out the stakes, right now._

**I've talked a lot about my story and priorities, but now I must spend a moment explaining my opponent Aftyn Behn's record of complete left-wing lunacy.**

As you read this mind-blowing list of "greatest hits," ask yourself if this is who President Trump, or any level-headed American, needs wielding power in Congress.
---
|
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0aa28cb6d6994eeb8034654b451622f9&_e=R66yp-Ae3w734ub867qcDQxNbf8z3o1c_-bthoyPxXjiYO6El0lhYlkfEEMKbed7Rvnvf6TERaOxMHxbhJA5rQ6DBgoRwxgayWYMNgDHUtjZ7ZEpBgLACg8SeKe75w7-b3LHRWMwl5RKDMIOc90bMfctjHj5q189INORcbRplzSPQ02EK_uru22bKfvy5EK6R4XOGxARze_arAHUmsveT7C-woPkp8iPpbA8y7lBhCwX8Ov5uqq5EWb1Xb0FNh0mwrCK-FcHuBJqGXHC0GSu9aXk61hhhSyYwiZQigKEAGFgwmuLxD9zFmiDwaeG6_NWPE3n-5Zlw0dO7e-8M-KuY51GNXsq2uDZ16aaAl6j3DztXcJ02fTJssjBxl2pqG61G56LItC2YjYoWyGSTOwAuAuACGA-PB0kSMUSloA9LFb2b91Z7pVBx4FziN27lJwhgKNeEMCpOvUrw0scyuIEksBrcCdeBgq8XNwoXByXSGQLJexQlCgWpT2Fh66oo1HODg-0HurYV2d7Sg_F6Lf3sWdcJzKnHJYzYUIsDVafp_8Ubr0mKWyvgZJnWDMHKVxG-SittJeyuR_0_3I1XuSbzhOlmmJUuRr5MNTqgmcxtQMFr5e4nQP-kUeUJ9PALZqbAJP8zFEns6brpJojqWGO_lNA0L2dwHEw7a_CrdlvzB0%3D)

1️⃣ After _Roe_ was overturned, **pushed for "self-managed abortions" at home** , and vowed to **"get abortion pills to people" in red states** (even without parental consent for minors).
2️⃣ Called Tennessee **"deeply racist"** and labeled Nashville **"racist" and a hub of "white supremacy."** Going further, she mocked Southern traditions like sororities as **"staples of white supremacy"** and flat-out declared: **"I hate this city."**
3️⃣ Argued that traditional family roles, especially those of full-time moms, are **"patriarchal chains" that "trap women in unpaid labor and dependency,"** and urged feminists to **"abolish the nuclear family model."** Her "recurring dream from therapy," she announced, is "standing up in a cafeteria full of women and saying **'_I don't want children. I want power!'_ "**
4️⃣ Amid the 2020 BLM riots, called for **dissolving the Nashville Police Department** and **celebrated the burning down of police stations** as "justified."
5️⃣ In 2019, hysterically screamed **"This is fascism!"** and wept uncontrollably as security forcibly removed her from Tennessee Governor Bill Lee's office during a sit-in over education funding, **calling Republicans "fascists"** in the same rant.

name: Survival
subject: Why redistricting is a life or death fight Dems must take on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado
body:
This is an existential crisis. Colorado must pick up the torch, join the fight, and meet this moment head on
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vGFhKNopbgW9iDxBXUq1XLzwtJuFlj7OoryGBTzAJOTBi-SEHxekLjhMmCjmfHxWTM0oyDTU7yfMrrBa7NIJXIBxwwPNhlKzy7s7yUoQbNUVk50NExgv6MVZC4CG_4kyJMNTQCLCiMj45nIeM3megCPnzr5BuTpqzjjSl1CobTyxBe_oAjn5XLn1HWne8kHMvO_YvLcBnVbuatqJU71B14iI5QzVn9FBzH2kpMuGtxI=&c=-FpH4rTjnPgRYK6okHwukpA0y9mOYApto3RR48UaOc2nwmnIDCYdkQ==&ch=5cbP0eg1aXmc3Pu7Ks-ddNlXXvT-yCxwGZg_z701ePTl26XsOjsM_w==)
---
| Peter,
Donald Trump's approval ratings just dropped to the lowest they have ever been -- a paltry 36%.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vGFhKNopbgW9iDxBXUq1XLzwtJuFlj7OoryGBTzAJOTBi-SEHxekLjhMmCjmfHxWTM0oyDTU7yfMrrBa7NIJXIBxwwPNhlKzy7s7yUoQbNUVk50NExgv6MVZC4CG_4kyJMNTQCLCiMj45nIeM3megCPnzr5BuTpqzjjSl1CobTyxBe_oAjn5XLn1HWne8kHMvO_YvLcBnVbuatqJU71B105BjkykDeueJlaLf8SgH-k=&c=-FpH4rTjnPgRYK6okHwukpA0y9mOYApto3RR48UaOc2nwmnIDCYdkQ==&ch=5cbP0eg1aXmc3Pu7Ks-ddNlXXvT-yCxwGZg_z701ePTl26XsOjsM_w==)
---
If Republicans lose the House in 2026 (which they are presently on track for as shown by the above polling) Trump becomes a lame duck president unable to carry out any major policy initiatives for the remainder of his term.
For MAGA everything is on the line which is why they've resorted to rigging the upcoming midterms via red state redistricting. A last ditch effort to shore up their majority and save the Trump presidency from imminent doom.
Right now their plan is working. They are on track to steal enough House seats to make their House majority bulletproof. No matter how massive a blue wave we accomplish, the math won't work out for Democrats, we will lose the midterms despite every factor being in our favor.
For Democrats this is an existential crisis. Faced with these circumstances we have two options:

1. Lay down, let Republicans enshrine one party rule for generations to come, and pat ourselves on the back for not resorting to gerrymandering
2. Or, we start fighting back and beat them at their own game.

California and Virginia just chose option 2 but it won't be enough. More blue states must join the fight or it is game over.
Yesterday, Fair Fight Colorado announced that blue state Colorado will join this fight. We are pushing forward with a ballot initiative that will let Coloradans decide on a new Congressional map that lets us fight back against MAGA election rigging - however the success of this effort is by no means assured.
The entire MAGA redistricting strategy was based upon their expectation that we would take it and not fight back. [If we can prove them otherwise that plan will backfire and the rest of Trump's term will be an utter failure. Please, can you rush a donation of $25, $10, or whatever amount is meaningful to you to bring Colorado into this critical fight?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vGFhKNopbgW9iDxBXUq1XLzwtJuFlj7OoryGBTzAJOTBi-SEHxekLjhMmCjmfHxW9_S-tkf_KWTpsDtlniuSSGPHADKdtvQDcgHyw1q4r8Iuq1vGcgmWrDE6SLTo4KmkHMITp-MddWkNIpTbxE-kauExxivfRmscJPdZ2uXSiz5Mli-Co1JsmFil5UI0VoiaEY4f6Nr8aVDQWaUm2wFmDb2m6QFcJylyK-1-8mukDxPxa3RTD2uCyA==&c=-FpH4rTjnPgRYK6okHwukpA0y9mOYApto3RR48UaOc2nwmnIDCYdkQ==&ch=5cbP0eg1aXmc3Pu7Ks-ddNlXXvT-yCxwGZg_z701ePTl26XsOjsM_w==)

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

**Simmy Adelman, Editor**
_Behind the Markets_
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Simmy Adelman, Editor Behind the Markets Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? body:
Guess who supports socialism in America? | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2053e75806e1/conforti-for-congress-10612107?e=25f4fa3311)

| | | Dear Peter, Recently the U.S. House of Representatives passed a bipartisan resolution to denounce socialism in America. An overwhelming 285 representatives voted in favor of the bill with 98 voting against it. Guess who voted against it?

Yes, Sean Casten is now out in the open as a true-blue Socialist. His vote NOT to condemn socialism on American soil proves it.

Sean Casten does not support the American way of life. He believes he is better than most and part of the elite class. He feels he is entitled to his Congressional seat, and we are to do his bidding. Do you agree with him?

If not, it is time for him to go. It is time to use your vote and show him that he does not represent your values. You deserve a congressman that serves the people and works on your behalf. You deserve someone that will stand up and fight for you - not work against you by voting in favor of socialism.

Vote Niki Conforti for Congressional District 6 at the upcoming primary election on March 17th, 2026.

Help us spread the word with a contribution. Click the link below to make a donation today.

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=69a2ce33cd&e=25f4fa3311)

Don't stop believing in what we can achieve when we work together!
Your support is greatly appreciated.
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District

name: Justin Riemer - RITE President
subject: Maryland Elections Officials Back Down on Illegal Alien Voter Registration Records
body:
RITE & AAF Obtain Info on Ian Andre Roberts, the illegal alien school superintendent |
---
| |
---
| | **Maryland Elections Officials Back Down on Illegal Alien Voter Registration Records**
_RITE & AAF Force Release of Info on Ian Andre Roberts, illegal alien Iowa school superintendent_
**PRINCE GEORGE’S COUNTY, MD** — The Prince George’s County Board of Elections has reversed course and produced [unredacted versions of voter registration records](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=000954fa3a&e=ea91f782ea) for Ian Andre Roberts, the illegal alien and Guyanese national who somehow rose to become the superintendent of Iowa’s largest school system. County elections officials had previously released only redacted copies, which omitted Roberts’ answer to the question, “Are you a U.S. citizen?”

The Board produced the previously withheld eligibility information, which demonstrates that Roberts lied about his citizenship, only after Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections (RITE) and the American Accountability Foundation (AAF) issued a formal demand under the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) and publicly warned of imminent federal litigation.

The production follows a sharply worded NVRA enforcement letter sent on November 20, 2025, which was subsequently publicized by [Fox News](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=d974a62285&e=ea91f782ea) and the [Washington Examiner](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=95137e6ac7&e=ea91f782ea). In that letter, RITE and AAF notified county officials that their extensive redactions, including the concealment of Roberts’s answer to the U.S. citizenship question, violated binding Fourth Circuit Court of Appeals precedent and exposed the County to federal liability and attorney-fee sanctions.

Rather than defend their position in court, county officials backed down and produced the unredacted records.

The records confirm that Roberts affirmatively claimed U.S. citizenship on his voter-registration application, and that Maryland election officials took his word for it. Additionally, [State Board of Elections Administrator Jared DeMarinis](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=118615b7f4&e=ea91f782ea) stated that Maryland generally initiates non-citizen removals based only on voter self-reports or jury commissioner referrals. As a result, even [extensive federal immigration records](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=02f96591ce&e=ea91f782ea)—including a final order of removal issued more than a year ago—appear insufficient, standing alone, to prompt the State to begin the voter removal process under Maryland’s current practices.

“This case demonstrates exactly why Congress enacted the NVRA’s public disclosure mandate,” said Justin Riemer. “When election officials attempt to hide eligibility records, the public loses the ability to verify that the law is being followed. Once the records were produced, we saw just how weak Maryland’s safeguards really are. This is unfortunately all too common around the country and federal laws do little to help stop noncitizens from registering to vote.”

“The records show us what we all know - Maryland is not serious about keeping noncitizens off the voter rolls,” said Tom Jones of AAF. “Sadly, there are likely thousands more non-citizens on Maryland’s voter rolls.”

RITE has been a national leader in advancing citizen-only voting and ensuring states properly maintain their voter rolls. RITE successfully sued Maryland last year for enacting a regulation that prohibited the public from auditing the accuracy of the state’s voter rolls. The organization has also filed briefs supporting President Trump’s Executive Order directing the EAC to require proof of citizenship on the national registration form, sued cities that extended voting rights to noncitizens in local elections, and taken legal action in North Carolina and Arizona to stop overseas noncitizen voting. RITE has also litigated to uphold laws requiring states to verify voter eligibility at the point of registration. ###
---

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: What many retirees wish they had put more into
body:
| Hi Peter, What do retirees regret the most? Not saving enough and retiring too early are up there as top regrets.1 So is neglecting their health.2 Those regrets and others could be why 1 in 4 retirees feel anxious, and depressed.3 They can also reveal what it really takes to live a good life when you retire.
---
|
---
If you've had tunnel vision with retirement planning, you probably haven't thought much about the transition into retirement or the details of what's next. Those details, however, can make _all_ the difference in how satisfying you find life in retirement. Seeing that bigger picture and planning for it with more intention are the focus of this month's Visual Insights Newsletter. [**Click here to see it!**](https://financeinsights.net/aQYgtnYnghWGaDnI7jVKnSXx3wL?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Small shifts can go a long way toward making your next chapter as rewarding as you imagined and maybe even _better._ If you know what shifts to make and what types of wealth to build, you can translate plans into a retirement that feels fulfilling and meaningful. [**Go ahead and click here to see what types of wealth can truly enrich your retirement.**](https://financeinsights.net/aQYgtnYnghWGaDnI7jVKnSXx3wL?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) To planning for the future you want to live,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial

Please, rush a donation to double your impact and help immigrant families access life-saving legal support.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWzadU9N9RNMkN_aPwx_gUWMyhrdkC01LWf7qDIV-X_SfNT1mpyRhipiKDWZuKh9G2xnm3a8Q_ZTLc3CbCqOIqONGLXYQDMLrP-u4cD8gPLSX1a8Ovvh0h_G7kCFC8GLD-ThsrfaIoAZbrmsf2ZA8exuT6cL6RSeuvZ6_x6vz_eFWnwKmaKc0nXXJteQFtp7bCqZNLTa8aE0IFSKm_Bq_q5qGs-hfc75XOcDzHtBJwqSOreVbv8SlGnNbCNmmXfZrk_0uFbygdNn2bWd5ei2vtfA-32FGw73i3JIJrcv2zgPboQFemxvXfo4x3-fr5-bDtlyc8Xh0hc6K6I1gA87ppPGBtup3ZjH6LFo09J6WBVIjsZwsMeEzPvogfnu_lYbS0Qo9HEO314M5dVk2BcKk9eej8JwjnKsaEsSdN2dNdYly/4m3/eGMZJ349TMG-Z8onHQQdXg/h0/h001.G8l3m4gHjQ6mf6S2o2tyZkFIvI4nc3g8b4asYZvemyA) | | [RUSH A DONATION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWzadU9N9RNMkN_aPwx_gUWMyhrdkC01LWf7qDIV-X_SfNT1mpyRhipiKDWZuKh9G2xnm3a8Q_ZTLc3CbCqOIqONGLXYQDMLrP-u4cD8gPLSX1a8Ovvh0h_G7kCFC8GLD-ThsrfaIoAZbrmsf2ZA8exuT6cL6RSeuvZ6_x6vz_eFWnwKmaKc0nXXJteQFtp7bCqZNLTa8aE0IFSKm_Bq_q5qRwIaFtYENWafCIpN7eLlpm6LGcLsem3hy5mjx-CHeP3kS50tOyIG76EsQMmXiwIvgmrhtMuwb5mzC9-_fNA53CR1mAOgn6VmvgA0_p4PbBB24fpNZ6ZrZqnrqKtH7b6BD2ljeHZoPnAf0gjxzbBT5RPkkhzTGF2W6ZCQraW1Z1e673X22qEw-XotSc4-ogNnhnv6VvnLX6YBxdpEZe6iA/4m3/eGMZJ349TMG-Z8onHQQdXg/h1/h001.UFwYv0d7CWlUq7GJZFlHUoT0k7-8pU_7Zk3fDPptKgw)
---
Across the country, everyday people are meeting authoritarian threats with powerful solidarity. As masked immigration officers continue to target our communities, neighbors are bravely stepping up to protect each other.
_Still, our friends and neighbors are being arrested without due process, and families are being torn apart._
The **Defending Our Neighbors Fund** was created to ensure that immigrant families have fair access to lawyers and are not facing a complex and punishing immigration system on their own.
**Without legal representation, a family’s chances of staying together collapse.** Data shows that, in courts with the highest deportation rates, over 90% of cases involving people in detention ended in removal orders. And over the past five years, 62% of immigrants without a lawyer were deported compared to 27% of those with legal aid.1
Legal support makes a _profound_ difference in whether families can stay together, but due to the cost, it is increasingly out of reach. The Defending Our Neighbors Fund provides a lifeline for financial support to trusted legal organizations working in communities across the country.
[**Your donation right now goes twice as far in expanding access to legal assistance, keeping more families connected, and helping people navigate a complicated legal system with basic fairness and dignity. clean_body: This Giving Tuesday, you can double your impact and bring urgent legal assistance to immigrant families in need. | | | Peter — | | Across the country, everyday people are meeting authoritarian threats with powerful solidarity. As masked immigration officers continue to target our communities, neighbors are bravely stepping up to protect each other. Still, our friends and neighbors are being arrested without due process, and families are being torn apart. The Defending Our Neighbors Fund was created to ensure that immigrant families have fair access to lawyers and are not facing a complex and punishing immigration system on their own. Without legal representation, a family’s chances of staying together collapse. Data shows that, in courts with the highest deportation rates, over 90% of cases involving people in detention ended in removal orders. And over the past five years, 62% of immigrants without a lawyer were deported compared to 27% of those with legal aid.1 Legal support makes a profound difference in whether families can stay together, but due to the cost, it is increasingly out of reach. The Defending Our Neighbors Fund provides a lifeline for financial support to trusted legal organizations working in communities across the country. | In this moment of division, we must all come together to defend our neighbors. This Giving Tuesday, your gift helps keep families together and ensures justice for our communities. Thank you. 🧡 — Greisa, United We Dream * 1. “Where Can You Win in Immigration Court? The Impact of Lawyers, Detention, Geography, and Policy.” American Immigration Council. November 20, 2025. Follow us on: | | | | |

Peter, Serving the public in Congress isn’t a get-rich-quick scheme. Yet it’s clear that some members of Congress are leveraging sensitive information and their connections on the Hill to beef up their stock portfolios. In order to restore trust in Congress, it’s time to pass the _**Restore Trust in Congress Act**_ that would _finally_ ban lawmakers from trading stocks. I spent a decade fighting crime and corruption in New York City, and my commitment to rooting out corruption applies especially to the body in which I serve: Congress. **[We cannot sit by and allow this abuse of power to continue. If you’re with me, please make a contribution that will support my work and send a message that people want integrity to return to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120425576/586240712/624619952?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTBjZjcyNi05MmNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFsG-oMVtiqa3kiS-f9PMzCSVz1yfTdtQVjl7OzePVk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120425580/586240714/1749249761?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTBjZjcyNi05MmNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFsG-oMVtiqa3kiS-f9PMzCSVz1yfTdtQVjl7OzePVk=)

Peter,
We have spent decades being told that secret wars and covert operations keep America safe. We were told that what happens overseas stays overseas.
We are now seeing the horrifying proof that this is a lie.
By now you know about the "double-tap" strike ordered by Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth in early September. You know that he reportedly ordered our military to bomb a boat, wait for survivors to surface, and then bomb them again.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j0bkOAXHbrlBLlYFVWVMnHSvAh9fwp50ZXUqkDvqNKYDg2AufQfbmp4K_SAEXBta_ZhiR7hvgtjYi2xtBCzx2G8BuqRu7v4C3sHI5QSJJugMLWMfAPct3eALyozDoBWnSBikhkDn1hiwoPDLRg2t_oS8M31X_qkAEGf3qdtIyN1JJYOwAEQM-h9j2EaZseOj3SuBQU0H9pEJ_k-9mOc4YFd-W9HYgnCp&c=ddDxlukebp6d03IoF6cVNkyRmKNHCH2u-15_7Dc0mE6LmHS-d2Re1w==&ch=UvQLWFd1DbnpnY0rHUVp-2yYP9pc6kA9QK9_Vfn45Zea9klstozaPQ==)
---
|
This is not defense. It is a war crime. It is the kind of lawless brutality that breeds generational hatred.
And just days ago, we saw that hatred come home to our capital when two National Guard members were shot in Washington, D.C. by an Afghan soldier who had been resettled in America.
This was not a random act. The shooter, Rahmanullah Lakanwal, was a member of a CIA-backed "Zero Unit" death squad in Afghanistan. Recruited by the CIA at age 15. He was trained by our government to commit extrajudicial killings which included frequent massacres of children at religious schools that US and Afghan authorities feared the Taliban would recruit from.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j0bkOAXHbrlBLlYFVWVMnHSvAh9fwp50ZXUqkDvqNKYDg2AufQfbmp4K_SAEXBta_ZhiR7hvgtjYi2xtBCzx2G8BuqRu7v4C3sHI5QSJJugMLWMfAPct3eALyozDoBWnSBikhkDn1hiwoPDLRg2t_oS8M31X_qkAEGf3qdtIyN1JJYOwAEQM-h9j2EaZseOj3SuBQU0H9pGwAelM7FQ8pfKQWeS_7s5E&c=ddDxlukebp6d03IoF6cVNkyRmKNHCH2u-15_7Dc0mE6LmHS-d2Re1w==&ch=UvQLWFd1DbnpnY0rHUVp-2yYP9pc6kA9QK9_Vfn45Zea9klstozaPQ==)
---
|
We created him. We trained him in violence, used him for our dirty wars, and then acted surprised when he brought that violence here. This is the price of "forever wars" that Congress refuses to end.
While Trump and Hegseth are busy ordering illegal strikes and bypassing Congress to provoke a regime-change war in Venezuela, we are paying the price for the last twenty years of unchecked militarism at home.
The Constitution is clear: Only Congress has the power to declare war.
We cannot continue to let the Executive Branch run private wars, train secret armies, and commit war crimes in our name. We need to reign in these powers before the next "Zero Unit" tragedy happens--and before Hegseth's illegal orders drag us into a new catastrophe.
I will fight to do exactly that as the next representative for IL-9. [Will you help us send a message that we are done with illegal wars and the violence they bring home, by chipping in $50, $25, or whatever you can spare?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j0bkOAXHbrlBLlYFVWVMnHSvAh9fwp50ZXUqkDvqNKYDg2AufQfbmp4K_SAEXBtaAFHFC_E15uHOQwYw7FWC-XzIQvohu9ErpdFpPzgHXC7YJ4RV828fz97nk3XDOwW9Tu70ihdldAgIJGg0IbVet39iAV3Gj7CnUiWav7y9igWFaTOFc580ZF_10g6mxiIqhVxtCv7Yz6U3iyGSNK1xCsnRZpi-3usenual7c3Rgd0=&c=ddDxlukebp6d03IoF6cVNkyRmKNHCH2u-15_7Dc0mE6LmHS-d2Re1w==&ch=UvQLWFd1DbnpnY0rHUVp-2yYP9pc6kA9QK9_Vfn45Zea9klstozaPQ==)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: My response to AIPAC

body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
AIPAC just launched paid ads in my district calling me a liar because I dared to speak the truth about Gaza.
Let’s be clear about what this really is: an attempt to intimidate me, silence me, and punish anyone who refuses to look away from a humanitarian crisis.
Here’s my response to AIPAC. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aipac-response-video?refcode=20251202] Please watch and share. Text me at 650-999-9610 to let me know what you think.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aipac-response-video?refcode=20251202 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aipac-response-video?refcode=20251202]
I’m under attack because I don’t take PAC money. I don’t take lobbyist money. I don’t take corporate checks – not now, not ever. And that terrifies the establishment because it means I can’t be bought.
If you want leaders who tell the truth, not toe the line for corporate donors, then I need your help right now to fight back with response ads.
Will you rush $3 or more to show AIPAC that this movement cannot be intimidated? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aipac-response-video?refcode=20251202&amount=3]
DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aipac-response-video?refcode=20251202&amount=3]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aipac-response-video?refcode=20251202&amount=25]
