DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aipac-response-video?refcode=20251202]
Thank you for your support, your activism, and all that you do.
Onward,
Ro

name: Mark Warner
subject: There is nothing normal about what’s happening in Washington.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120427380/586245258/805740704?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.02_Mark-Warner-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTlmNDBjMy05M2NmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7biVKs8GppvIHX5i6w_8_3HjxC_yCxL2o7w-ulqyPG0=)
It’s Senator Mark Warner, with an important announcement:

Today, I am launching my reelection campaign to continue to fight for Virginians and take back the Senate for Democrats. Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Maggie Hassan and my campaign?

[**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mark-warner_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120427381/586245259/805740704?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.02_Mark-Warner-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTlmNDBjMy05M2NmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7biVKs8GppvIHX5i6w_8_3HjxC_yCxL2o7w-ulqyPG0=)

There is nothing normal about what’s happening in Washington. We’ve got a president who is more focused on enriching himself and his allies than addressing the pressing problems facing Americans – like rising costs and Republicans’ health care crisis.

And elected Republicans don’t seem to care. In fact, they enable it.

The only way to hold Trump accountable is to flip the Senate, and frankly, there’s no Senate majority for Democrats if we lose Virginia.

subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:

It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/22229/6374453/71e86152759aa866f8ff56dc9dee5af31222ca60/688aca0b074a4887210c35e7e4755350a82a54e1). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter: Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)... Zero lines, classroom time or books to read... Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit). **It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/22229/6374453/71e86152759aa866f8ff56dc9dee5af31222ca60/688aca0b074a4887210c35e7e4755350a82a54e1)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

name: Mark Warner
subject: I’m officially kicking off my reelection campaign – and I am asking you to join me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek –
Today, I’m officially kicking off my reelection campaign – to keep up the fight for Virginia’s families, to stand up to the policies in Washington that are skyrocketing the cost of living, and to continue to bring people together to get it done.
My friend Tim Kaine said I should reach out to you directly – because I’ll need you to join me in this important work. I need your bold ideas, your enthusiasm, and your commitment to making life better for your kids and grandkids with me on the campaign trail.
And yes, I need your support in the form of a $5, $15, or $25 contribution. Your donation today – split between Tim's Common Ground PAC and my campaign – is an investment in the future we’re building together. My team set a goal of earning 5,000 donations this week to kick off our campaign with the grassroots strength we need to win. Every donation, no matter the size, helps us build momentum, reach voters, and get the job done. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?amount=25]
Look, I’ve always been focused on what’s next, on what’s on the horizon. I started a cell phone company back when everyone was still using landlines.
When I was first elected governor, it was on the promise to move Virginia forward. And we did.
And in the Senate, I’ve been focused on the challenges our country faces next:
* Expanding broadband and economic opportunity to rural America.
* Preparing our intelligence communities for 21st-century threats in our increasingly interconnected world.
* And standing up to Trump’s policies that raise prices and gut health care while he hands massive tax breaks to billionaires.
But our work is far from over.
Since the AI revolution, we’ve seen the job market in a free fall – while prices continue to rise. And Donald Trump and his crowd in Washington? They don’t have a clue what to do about it. They don’t even seem to care.
Instead of being paralyzed by fear – or worse, making futile attempts to turn back the clock – we need to ensure that innovation gives everyone a fair shot.
This moment calls for big ideas. A systematic economic re-tooling to prepare for the impacts of artificial intelligence, a complete overhaul of affordable housing and childcare, and universal health care coverage.
We need a vision to chart a new path and effective leadership to get it done. That’s why I’m running for reelection to the United States Senate.
And I’m asking you to join me. Will you step up today to become one of the 5,000 donors my campaign is counting on before Friday? Split a donation between my campaign and Tim Kaine's Common Ground PAC to become an Official Campaign Kickoff Donor >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?amount=25]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=100]
OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?amount=25]
Our work starts now.
More soon,
Mark Warner
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/P5FfEbyeIEejNQSsVSzanQ2?unsubscribedata=98Nmd%2BtZernpCE2pdeskiczLmIdieY5TAURGBL3PHNGHpSXP%2FlQg7OPmKMr8tb9P0GocFJqo2iHw1RjuGWSpB61TxlN%2B%2BOR6ztE2uJvoeCec2yem7qBeMijfWVMS9kKE7FHvthJdqSUhZB%2FC075HuOyx1%2BodLJt43qMLST5OxHRUgGIPQHWrKlnwXflAKYYGPF8%2FnrJcy7jWlfqgHnGlcwtRlnWM%2B0jWCLrcsQKMw1wn3OSzTWHM3UOFxNEF7pcROJt8EirDkAOdTmJ35LVHTT6HRBV2g%2F7rbi1o18KuC31Ms2OUUcbwYS5RX7aXRIn0qgjPUdyw4tjRG3Oz9o%2BdjfRLw6P%2BDXzmFaz9onsfkzkfVpySif7sRoD%2BQu51KMQ68KsbxZBJFqvsBNaoy6jbCaatlVfRj2fcA%2FPf5f%2BQhrY%3D .

Every donation, no matter the size, helps us build momentum, reach voters, and get the job done. [] Look, I’ve always been focused on what’s next, on what’s on the horizon. I started a cell phone company back when everyone was still using landlines. When I was first elected governor, it was on the promise to move Virginia forward. And we did. And in the Senate, I’ve been focused on the challenges our country faces next: Expanding broadband and economic opportunity to rural America. Preparing our intelligence communities for 21st-century threats in our increasingly interconnected world. * And standing up to Trump’s policies that raise prices and gut health care while he hands massive tax breaks to billionaires. But our work is far from over. Since the AI revolution, we’ve seen the job market in a free fall – while prices continue to rise. And Donald Trump and his crowd in Washington? They don’t have a clue what to do about it. They don’t even seem to care. Instead of being paralyzed by fear – or worse, making futile attempts to turn back the clock – we need to ensure that innovation gives everyone a fair shot. This moment calls for big ideas. A systematic economic re-tooling to prepare for the impacts of artificial intelligence, a complete overhaul of affordable housing and childcare, and universal health care coverage. We need a vision to chart a new path and effective leadership to get it done. That’s why I’m running for reelection to the United States Senate. And I’m asking you to join me. Will you step up today to become one of the 5,000 donors my campaign is counting on before Friday? Split a donation between my campaign and Tim Kaine's Common Ground PAC to become an Official Campaign Kickoff Donor >> [] If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] OTHER [] Our work starts now. More soon, Mark Warner [] CONTRIBUTE [] Paid for by Kaine for Virginia 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272 Williamsburg, VA 23185 Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Team Downing
subject: Elon Musk Calls for National Voter ID. Do you agree?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We can’t afford to wait for our elections to fix themselves.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-tR-JvFp9NMB-ScQ)[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-Vl03sJhtLPvoPKk5g)Peter,
The integrity of our electoral process is fundamental to the survival of our democracy. Now, one of the world's most influential voices is demanding immediate, commonsense action to ensure every legal vote is counted and election results are trusted.[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)In his recent statements, the world's richest man laid out four essential safeguards that every American should be able to agree on to ensure election transparency and security:
1. Voter ID to stop fraud before it starts
2. Paper ballots to verify every vote
3. Same-day voting to keep the process secure
4. Proof of citizenship to protect the integrity of every election

These aren’t radical or partisan ideas. They’re simple, commonsense protections that are standard practice in developed democracies worldwide.**
**Now more than ever, securing our elections must be Congress’s top priority. Our majority, the integrity of our democracy, and President Trump’s America First agenda ALL DEPEND on delivering on this urgent voter ID mandate.
Peter, we’re begging you: [Please add your name today if you agree it's time to lock down our elections, restore trust in the vote, and support Elon Musk's call for mandatory national election standards:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[PROTECT OUR ELECT – SIGN TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._5dmCg)The integrity of every future election cycle rests in the hands of Patriots who are unwilling to compromise on the fundamental principles of our Republic.

Thank you in advance for your participation,
Team Downing | |

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Trump’s FBI is targeting me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
While Trump goes after us, I need your help to show that we are not backing down — that people across this country are standing with those defending our Constitution, not those trying to break it.
Peter,
Last week, I got word that the FBI’s Counterterrorism Division appeared to open an inquiry into me and five of my colleagues—all because we made a video stressing the power of the oath to the Constitution and that service members can never be forced to follow illegal orders.
**To be honest, the President's reaction—calling for our arrest and death, the FBI being deployed against us—tells me exactly who he is and how little he respects the Constitution.**
The FBI is being used as a tool to try and intimidate and harass members of Congress.
He is wielding the power of government to punish dissent. That’s authoritarianism—plain and simple.
But here’s the truth: No amount of harassment, threats, or abuse of power will stop us from doing our jobs or honoring our oath.
We swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States. That oath lasts a lifetime, and we intend to keep it. We will not be bullied. We will never give up the ship.
**While Trump goes after us, I need your help to show that we are not backing down — that people across this country are standing with those defending our Constitution, not those trying to break it.**
**[So Peter, will you step up and stand with me? Make a split donation today between Heartland Patriots and me to help us fight back against Trump’s harassment and misuse of government power →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98371?refcode=em20251202-9788&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9788%2E614464%2ElArXF-)**

name: Mark Warner
subject: I’m officially kicking off my reelection campaign – and I am asking you to join me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120430034/586252373/-73294122?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.02_Mark-Warner-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzJmNTI5MS05NmNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_gsJh8H_01beL6zOyL5W9PttiDekVRW16Q6n0V-HgCw=) Folks – Today, I’m officially kicking off my reelection campaign – to keep up the fight for Virginia’s families, to stand up to the policies in Washington that are skyrocketing the cost of living, and to continue to bring people together to get it done. And my friend, Kirsten Gillibrand, said I should reach out to you directly – because I’ll need you to join me in this important work. I need your bold ideas, your enthusiasm, and your commitment to making life better for your kids and grandkids with me on the campaign trail. [**_And yes, I need your support in the form of a $10, $25, or $50 contribution. Your donation today – split between Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign – is an investment in the future we’re building together. My team set a goal of earning 5,000 donations this week to kick off our campaign with the grassroots strength we need to win. Every donation, no matter the size, helps us build momentum, reach voters, and get the job done._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120430035/586252374/-73294122?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.02_Mark-Warner-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzJmNTI5MS05NmNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_gsJh8H_01beL6zOyL5W9PttiDekVRW16Q6n0V-HgCw=) | | [ DONATE >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120430036/586252375/-73294122?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.02_Mark-Warner-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzJmNTI5MS05NmNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_gsJh8H_01beL6zOyL5W9PttiDekVRW16Q6n0V-HgCw=)
---
Look, I’ve always been focused on what’s next, on what’s on the horizon. I started a cell phone company back when everyone was still using landlines.
When I was first elected governor, it was on the promise to move Virginia forward. And we did. And, in the Senate, I’ve been focused on the challenges our country faces next:
* _Expanding broadband and economic opportunity to rural America._
* _Preparing our intelligence communities for 21st-century threats in our increasingly interconnected world._
* _And standing up to Trump’s policies that raise prices and gut health care while he hands massive tax breaks to billionaires._

**But our work is far from over.**
Since the AI revolution, we’ve seen the job market in a free fall – while prices continue to rise. And Donald Trump and his crowd in Washington? They don’t have a clue what to do about it. They don’t even seem to care.
Instead of being paralyzed by fear – or worse – making futile attempts to turn back the clock, we need to ensure that innovation gives everyone a fair shot.
**This moment calls for big ideas.** A systematic economic re-tooling to prepare for the impacts of artificial intelligence, a complete overhaul of affordable housing and childcare, and universal health care coverage.
**We need a vision to chart a new path and effective leadership to get it done. That’s why I’m running for reelection to the United States Senate.**
[**_And I’m asking you to join me. Will you step up today to become one of the 5,000 donors my campaign is counting on before Friday? Split a donation between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand to become an Official Campaign Kickoff Donor >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120430037/586252376/-73294122?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.02_Mark-Warner-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzJmNTI5MS05NmNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_gsJh8H_01beL6zOyL5W9PttiDekVRW16Q6n0V-HgCw=)
| [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120430038/586252377/-73294122?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.02_Mark-Warner-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzJmNTI5MS05NmNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_gsJh8H_01beL6zOyL5W9PttiDekVRW16Q6n0V-HgCw=)
---
Our work starts now.
More soon,
Mark Warner

clean_body: = Folks – Today, I’m officially kicking off my reelection campaign – to keep up the fight for Virginia’s families, to stand up to the policies in Washington that are skyrocketing the cost of living, and to continue to bring people together to get it done. And my friend, Kirsten Gillibrand, said I should reach out to you directly – because I’ll need you to join me in this important work. I need your bold ideas, your enthusiasm, and your commitment to making life better for your kids and grandkids with me on the campaign trail. = | | = Look, I’ve always been focused on what’s next, on what’s on the horizon. I started a cell phone company back when everyone was still using landlines. When I was first elected governor, it was on the promise to move Virginia forward. And we did. And, in the Senate, I’ve been focused on the challenges our country faces next: Expanding broadband and economic opportunity to rural America. Preparing our intelligence communities for 21st-century threats in our increasingly interconnected world. And standing up to Trump’s policies that raise prices and gut health care while he hands massive tax breaks to billionaires. But our work is far from over. Since the AI revolution, we’ve seen the job market in a free fall – while prices continue to rise. And Donald Trump and his crowd in Washington? They don’t have a clue what to do about it. They don’t even seem to care. Instead of being paralyzed by fear – or worse – making futile attempts to turn back the clock, we need to ensure that innovation gives everyone a fair shot. This moment calls for big ideas. A systematic economic re-tooling to prepare for the impacts of artificial intelligence, a complete overhaul of affordable housing and childcare, and universal health care coverage. We need a vision to chart a new path and effective leadership to get it done. That’s why I’m running for reelection to the United States Senate. = | = Our work starts now. More soon, Mark Warner A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

name: Crystal & Jason  via ActionNetwork.org
subject: With Deep Gratitude — Thank You for Standing With 7DS
body:
On behalf of our entire team, I want to extend my deepest gratitude for your support, your generosity, and your belief in our work. Whether you contributed financially, shared our message, showed up at events, or kept us in your prayers and good thoughts—you helped strengthen our community in powerful ways. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_ZQqlt19aM_Mpt4TRcI5Xl_8w-17OXMy365yZDmi0YKkk7yFe1-FO0XlNzoHU5Xor-o1Fj_CQvzqBaOW26SkWMl5knkCQHeOax39WZAOz21cAIXEgh6ClhvFkb5ylfoQGvuGLV0aSYzTCudo5IC_3e6UX4DecHTCpERde-0MIlKID81_c_9cCNJM2wZfjIJnft37Frf_iLoTG5WtA4uh25cczmceXbnW9bl7anQZ-ZwCbsR5pPmhZ_BFi1vKiZ8mgHZU3xR19QFpjPE4YCXxVYUfNni53Y1u2mLcIk3R6EHqyfsHKeSLorcp8D84DFo64reZweAmrFDsLHkaoM37ldpD-VAW_gNTGI0JHyojz9tBIvRFTxPa8_thEls50USV8/4m3/D1FD1XNJRJei1r0RplDetA/h0/h001.MnpEqpkhCGRoniQc0MeZtkDIYM2lnz2g-h9vCL-QZcM) Dear Friends and Relatives, We are honored to walk this path with you. Thank you for standing beside us, for believing in what we do, and for being part of this growing circle of care and commitment. Because of you, we can continue organizing, educating, and advocating for the protection of our people and Mother Earth. Your contribution helps ensure that our work remains Indigenous-led, rooted in community, and guided by our responsibilities to future generations. Today is[**Giving**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwof_yzY23HujVEBNwq_QegVU2GeYzI7Cg_NNfbq5HFPE5O1kKX2zuHgkt-gUSUa8EZ7WenYZ3w6Cpg7Tj5RcUHMLDQSckBeCDsDYWdY9SgMf0gdAShQuY8CFtX4CoKuD2ffW3YzFotiIjrjKtP1HO185Als_Duwx7cG0Z4xzElvsZU3u2PnXihbvQBtIIRqlrzFaa77uzQFsPYrKOsBe8_p9ZRFTPuVIG9P9LZprUZ715h3qDoAzYPOMkhpUIJYnTf-mTcUiLaOg4r6bWrV7d61E-MwNGy8UP-Fhqge4AKzXGDD0KgPqOjWv7GBlEOC8k33TtY-UrqOeUHocMA8XId6p076TX_jsQhehiNlEBqwnIdU47z3GKWSixf6Df6cGWJJxVc0FeWPm5v8YdBR3-kpkvq1qMqxBrMDFgRs7kzjQc/4m3/D1FD1XNJRJei1r0RplDetA/h1/h001.aErZTAZK_uZB2vS0bNk_2J3nUq6QQA895BUmZYp-O3M)**[Tuesday](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwof_yzY23HujVEBNwq_QegVU2GeYzI7Cg_NNfbq5HFPE5O1kKX2zuHgkt-gUSUa8EZ7WenYZ3w6Cpg7Tj5RcUHMLDQSckBeCDsDYWdY9SgMf0gdAShQuY8CFtX4CoKuD2fVqj5HAVHqUzABrFO0xm3dpAZypdIADlUMH5hr_eTND6MuaSKTBXJKfi3T_gzhb3-v69cmaxlQR78cf2PAeYP9Zpg7A0TqheiCdJDNf_L4WfJBrpbCvxWO6PIS1YjCPALgw8ItD04ozcDezfJgON2mK-ueEQ4YXwZcGTW_DPTXxBVbSzXD-hW9b9hUYggepjGJiC6Y5O_eQE4gm-1fShEJIfE60zGwiIIutxFTE_4IbOZcUEPe46p9_NNx9CDe0MeeTBzGcUMo448sk-MyzLhQMlhTgXhh2kT5OXgabjXzTs/4m3/D1FD1XNJRJei1r0RplDetA/h2/h001.lz8zvS0A9QbXHmSMpcn_G-2bhta_QLvFdEudLcmbuYk)** , a day when people around the world choose to uplift the organizations and movements building a more just, healthy, and sustainable future. We are grateful to be part of a community that shows up with courage, generosity, and love—especially in moments when our lands, waters, and people need protection the most. This year brought profound growth, but it also carried some of the deepest heartbreak of my life. Some of you know, in May 2025, I lost my mother—the strongest woman I have ever known—after she suffered a stroke in January 2022 during my run for Congress. It was devastating to witness someone so powerful, so full of life, become confined to a bed... to watch her slowly lose herself, not to be given adequate care and compassion, and ultimately die as a result of neglect by a caregiver. She was my advocate, my protector, my lifegiver, my best friend, and my road dog. Her loss has reshaped me in ways I am still learning to understand. We also suffered another significant loss—my son’s best friend, Mittens, who had been with him for 13 years. Mittens wasn’t just a pet; he was family. He moved with us from duty station to duty station, offering comfort during every transition. Each time my son had to start over at a new school—a scary reality for a then 5-year-old—Mittens was the constant friend he could count on. He taught him how to love, how to care for another being, and how to show up with gentleness and responsibility. Losing him was the second hardest thing we experienced this year. Mittens developed an aggressive form of feline cancer caused by **hexavalent chromium** , a known carcinogen that contaminates drinking water across the United States. Hexavalent chromium can enter our water through industrial pollution or through natural mineral deposits in groundwater—another heartbreaking reminder of why our work to protect our communities and our water matters so deeply. Through all of this loss, we have grown—spiritually, emotionally, and in purpose. These experiences have strengthened our commitment to the work ahead and deepened our understanding of what it truly means to protect life, land, and future generations. This year, we are asking for your [support](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwof_yzY23HujVEBNwq_QegVU2GeYzI7Cg_NNfbq5HFPE5O1kKX2zuHgkt-gUSUa8EZ7WenYZ3w6Cpg7Tj5RcUHMLDQSckBeCDsDYWdY9SgMf0gdAShQuY8CFtX4CoKuD2fdhf-fq2wK0TCQCS6G1c5H_Ii02sKuM5DgvanvPqwMpqQp6YVEmPOnOsiDKnFfzkyCZbyPBYI0wz-tJWxgt2RBc18N45n7ZJ3a5-v2B53_liLO86xEFXr7WliCgAkefZtrofqHAVHjMpxmOiHUHQIjqdCivx3oFD99coNxgVgAL4p1b1QeWwrONG3or4UxvnHpsFIWNRsuKepN8LZGQFAXtcdr4Hsk8ckGL0SrK6NBX7kV8bPN0Wgt2PKO5iusOmDI-SKDMsDvpOOKSyewHnUIhOmQ9QQSC2F_qtfsjPaVYX/4m3/D1FD1XNJRJei1r0RplDetA/h3/h001.3qww-LFlMYX-YYXXacSslJpOUVoZF1K80_aqe6G5jP4) to help us continue our work to:
* Protect sacred sites and burial grounds from harm
* Defend our watersheds from pipeline expansion and environmental destruction
* Strengthen Indigenous leadership and youth involvement in land stewardship
* Offer community education, cultural programming, and traditional ecological knowledge (TEK) teachings
* Advocate for policies that honor sovereignty, justice, and the Rights of Nature

Your [gift](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwof_yzY23HujVEBNwq_QegVU2GeYzI7Cg_NNfbq5HFPE5O1kKX2zuHgkt-gUSUa8EZ7WenYZ3w6Cpg7Tj5RcUHMLDQSckBeCDsDYWdY9SgMf0gdAShQuY8CFtX4CoKuD2fQzcCNbMx9j5-4Fw60OvbcC19hs-ibkfMJLbF6hHHA2ZsNtUZCoeQhTR1EGKANntZZgbdfwTQDo-fv-HnE1vp84MNL8y5RQgNBUEhCwluMgXJXKK1m5njrgNGs_TWMA5ufio4NC2RPcOcgsWTeTs9FwvcnuEovn6G6E7RoPXmqMZX7RgZDiQEg0peUUOcszjYSh-UFvBPj677nO5OehrNWR94vqpZhEbz7Rr9Dofg52tiDfW8VWBUbpVnr0Ft5hTIHT2JbOOl-gBFGoaTEA63S0rY0TtoTGXCJOXzQzAIHC5/4m3/D1FD1XNJRJei1r0RplDetA/h4/h001.yL_tvw4-rSrv5amTsGY8wrUmxtIQBfyz78rdRWENqxI)—whether $10, $25, $50, or more—directly fuels frontline work, community healing, and long-term systems change. Every dollar makes a difference, and every act of giving sends a powerful message: **our communities matter, our lands matter, and our future is worth fighting for.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwof_yzY23HujVEBNwq_QegVU2GeYzI7Cg_NNfbq5HFPE5O1kKX2zuHgkt-gUSUa8EZ7WenYZ3w6Cpg7Tj5RcUHMLDQSckBeCDsDYWdY9SgMf0gdAShQuY8CFtX4CoKuD2faOiQ9Sp6Q7lOlySuG_RS9DwmIJkIQv8XDfy-9OAso0-Toy5I_CEs6qN4YcNvndiP_ifxg4mIZ2g0f0lTLESRz36CIwvH7rb_2p2HEQj3sAK32vp5oEKTU7UM0OjufEx2nGcGI0PcdYnoxZ3rlHhLp7_7XvShjzmo18EYvglbmWuCDhsKUbD-ZMngZY0sPSMiMLRY3x4upcs92TJUgE2awLOm8-IExM-1wFIdliign_-7ojZbljTtpYCTy_k1uPbnThNmlSzIlPq-_JcUB3w9hb29mq_HZZG9C-uERqcPeUX/4m3/D1FD1XNJRJei1r0RplDetA/h5/h001.s0rYER5TgykInEDUcyIzF3qsPYBrJOC-mRJkzd8ufUE) 👉 **Give today:** [DONATE HERE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_ZQqlt19aM_Mpt4TRcI5Xl_8w-17OXMy365yZDmi0YKkk7yFe1-FO0XlNzoHU5Xor-o1Fj_CQvzqBaOW26SkWMDQ6hqzAtHhBAFe7v_Fm5rE3lhOsh0AJTDUU_fvSmcRkvn1xxzQmS3yczGeOKJsgJeM9kyPrOLZT4QGw9qTjYtEhLOUlGzlegJa-G0gJy1XqKCGg5bTI4BTEP6Vir7EOxeoVC3rRLZAvEt6Ow6YOzcTCWnJobZRqO4aC5XTNitlLGFXnfzbwOpJaRsbVj7m_eMc5vBUPb3yVWVN2hlV1_iZP6NEJLV_82xW0OY4YyBUTvZF3HyxRPzCbNyWjUn9IrDHtqzBbe3kRnkM3atjQowaj-Th5IgYykqa8938NEAEo/4m3/D1FD1XNJRJei1r0RplDetA/h6/h001.NaksP-9m1Kw-BrJIlSpe6PyFYW-Y3BMMRU-pAeF6EB4) If you can’t[ give](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwof_yzY23HujVEBNwq_QegVU2GeYzI7Cg_NNfbq5HFPE5O1kKX2zuHgkt-gUSUa8EZ7WenYZ3w6Cpg7Tj5RcUHMLDQSckBeCDsDYWdY9SgMf0gdAShQuY8CFtX4CoKuD2fScFoDmLnTAIJl0YsXS5PREC0Aqf4ettG-ON-kiObSVA69ifa2cknCG7SGWaSm7mvMgQa68IWfAgMkkE2okUT6jduDRYRorZ40jUuEV7wdF-Ux2b-jOnuawmfTozzsDft6ImqOPWSeWxRE5lTam8ErEJX02vl7vr1Y3Bwhh7Ua5-2hOgcIwPTjP6-QlIRM78F9zV4wO3RqpU6FBD6BN3_rbawWUcYGAcvqS55CUB7ayDtMu8ekxpeGQptpk1yIiz7wey6VhC0yhDRhh9SiDliELeWWKsYukFKQoLHrDEMHks/4m3/D1FD1XNJRJei1r0RplDetA/h7/h001.NEISryY3jUxp2Nl9NT5jkVJQTW7yzD-b0YUy4gwNTA0) financially, you can still support by sharing our work, amplifying our campaigns, or inviting a friend to learn more about what we do. Thank you for standing with us. Thank you for believing in a future where our water is clean, our communities are safe, and our children inherit a world that remembers its teachings. With gratitude and hope,
**Dr. Crystal Cavalier-Keck**

subject: why today is crucial:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Giving Tuesday is your chance to directly strengthen the pipeline of Democratic women who are stepping up to defend our rights, our democracy, and our future.

| Peter, today is one of the most important fundraising days of the year for Emerge.

Giving Tuesday is your chance to directly strengthen the pipeline of Democratic women who are stepping up to defend our rights, our democracy, and our future. name: Mark Warner
subject: My announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Today, I’m officially kicking off my reelection campaign
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120430665/586254455/1016723128?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5649-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmQ3OWQ0My05N2NmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sPSXb13FMDnLRyM0-MuGXXFbIioeNDv7838iQCBL6GM=)
Folks –
Today, I’m officially kicking off my reelection campaign – to keep up the fight for Virginia’s families, to stand up to the policies in Washington that are skyrocketing the cost of living, and to continue to bring people together to get it done.
And my friend, Jacky, said I should reach out to you directly – because I’ll need you to join me in this important work. I need your bold ideas, your enthusiasm, and your commitment to making life better for your kids and grandkids with me on the campaign trail.
**[And yes, I need your support in the form of a $5, $15, or $25 contribution. Your donation today – split between Jacky Rosen's campaign and mine – is an investment in the future we’re building together. My team set a goal of earning 5,000 donations this week to kick off our campaign with the grassroots strength we need to win. Every donation, no matter the size, helps us build momentum, reach voters, and get the job done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120430666/586254457/1016723128?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5649-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmQ3OWQ0My05N2NmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sPSXb13FMDnLRyM0-MuGXXFbIioeNDv7838iQCBL6GM=)**
| | [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120430667/586254458/1016723128?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5649-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmQ3OWQ0My05N2NmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sPSXb13FMDnLRyM0-MuGXXFbIioeNDv7838iQCBL6GM=)
---
Look, I’ve always been focused on what’s next, on what’s on the horizon. I started a cell phone company back when everyone was still using landlines.
When I was first elected governor, it was on the promise to move Virginia forward. And we did. And, in the Senate, I’ve been focused on the challenges our country faces next:
* _Expanding broadband and economic opportunity to rural America. _
* _Preparing our intelligence communities for 21st-century threats in our increasingly interconnected world. _
* _And standing up to Trump’s policies that raise prices and gut health care while he hands massive tax breaks to billionaires. _

**But our work is far from over.**
Since the AI revolution, we’ve seen the job market in a free fall – while prices continue to rise. And Donald Trump and his crowd in Washington? They don’t have a clue what to do about it. They don’t even seem to care.
Instead of being paralyzed by fear – or worse – making futile attempts to turn back the clock, we need to ensure that innovation gives everyone a fair shot.
**This moment calls for big ideas.** A systematic economic re-tooling to prepare for the impacts of artificial intelligence, a complete overhaul of affordable housing and childcare, and universal health care coverage.
**We need a vision to chart a new path and effective leadership to get it done. That’s why I’m running for reelection to the United States Senate. **
**[And I’m asking you to join me. Will you step up today to become one of the 5,000 donors my campaign is counting on before Friday? Split a donation between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's to become an Official Campaign Kickoff Donor>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120430669/586254459/1016723128?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5649-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmQ3OWQ0My05N2NmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sPSXb13FMDnLRyM0-MuGXXFbIioeNDv7838iQCBL6GM=)**
| | [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120430670/586254460/1016723128?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5649-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmQ3OWQ0My05N2NmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sPSXb13FMDnLRyM0-MuGXXFbIioeNDv7838iQCBL6GM=)
---
Our work starts now.

More soon,

Mark Warner
|

| I know you hear from me a lot and that the election seems SO far away, but this is exactly the kind of work we need to be doing to prepare for the road ahead.

With Republicans doing everything in their power to careen our country into chaos, there’s no time to sit on the sidelines. I’m not playing scared.

At the end of the month, our campaign faces**our final FEC filing deadline of the year.** After this deadline, we have to publicly report how much we raised. With there being so many competitive seats in Michigan, everyone will be watching us to see how we perform.

[_**If you’re able to help us kick December off strong, I’d really appreciate it. subject: Three ways to help make sure voters are able to make their voices heard
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
It’s an urgent moment to defend democracy |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120430850/586254959/1793776944?refcode=emm_ffa_20251202_T1_GivingTuesday1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWVhYmY2Zi05N2NmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cd8nZxG9KhCaTd_vuC775e2SbfPv19Qkmu1v3xFdLu0=&emci=f20fc769-97cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=39eabf6f-97cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=1037277)

| | Team, It’s Giving Tuesday, which means you have many opportunities to extend your generosity and make an impact on causes you care about. It’s also an urgent moment to defend our democracy, with a would-be dictator trying to seize control over elections and anti-voter extremists launching new voter suppression schemes. So we’ve set an ambitious $15,000 goal for Giving Tuesday to power our pro-voter work — **[here are three things you can help achieve with a donation to Fair Fight Action’s Civic Education and Voter Protection Fund today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120430851/586254960/297579042?refcode=emm_ffa_20251202_T1_GivingTuesday1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWVhYmY2Zi05N2NmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cd8nZxG9KhCaTd_vuC775e2SbfPv19Qkmu1v3xFdLu0=)**
1. De-escalating threats, harassment, and intimidation around elections in Georgia and across the country.
2. Ensuring that Georgia voters have accurate, up-to-date information about vote-by-mail procedures and early in-person voting locations, through an online one-stop-shop and voter education efforts focused on Black, brown, and young Georgia voters.
3. Providing voting rights and voter protection partners, as well as the public, with up-to-date information about the impact of voting-related laws and litigation.

In short, a donation to this fund goes a long way. And with our democracy at stake, this work couldn’t be more vital. **[What do you say](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120430852/586254961/-680073056?refcode=emm_ffa_20251202_T1_GivingTuesday1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWVhYmY2Zi05N2NmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cd8nZxG9KhCaTd_vuC775e2SbfPv19Qkmu1v3xFdLu0=)[**? **Can voters count on your support today to help make their voices heard? Make a Giving Tuesday donation of any amount to help hit this goal and help protect the freedom to vote.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120430853/586254962/-680073056?refcode=emm_ffa_20251202_T1_GivingTuesday1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWVhYmY2Zi05N2NmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cd8nZxG9KhCaTd_vuC775e2SbfPv19Qkmu1v3xFdLu0=)**

clean_body: It’s an urgent moment to defend democracy | | | Team, It’s Giving Tuesday, which means you have many opportunities to extend your generosity and make an impact on causes you care about. It’s also an urgent moment to defend our democracy, with a would-be dictator trying to seize control over elections and anti-voter extremists launching new voter suppression schemes. So we’ve set an ambitious $15,000 goal for Giving Tuesday to power our pro-voter work — = 1. De-escalating threats, harassment, and intimidation around elections in Georgia and across the country. 2. Ensuring that Georgia voters have accurate, up-to-date information about vote-by-mail procedures and early in-person voting locations, through an online one-stop-shop and voter education efforts focused on Black, brown, and young Georgia voters. 3. Providing voting rights and voter protection partners, as well as the public, with up-to-date information about the impact of voting-related laws and litigation. In short, a donation to this fund goes a long way. And with our democracy at stake, this work couldn’t be more vital. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- In solidarity, The Fair Fight Action Team * = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. The United States of America is becoming unrecognizable to many with radical political ideology driving us apart. This is no
accident. In their new book "NextGen Marxism: What It Is and How to Combat It," Katharine Gorka and Mike Gonzalez explain the
roots of the new Marxism spreading among the upcoming generation. Katharine joins the Moms for America Podcast with a message of
hope about what Americans can do to overcome a destructive ideology and renew our commitment to America's founding principles.

Katharine served as Director for Civil Society at The Heritage Foundation. Prior to that she worked as a presidential appointee in
the Office of Policy at the Department of Homeland Security. There she focused on strategies for prevention of terrorism and
targeted violence. Like, subscribe and share.

Christmas Memories to Treasure

The holidays are a time filled with joy and wonder. And sometimes a little stress for the mom trying to make it all happen.
Whatever you do, don’t miss these four gifts that will make your family’s Christmas unforgettable.

Mamas, no matter what’s happening in politics, the media, or the economy, you can create something of beauty and light in a
darkening world. Even with a smaller budget, the season’s magic will ring loud and true as you celebrate together as a family.

clean_body: Policy expert Katharine Gorka joins the podcast with information of the rise of NextGen Marxism. Plus, how to make Christmas memories to treasure. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] December 2, 2025 • Newsletter Katharine Gorka on NextGen Marxism Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] The United States of America is becoming unrecognizable to many with radical political ideology driving us apart. This is no accident. In their new book "NextGen Marxism: What It Is and How to Combat It," Katharine Gorka and Mike Gonzalez explain the roots of the new Marxism spreading among the upcoming generation. Katharine joins the Moms for America Podcast with a message of hope about what Americans can do to overcome a destructive ideology and renew our commitment to America's founding principles. Katharine served as Director for Civil Society at The Heritage Foundation. Prior to that she worked as a presidential appointee in the Office of Policy at the Department of Homeland Security. There she focused on strategies for prevention of terrorism and targeted violence. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] Christmas Memories to Treasure The holidays are a time filled with joy and wonder. And sometimes a little stress for the mom trying to make it all happen. Whatever you do, don’t miss these four gifts that will make your family’s Christmas unforgettable. Mamas, no matter what’s happening in politics, the media, or the economy, you can create something of beauty and light in a darkening world. Even with a smaller budget, the season’s magic will ring loud and true as you celebrate together as a family. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: Mark Warner
subject: Asking you directly, Peter
body:
| [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2098?t=2&akid=82%2E124072%2EAXQZvz) Peter, it’s Senator Mark Warner, with an important announcement: Today I am launching my reelection campaign to continue to fight for Virginians and take back the Senate for Democrats. Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Roy Cooper and my campaign? **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_warnersplit](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2098?t=3&akid=82%2E124072%2EAXQZvz)** There is nothing normal about what’s happening in Washington. We’ve got a president who is more focused on enriching himself and his allies than addressing the pressing problems facing Americans — like rising costs and Republicans’ health care crisis. And elected Republicans don’t seem to care. In fact, they enable it. The only way to hold Trump accountable is to flip the Senate, and frankly, there’s no Senate majority for Democrats if we lose Virginia. **[At this critical moment for our campaign and our country, will you split a donation between Roy Cooper and my campaign to win in Virginia and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2098?t=4&akid=82%2E124072%2EAXQZvz)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Mark Warner and Roy Cooper:_ | [SPLIT $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2100?t=5&akid=82%2E124072%2EAXQZvz)
---
[SPLIT $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2101?t=6&akid=82%2E124072%2EAXQZvz)
---
[SPLIT $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2102?t=7&akid=82%2E124072%2EAXQZvz)
---
[SPLIT $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2103?t=8&akid=82%2E124072%2EAXQZvz)
---
[SPLIT $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2104?t=9&akid=82%2E124072%2EAXQZvz)
---
[SPLIT ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2105?t=10&akid=82%2E124072%2EAXQZvz)
---
Your donation today is an investment in the campaign — and the future — we’re building together.
Thank you,
Mark Warner
* * *
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=1&akid=82%2E124072%2EAXQZvz)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=82%2E124072%2EAXQZvz)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=11&akid=82%2E124072%2EAXQZvz)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Voter registration for Giving Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Team,
We're sure your inbox has been packed with emails over the last few days, just like ours have. We're sorry to add another one to it, but it's Giving Tuesday and we're kicking off our end-of-year voter registration campaign now to break through all the clutter. If "voter registration campaign" was all you needed to hear to support our work, you can click right here and skip the rest of this message [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=120225_1&amount=24] .
If you're a long-time supporter of ours you've likely heard this a lot, but -- it only costs us about $3 to register a voter. That means for every $15 we raise, five new voters could be added to the rolls ahead of the 2026 elections. Defenders of voting rights have shown up strongly at the polls in 2025 but with recent voter suppression bills defining who gets to vote and how, we have to do everything we can to make sure we get as many pro-democracy voters filling out a ballot next year as possible.
Remember, we're a 100% grassroots-funded organization. We don't have any millionaires bankrolling us from the shadows. Everything we've done to defend voting rights has come from our supporters getting these emails and trusting us to get the job done. We're grateful for your support -- but we've got to call on you again as we ramp up for next year.
Team: Fuel our voter registration efforts with $24 or whatever you can today. Every dollar goes towards registering voters and protecting your right to vote >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=120225_1&amount=24]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=120225_1&amount=36]
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last decade.
This 2026 midterm election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories of the recent past or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can make a huge difference >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=120225_1&amount=24]
We hope you'll continue to stand with us -- not just this week, but to the next election and beyond.
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120225_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120225_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

Every dollar goes towards registering voters and protecting your right to vote >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last decade. This 2026 midterm election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories of the recent past or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future. New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can make a huge difference >> [] We hope you'll continue to stand with us -- not just this week, but to the next election and beyond. Thank you, Voter Action Project's Registration Team [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

name: Tim Whalen
subject: Today is Giving TREESday!
body:
https://www.savetheredwoods.org [https://www.savetheredwoods.org]
https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1 [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
Peter,
Today is what we call Giving TREESday, one of the most important fundraising days of the year for Save the Redwoods League.
DONATE NOW: ALL GIFTS TRIPLED [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
We know your inbox is flooded with emails asking you to give to worthy causes, so we wanted to make a case for giving to the League this year. We’ve established the Redwood Resilience Fund to revitalize the range, and we’ve set a goal to raise $100,000 by midnight tonight.
Two generous matches are combining together today, matching all gifts 2:1. Thanks to an anonymous family with deep ties to the League and Mary and Chris Diorio, your gift will have triple the impact for the redwoods.
Already, 138 redwood supporters have made their matched Giving TREESday gifts. Will you make yours today?
Give now and have triple the impact for Giving TREESday! [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
When you give to the Redwood Resilience Fund, you:
✔️Protect redwood forests that store more carbon than any forest on Earth.
✔️Restore habitat so endangered wildlife can bounce back and thrive.
✔️Revitalize parks, so everyone can access and experience the awe-inspiring forests.
✔️Strengthen partnerships with tribes as the original stewards of these lands.
This is the perfect day to become a supporter. Your donation will go 3x as far to help revive the range.This Giving TREESday, your donation will go 3x as far to help redwood forests everywhere.
Stand with your fellow redwood supporters to help the Redwood Resilience Fund grow strong. [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
These magnificent forests can weather any storm with your support.
Photo of Georgia Young [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/STRWL/STRWL/1/89574/images/Tim-Whalen%201%20%281%29.png] With gratitude,
Tim Whalen
Chief Development Officer
Save the Redwoods League
Help restore and protect the redwoods
DONATE NOW [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]

Save the Redwoods League
111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor
San Francisco, CA 94104
United States

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Our Official 2026 Democratic Member Card Design
body:
Your votes have been counted...
---
Derek, we have an exciting announcement... We’ve tallied your votes, and we’re thrilled to share the winning design of our **Official 2026 DNC Member Cards:** [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025-member-card?refcode=em_20251202_5430_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5430_22930333_rAfbPy&akid=5430%2E22930333%2ErAfbPy) [**If you haven’t already, and you’d like to receive one, make a contribution of $7, or whatever makes sense for you, to the DNC to reserve yours today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025-member-card?amount=7&refcode=em_20251202_5430_fr&refcode2=5430_22930333_rAfbPy&akid=5430%2E22930333%2ErAfbPy) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025-member-card?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251202_5430_fr&refcode2=5430_22930333_rAfbPy&akid=5430%2E22930333%2ErAfbPy)**

****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025-member-card?refcode=em_20251202_5430_fr&refcode2=5430_22930333_rAfbPy&akid=5430%2E22930333%2ErAfbPy)**
---
****
Democrats across the country will carry their 2026 DNC Member Card into 2026 as a reminder of the work we accomplished this year and the fight ahead of us to take back Congress.
We’re so thankful to have you on our grassroots team. It’ll take all of us to win in 2026, and we all have a role to play in this year’s midterms. We’re so grateful to have you with us.
[**Chip in now to reserve your card today, and to get it delivered right to your door!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025-member-card?amount=7&refcode=em_20251202_5430_fr&refcode2=5430_22930333_rAfbPy&akid=5430%2E22930333%2ErAfbPy)
Thank you for your dedication and support,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: ⏰ The environment is in serious jeopardy this Giving Tuesday, Peter. (If you only read one message today, please make it this one)
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTMyNDkwMjYS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjM2MDAyMzAyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
https://links.messages.lcv. We’re running out of time, Peter. Hundreds of people from around the country have stepped up today for Giving Tuesday, but we’re still running short of the 1,000 members we need to unlock an additional $100,000 for our work before midnight tonight. And with the Trump administration accelerating some of the most extreme anti-environment, pro-polluter attacks in modern history,falling short is simply not an option. We’re asking you, Peter: will you renew your LCV membership right now while membership is only $5 to help us unlock an additional $100,000 to oppose the Trump administration’s attempts to exploit our public lands and roll back climate progress? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzs~ This isn’t just about hitting a number. It’s about having the resources we need to challenge these increasingly reckless orders and attempts to shred environmental safeguards — and stop the polluter handouts that Trump and his allies are fast-tracking. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv. Every single person who steps up today is critical to our efforts — here’s why this Giving Tuesday is so important: Trump is trying to erase the scientific and legal foundation of climate action. By dismantling the Endangerment Finding, which affirms that greenhouse gas emissions harm our health and welfare, Trump’s EPA would hand fossil fuel companies a free pass to spew climate pollution into our air. He’s also ending the program that required big polluters to report their pollution, making it nearly impossible to track what they’re spewing or hold them accountable.
Decades of established pollution protections are being peeled away. More than a dozen rules that keep toxic pollution out of the air we breathe and water we drink to protect our health are on the chopping block, tossed aside to allow fossil fueled power plants to cut corners and shift the burden of their damage onto our communities.
The Trump administration is giving away the Arctic to corporate polluters, working to allow more drilling in one of the planet’s last intact ecosystems. Mining roads carved through national parks and preserves. Fire-sale auctions in critical ecosystems. Hundreds of millions of acres of U.S. waters off Alaska potentially opened to drilling. It could do irreparable damage to wildlife, our climate, and Alaska Native communities. We’re working every day with our 30 state affiliates, organizing on the ground, exposing backroom deals and corruption, rallying voters, and defending the treasured and unique places that define our country. But meeting this moment requires resources — especially as we go up against big polluters and fossil fuel opponents. This $100,000 match challenge, and how many people step up this Giving Tuesday, will determine how hard we can push back. Peter, your renewal right now powers our work to protect people and the planet. Will you renew before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to help keep this movement strong when it matters most? $5 is all it takes. https://links.messages.lcv. Every contribution brings us closer. And the clock is ticking. Thanks for standing with us, Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13249026&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM2MDAyMzAyNgS2&spReportId=MjM2MDAyMzAyNgS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13249026&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM2MDAyMzAyNgS2&spReportId=MjM2MDAyMzAyNgS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23681%2E4449941%2Ez9Oap4) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23681%2E4449941%2Ez9Oap4) [ **!!️Please read this email and complete our urgent poll below !!️**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70500?t=3&akid=23681%2E4449941%2Ez9Oap4) **Look, Elizabeth Warren is CALLING OUT the Electoral College: ** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70500?t=4&akid=23681%2E4449941%2Ez9Oap4) She’s so right! Donald Trump is only President because of the **OUTDATED, UNFAIR,** and **UNDEMOCRATIC** Electoral College.

Remember: Hillary Clinton won the popular vote in 2016 but her victory was overruled, _all because of the Electoral College._

**We’ll be blunt. It needs to go IMMEDIATELY!**

So, we’re launching an urgent poll for Democrats in your area to gauge support for the Electoral College. [ **Team: Do you think the Electoral College is undemocratic?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70500?t=5&akid=23681%2E4449941%2Ez9Oap4) | | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70500?t=6&akid=23681%2E4449941%2Ez9Oap4)

---

[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70500?t=9&akid=23681%2E4449941%2Ez9Oap4)
Here's the honest truth, team.
[ **The Electoral College is a 238-year-old antiquated system that NO LONGER serves the American people.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70500?t=10&akid=23681%2E4449941%2Ez9Oap4)
BUT, Donald Trump and his MAGA Republicans know that they will never win another Presidential election if we get rid of the Electoral College!

All they care about is holding onto power and they will do whatever it takes to keep it – even if that means silencing voters...

[**Voting is an ESSENTIAL building block of our democracy and when its integrity is compromised, so is our Democracy.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70500?t=11&akid=23681%2E4449941%2Ez9Oap4)

[**We need 9,382 more responses from your area before midnight in order to gauge support. If we don’t hit our goal, it will make it incredibly difficult to formulate our strategy moving forward. Your response is crucial.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70500?t=12&akid=23681%2E4449941%2Ez9Oap4)

Fight for Reform

name: Mark Warner
subject: There is nothing normal about what's happening in Washington. -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/21368?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20251202-MarkWarner-WarnerLaunchTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20251202-MarkWarner-WarnerLaunchTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=21939%2E9716520%2EPLhT-A)
It's Senator Mark Warner, with an important announcement:

Today I am launching my reelection campaign to continue to fight for Virginians and take back the Senate for Democrats. Will you join me by splitting a contribution between the DSCC and my campaign?

[**www.dscc.org/DSCCAndWarner2026/**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21368?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20251202-MarkWarner-WarnerLaunchTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20251202-MarkWarner-WarnerLaunchTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=21939%2E9716520%2EPLhT-A)

There is nothing normal about what's happening in Washington. We've got a president who is more focused on enriching himself and his allies than addressing the pressing problems facing Americans – like rising costs and Republicans' health care crisis.

And elected Republicans don't seem to care. In fact, they enable it.

The only way to hold Trump accountable is to flip the Senate, and frankly, there's no Senate majority for Democrats if we lose Virginia.

[**At this critical moment for our campaign and our country, will you split a donation between the DSCC and my campaign to win in Virginia and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21368?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20251202-MarkWarner-WarnerLaunchTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20251202-MarkWarner-WarnerLaunchTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=21939%2E9716520%2EPLhT-A)

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Friends of Mark Warner and the DSCC.

Mark Warner

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: I want to say thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120437386/586276734/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzQ3YTcyMy05Y2NmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MYIwoxNe9zb-Y1S0gwci4ZbXKuMiYoYcSVVdVE_WXMc=&emci=fc6c47d6-f6ce-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=e347a723-9ccf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=13185894) Derek, when Donald Trump called for my death and arrest, patriots—from Western Pennsylvania and across the country—stood up and said: Enough. Enough threats. Enough political violence. Enough trying to silence and intimidate those of us who swore an oath to the Constitution and to this country. You stood with me. You spoke out. You showed what real courage looks like—neighbors looking out for one another, Americans defending our democracy. **And I want to say thank you.** Thank you for standing with me in the face of political violence. Thank you for condemning those dangerous threats. Thank you for doubling down on your commitment to democracy—and even contributing your hard-earned dollars so we can keep fighting back. Your actions and your words showed me that we are all in this together. If you don’t know much about me, I went to the Naval Academy and served in uniform because I believed—and still believe—in something simple: our country is worth fighting for. Today, in Congress, I’m still fighting. For the American Dream. For our Constitution. For our democracy. For neighbors who feel forgotten by Washington and ignored by the powerful. I’m the only Democrat holding a battleground seat in Western Pennsylvania. Republicans have targeted me and this district again and again. But we’ve continued to win, because people like you have believed in this fight. I’m so grateful to have you with me on this team, Derek. We have a lot of work ahead. And I’m ready to keep fighting—and WINNING–together. Thanks, Chris | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120437387/586276737/320240526?refcode=email_120225_TY&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzQ3YTcyMy05Y2NmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MYIwoxNe9zb-Y1S0gwci4ZbXKuMiYoYcSVVdVE_WXMc=)

clean_body: Derek, when Donald Trump called for my death and arrest, patriots—from Western Pennsylvania and across the country—stood up and said: Enough. Enough threats. Enough political violence. Enough trying to silence and intimidate those of us who swore an oath to the Constitution and to this country. You stood with me. You spoke out. You showed what real courage looks like—neighbors looking out for one another, Americans defending our democracy. And I want to say thank you. Thank you for standing with me in the face of political violence. Thank you for condemning those dangerous threats. Thank you for doubling down on your commitment to democracy—and even contributing your hard-earned dollars so we can keep fighting back. Your actions and your words showed me that we are all in this together. If you don’t know much about me, I went to the Naval Academy and served in uniform because I believed—and still believe—in something simple: our country is worth fighting for. Today, in Congress, I’m still fighting. For the American Dream. For our Constitution. For our democracy. For neighbors who feel forgotten by Washington and ignored by the powerful. I’m the only Democrat holding a battleground seat in Western Pennsylvania. Republicans have targeted me and this district again and again. But we’ve continued to win, because people like you have believed in this fight. I’m so grateful to have you with me on this team, Derek. We have a lot of work ahead. And I’m ready to keep fighting—and WINNING–together. Thanks, Chris | | = | = | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@chrisforpa.com to your address book. | MadSoul Festival is in 4 days, Peter, and since the last MadSoul we’ve brought SO many new people into our youth-powered movement.

But a lot of people are asking _how_ we did it, like it’s some top secret strategy we’re using. It’s no secret – we’re just changing the organizing game 🤠

**As the first Gen Z member of Congress, I know the same old organizing tactics _won’t_ deliver a new generation of voters. You gotta get creative.**

That’s exactly what we’ve been doing with MadSoul. From registering voters on the dance floor to inviting students to attend, we’re making it easier to engage with young people.

**Our organizing is going to pay off ten-fold at the ballot box.** But to _expand_ our reach to young people before the far-right reaches them, I need help to keep MadSoul accessible and continue our youth outreach year-round. _That’s where you come in:_

[**_Can you rush a donation to the MadSoul Victory Fund tonight so we can engage with even more young people? subject: Tennessee’s 7th District is voting RIGHT NOW and the race could not be closer!!!
body:
Tennessee’s 7th District is voting RIGHT NOW and the race could not be closer!!!
Voters in this district have watched Republican control deliver nothing but turmoil, and the Trump era has only made things worse for working families.
After years of chaos, shutdowns, and attacks that hit communities like Middle Tennessee hard, people are showing signs they are ready for a change.
For the first time in a long time, Democrats have a real path to victory in TN 07!
Turnout will decide everything. With the race still locked in a dead heat, we need an urgent surge of grassroots support to show that Democrats are READY to TAKE BACK THIS SEAT! Chip in ANY amount before polls close tonight >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wintn?refcode=120225_1]

clean_body: Tennessee’s 7th District is voting RIGHT NOW and the race could not be closer!!! Voters in this district have watched Republican control deliver nothing but turmoil, and the Trump era has only made things worse for working families. After years of chaos, shutdowns, and attacks that hit communities like Middle Tennessee hard, people are showing signs they are ready for a change. For the first time in a long time, Democrats have a real path to victory in TN 07! Turnout will decide everything. With the race still locked in a dead heat, we need an urgent surge of grassroots support to show that Democrats are READY to TAKE BACK THIS SEAT! Chip in ANY amount before polls close tonight >>> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account.
