body:
_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120451275/586320256/-1616192732?amount=25&refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_021225_FR_Giving-Tuesday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTA2MTdjZDQtYWFjZi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M1pml6Z-FA9Sp-StixnnztGfEO4yeIpapUKDiVcgBFc=)_
Hey team,

Today is Giving Tuesday, which is all about unleashing the power of the people.

Here at IDCCA, we’re used to grinding on tough races, in rural counties – without a ton of media coverage or attention. We win small races that have HUGE implications in your everyday life because of hard work, elbow grease, and detailed planning.

[**Today, I’m asking you to join our movement to secure Democratic wins by making a small, recurring monthly contribution. Our work is made possible by the ongoing support of people like you, and your support powers our programs and operations.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120451277/586320258/454490775?amount=5&recurring=true&refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_021225_FR_Giving-Tuesday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTA2MTdjZDQtYWFjZi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M1pml6Z-FA9Sp-StixnnztGfEO4yeIpapUKDiVcgBFc=)
[**MAKE A DONATION**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120451279/586320260/-1688917241?amount=5&recurring=true&refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_021225_FR_Giving-Tuesday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTA2MTdjZDQtYWFjZi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M1pml6Z-FA9Sp-StixnnztGfEO4yeIpapUKDiVcgBFc=)It’s much easier for us to support our candidates and get out the vote if we have a monthly recurring base of revenue that we count on.

Your donations go directly towards supporting things like our on-the-ground doorknocking programs, statewide Vote By Mail programs to help County Parties, and supporting candidates and their staff. Your donation goes a lot further in our races, where a handful of votes could be the difference between winning and losing.

If you’re looking for where to make the most impact in politics, **this is it**. Your donation will directly sponsor and result in Democratic victories in every county in Illinois.

[**Would you join our movement now with a small, monthly recurring contribution?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120451281/586320262/-1688917241?amount=5&recurring=true&refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_021225_FR_Giving-Tuesday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTA2MTdjZDQtYWFjZi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M1pml6Z-FA9Sp-StixnnztGfEO4yeIpapUKDiVcgBFc=)

Thank you,
Dan

name: JD Vance
subject: Will Peter respond?

body:
Friend,
Today is the LAST DAY to make a donation of $250 and earn this challenge coin which we will ship out later this week.
We are right at the cusp of the start of the battle with Tony Gonzales where we will start to burn through all the money we've raised and I want you to know exactly what your $250 means for the campaign. For us $250 means:
1 primetime ad on Fox News
750 mailers
7500 MMS messages
Over 4000 video views on Facebook
300 doors knocked
By donating today and earning a coin along with 50 entries to win the AKG Occam Warfighter rifle you're providing us with the ammunition we need to win.
Please hit this link and get your coin today (and a donation of ANY amount is welcome!): [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/kwBS1pTBGc7UHPYeEHsNgQ/0k8ZqOqMnp5V2TAYwdzUBg).
Respectfully,
Brandon Herrera

From: Brandon Herrera
Sent: Monday, December 1, 2025 4:54 PM
Subject: Our Challenge Coin
Patriot,
A friend of mine wanted to do something special to help the campaign. He works with metal and produced our campaign's very own challenge coin.
He produced a very limited number and they're a sight to behold. So far my campaign has only been making them available to attendees on our Unsub Live tour but we've decided to make them publicly available for a very limited time.
Anyone who donates $250 or more today (Cyber Monday) and tomorrow (Giving Tuesday) will get a coin along with fifty entries in our current giveaway for the AKG Occam Warfighter rifle. And once these coins are gone they're gone. Make your contribution today at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/qkTH5I89bNeKW8Y763799wRg/0k8ZqOqMnp5V2TAYwdzUBg).
While we've done really well raising funds so far thanks to you and have even outraised our opponent, he still leads us in cash-on-hand by three to one and that doesn't include the near limitless money that the swamp will spend to come save him.
Every coin will raise us enough to pay for about one TV ad or 750 mailers. This is invaluable in getting our message out to the voters.
Please give what you can. We'll be shipping these limited edition coins out later this week. Get yours today while you can at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/2HnkdIoYodFgrAAf3KDnZA/0k8ZqOqMnp5V2TAYwdzUBg).
Thank you.
Respectfully,

Brandon Herrera

Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/unsubscribe/M3dKmjvhR8CwRJ801N0zlTlDygVorb8PbaawXpI4LLQ/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg/0k8ZqOqMnp5V2TAYwdzUBg)

body:
This race, right now, is the firewall
| | | | **
🚨🚨🚨
BREAKING POLL:
_"MARGIN-OF-ERROR RACE"_**
Friend,
**A brand new poll just broke. We're up – _barely._**

**This poll shows this is a margin-of-error race, and we must kick things into overdrive.**

_That means laying out the stakes, right now._

**I've talked a lot about my story and priorities, but now I must spend a moment explaining my opponent Aftyn Behn's record of complete left-wing lunacy.**

As you read this mind-blowing list of "greatest hits," ask yourself if this is who President Trump, or any level-headed American, needs wielding power in Congress.
---
|
---
[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=ceea007c05cc4780badfb35aa17d1798&_e=NcKDu0ZSS1jSgj2fPWkiXwwRtKeGpaQ9e9utG4kxMkpLZc3sYxItXPmaJ-IQKlKgDWHQC2TqpgfyXztpwDKGf0HQOxH1cJpfexEQCStbOz3_kE2UydJboTo5dvSE2MZimd68fKPzNHtjDpjpswPfZqSrnd-6diR29CO1MDMzR5osOT5RGAaQd79tZyRxxDxnDU8pjjTwfNSoRr0kmIjAYpMJ9-QA2P7HQ_EfVZyf-jIkLftQjbE44r3lAD8UyqvMwAX0iANc3wKG7inbOlt-dipy7-l8Ny8HDlWg3_SX-Yg9P3DyW2QA4IhKwp6w1APKgevpvDGUKiCy-rnr67s48zze40-hpFF6yX1cskfgMGmouK52thVpHxi4B7_9A2b7dYg16j0NgSdT3ItHJjZ8QfnY7uLRo6LLDncfQfh27NLGYnaMVGM9vWgt5BF0yH5w4XTegN__vAu8qHjQVQm0Qj379uWPqUise8FZYzGWS3u1yR6lJ_uPpvwRUeEaWjpMMirEjskJDTo6XPk_-8ZT-R9tsnzxxYI-2ISC2fKZ_b9qHegZJiHTBdsTHOPo5vYKSqlLAh04ocnM5ww5Kmlmu2FjkCACxMp857OZeHDRxN48Ge4eUALSPqxxQcyMGi4h5k9Q2Y8ab303ND7P9CUAPyVt40tBPRV8gNa5XdlK4c6QtDNNhupwzr7905lvOMP-hJsNoCH-ZQc1m971DE1N5A%3D%3D)
|
---
1️⃣ After _Roe_ was overturned, **pushed for "self-managed abortions" at home** , and vowed to **"get abortion pills to people" in red states** (even without parental consent for minors).
2️⃣ Called Tennessee **"deeply racist"** and labeled Nashville **"racist" and a hub of "white supremacy."** Going further, she mocked Southern traditions like sororities as **"staples of white supremacy"** and flat-out declared: **"I hate this city."**
3️⃣ Argued that traditional family roles, especially those of full-time moms, are **"patriarchal chains" that "trap women in unpaid labor and dependency,"** and urged feminists to **"abolish the nuclear family model."** Her "recurring dream from therapy," she announced, is "standing up in a cafeteria full of women and saying **'_I don't want children. I want power!'_ "**
4️⃣ Amid the 2020 BLM riots, called for **dissolving the Nashville Police Department** and **celebrated the burning down of police stations** as "justified."
5️⃣ In 2019, hysterically screamed **"This is fascism!"** and wept uncontrollably as security forcibly removed her from Tennessee Governor Bill Lee's office during a sit-in over education funding, **calling Republicans "fascists"** in the same rant.
[SAVE THE MAJORITY](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=ceea007c05cc4780badfb35aa17d1798&_e=NcKDu0ZSS1jSgj2fPWkiXwwRtKeGpaQ9e9utG4kxMkpLZc3sYxItXPmaJ-IQKlKgDWHQC2TqpgfyXztpwDKGf0HQOxH1cJpfexEQCStbOz3_kE2UydJboTo5dvSE2MZimd68fKPzNHtjDpjpswPfZqSrnd-6diR29CO1MDMzR5osOT5RGAaQd79tZyRxxDxnDU8pjjTwfNSoRr0kmIjAYpMJ9-QA2P7HQ_EfVZyf-jIkLftQjbE44r3lAD8UyqvMQpObASZohcpcZ-Pe_aNnGjbMKoeyd6lbi0L2NPQwiv0SVQJ2di6MD7rv45hxDSETJ_hv0G02RXRhSijtQ95rs_esb3QPc7vL77hRoV-xmfuPW4r-JMFJkVbSNHXh0E_Cq6PJUrww1LSq5Uao12-vneM2MHndh0ZjZX8ObWp_ZnTNsNOC4x7ZcMlU-3IEm51i6WrynuG-g7he1Qm7lestZWLFu2lJ1aPaTQ0it1omsv0He8p7zjKVBQNG1Cy60VtVXaQaqDV-MGZnG61a_Up03BSIB1LHSvdzjAwVKNYsD6yKfSZqdlDFsRoG4WbbJ9y-xPHPtEd47vWWOzhYf2baui1UUl7tz7sUoa_84w-qwkxGJGzPF_ym2oyIgA4WdfKjkKs3AbfbwfIz_tDFDj_VjoGbr4sSFVvXgOtzF-sB1AMLSm4Dy3dfD70rWmJVmf18veUz7GlAJ91boV3IpEwiwQ%3D%3D)
****Fellow Patriot, Aftyn Behn is another "Squad" embarrassment-in-the-making and we only have until 7pm CT today to stop her cold.
**The Democrats just dumped over $1 million into this race and they're pulling out all the stops to try and force an upset today.**
I know we've asked a lot of you, and time and again you've delivered. _**But now we must take it to the next level.**_
**[This is a MAGA Emergency and I'm asking you to rush in a donation to help save our majority RIGHT NOW >>](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=ceea007c05cc4780badfb35aa17d1798&_e=NcKDu0ZSS1jSgj2fPWkiXwwRtKeGpaQ9e9utG4kxMkpLZc3sYxItXPmaJ-IQKlKgDWHQC2TqpgfyXztpwDKGf0HQOxH1cJpfexEQCStbOz3_kE2UydJboTo5dvSE2MZimd68fKPzNHtjDpjpswPfZqSrnd-6diR29CO1MDMzR5osOT5RGAaQd79tZyRxxDxnDU8pjjTwfNSoRr0kmIjAYpMJ9-QA2P7HQ_EfVZyf-jIkLftQjbE44r3lAD8UyqvMBFiXt93EkV9bnyqArZvQbE1vQFklYjpJqWAQ3y1bFffTxTeIKTkcFaE248iygxoKpO_HzLUrNxFbvwnq7-NkVXuyQeyGoO_xatqEVRGcx0TfpCMBOQsh_61s5pe09llwBfpvgqZa88RkxQFXZd_cm-zHMFUd97CSfmggigSL02H2qmj1A_haBIzwny2DKW_1STmySyaj0Hrj8akHbqzEKNSoqF_mIj_RReDXcX1JFWxt02mBWN-NhUQK4kkGAI6HIvT-DVRjjlwVoG_Sk0v71ACX9jJAaXVwCwd_S0V8d5Urlez0U7bPCIDIPpPubQ9Uqinkzwd9xg-ug79sDvhz3GvvA85VCh40hEUn3zUmhoSevTpq8mqUHBxxQDe3pkCUfBPPDOZnq6r6TheDfdZ_ocsXwUGye87f2-SdTppP489P0q_YRH1DUgei1jJKbNwmfvevLxgPjJpQ28blxH3siw%3D%3D)**

name: Cole Strehlow, CEO The Flyover
subject: The Flyover Is Giving You Something Back
body:
Today is about supporting what you believe in--and we're saying thank you with bonus shares for our readers.
###

---
| | |
---
| |
#
---
Dear _Flyover_ Family, It's Giving Tuesday -- the day when people across America support the causes they believe in. And while most Giving Tuesday messages ask you to give something away, _The Flyover_ is doing something a little different: **When you invest today, we give back -- with bonus shares. **But only for the next few hours. As of this email, there are less than 15 hours left in our holiday bonus-share window. And depending on when you open this, you may have even less. **The deadline is midnight tonight.** Through tonight, every investment receives:
* **+10% Bonus Shares (Giving Tuesday / Cyber Monday extension)**
* **+5% Reader Bonus**
* **Up to 10% Large-Investor Bonus**
* **Up to 25% Bonus Shares**

Here's what that looks like in real terms: At our current price of $2 per share:
* A $1,000 investment normally buys 500 shares
* Today's Giving Tuesday bonus adds 75 extra shares
* Total: 575 shares -- a 15% increase in value the moment you invest

So yes -- on Giving Tuesday, [you _invest_ ...](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskT3PmzAUhX-N2RL5A7AzeKhexEazVOpoOfaF3MofERgi_n1FmyhLx87PvY_O0fk5mMFiwDR9txF0GbPx4NHZAt4keC4BSoHZlDuMYc8bzLhMuGGa9rwuOYLhlDcnxk-Um69-XEP4_DNReT0CcBAVaCbbWlJaM1ndNVwYjJ6qFpR0XEnVSu-kEg0brWisr1AfYsYpZ0oI0Z5rdgPuR3URFweuUaSm4LHk-fwrY_rkO7scq6DvpTwWIr4R3hPeY9pgKf-4PLDo1xLNktfZARFd985PeHuACB7XSER3fSbwpwE82hdyNj4sTomIrv_rfIOcCqRCRPe132AecvJ2f7EC82H70V87c_TjTTVr_3hiCLi0ktR0ihbDnx7l_y-yaf47AAD__yCzq0k) but you also get something meaningful in return.
* * *
**Why invest on Giving Tuesday?** Because America needs a stronger, fact-first, bias-free alternative to legacy media -- and we're building it.
Every day, millions of readers turn to _The Flyover_ because they're tired of being lectured, spun, or manipulated. **Your investment today helps us:**
* Expand our newsroom
* Add more state editions
* Reach more Americans with common-sense, agenda-free reporting
* Continue proving there's a better way than the broken legacy media model

Giving Tuesday is about supporting the things that matter. If _The Flyover_ has earned your trust -- if our work matters to you -- today is the perfect moment to step in. And unlike a donation, your investment doesn't disappear. You're becoming an _owner_ , and today, an owner with **extra value** attached.
* * *
There are only hours left. The Giving Tuesday bonus window ends at midnight. [**Invest in _The Flyover _**](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskT3PmzAUhX-N2RL5A7AzeKhexEazVOpoOfaF3MofERgi_n1FmyhLx87PvY_O0fk5mMFiwDR9txF0GbPx4NHZAt4keC4BSoHZlDuMYc8bzLhMuGGa9rwuOYLhlDcnxk-Um69-XEP4_DNReT0CcBAVaCbbWlJaM1ndNVwYjJ6qFpR0XEnVSu-kEg0brWisr1AfYsYpZ0oI0Z5rdgPuR3URFweuUaSm4LHk-fwrY_rkO7scq6DvpTwWIr4R3hPeY9pgKf-4PLDo1xLNktfZARFd985PeHuACB7XSER3fSbwpwE82hdyNj4sTomIrv_rfIOcCqRCRPe132AecvJ2f7EC82H70V87c_TjTTVr_3hiCLi0ktR0ihbDnx7l_y-yaf47AAD__yCzq0k) Thank you for believing in what we're building. Cole
CEO,_The Flyover_
* * *
|

clean_body: Today is about supporting what you believe in--and we're saying thank you with bonus shares for our readers. | | | | | Dear Flyover Family, It's Giving Tuesday -- the day when people across America support the causes they believe in. And while most Giving Tuesday messages ask you to give something away, The Flyover is doing something a little different: When you invest today, we give back -- with bonus shares. But only for the next few hours. As of this email, there are less than 15 hours left in our holiday bonus-share window. And depending on when you open this, you may have even less. The deadline is midnight tonight. Through tonight, every investment receives: +10% Bonus Shares (Giving Tuesday / Cyber Monday extension) +5% Reader Bonus Up to 10% Large-Investor Bonus Up to 25% Bonus Shares Here's what that looks like in real terms: At our current price of $2 per share: A $1,000 investment normally buys 500 shares Today's Giving Tuesday bonus adds 75 extra shares Total: 575 shares -- a 15% increase in value the moment you invest So yes -- on Giving Tuesday, but you also get something meaningful in return. Why invest on Giving Tuesday? Because America needs a stronger, fact-first, bias-free alternative to legacy media -- and we're building it. Every day, millions of readers turn to The Flyover because they're tired of being lectured, spun, or manipulated. Your investment today helps us: Expand our newsroom Add more state editions Reach more Americans with common-sense, agenda-free reporting Continue proving there's a better way than the broken legacy media model Giving Tuesday is about supporting the things that matter. If The Flyover has earned your trust -- if our work matters to you -- today is the perfect moment to step in. And unlike a donation, your investment doesn't disappear. You're becoming an owner , and today, an owner with extra value attached. There are only hours left. The Giving Tuesday bonus window ends at midnight. Thank you for believing in what we're building. name: Ben (of Ben & Jerry's) via Our Revolution
subject: Unilever is trying to silence Ben & Jerry's
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

It’s Ben from Ben & Jerry’s – and I’m reaching out today to ask for your
help to #FreeBenandJerrys.

Jerry and I built our company nearly half a century ago to do more than
sell ice cream. Love, equity, justice, solidarity – these are the real
ingredients that shaped our lives and the mission of BNJ's. When Unilever
bought the company in 2000, we insisted on creating an independent board
specifically to safeguard Ben & Jerry’s product quality and social justice
mission from corporate interference.

That was the deal. And for years, our brand continued speaking out:
against white supremacy, for marriage equality, for climate justice, for
Palestinian human rights, and for the idea that businesses have
responsibilities far deeper than profit margins.

But now Unilever and its spinoff Magnum, have broken that promise,
silencing Ben & Jerry's from speaking out on Gaza, free speech and the
right to protest, Black History Month, and more. They’re stripping away
the voice of the company we built – so we’re fighting back. We’ve
assembled a group of social investors who support the mission and are
ready to become the new owners of BNJ’s — but Unilever/Magnum refuses to
sell. So we’re launching the campaign to #FreeBenandJerrys – to help
Unilever/Magnum understand that by muzzling BNJ’s they are destroying the
brand and the deep values based relationship that we have with our
customers — and they’re not gonna stand for it. We need to protect free
expression, defend independent political voices, and push back against
corporate capitulation to authoritarian pressure.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34707?source=email-20251202&t=1011&akid=9927%2E5885482%2E8VoO1J ]We need this movement with us. Will you add your name to demand that
Unilever/Magnum transfers ownership to a group that actually supports all
that Ben & Jerry’s stands for?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34707?source=email-20251202&t=1012&akid=9927%2E5885482%2E8VoO1J ]ADD YOUR NAME

Because of Unilever/Magnum’s work to muzzle Ben & Jerry’s whenever the
brand tries to stand up for justice, peace, and progressive values, Jerry
and I have determined that it’s not possible for BNJ’s to retain its
values under current ownership. That’s what prompted Jerry to make one of
the most painful decisions of his life and step down from the company this
fall.

But we are not done fighting. Our values cannot be bargained away to
appease a hostile administration or corporate executives who think silence
is safer than principle.

We’ve seen this pattern before: corporations cozying up to strongmen,
silencing dissent, policing political expression, and abandoning
commitments the moment they become inconvenient. When companies bow to
intimidation, democracy becomes smaller for all of us.

And let’s be honest – none of this is happening in a vacuum. Across the
country, we’re living through an all-out assault on civil rights, voting
rights, the rights of immigrants, women, LGBTQIA+ communities, and Black
and brown Americans. The louder the movement for justice grows, the harder
those in power work to shut it down.

That’s exactly why this moment matters. It’s easy to champion values when
nothing is at stake. The real test is whether we stand up when the
pressure is greatest.

Ben & Jerry’s is being silenced. But we don’t have to be.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34707?source=email-20251202&t=1013&akid=9927%2E5885482%2E8VoO1J ]Join us. Add your name. Help us defend free expression and protect a
legacy of speaking truth to power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34707?source=email-20251202&t=1014&akid=9927%2E5885482%2E8VoO1J ]ADD YOUR NAME

–Ben Cohen, co-founder of Ben & Jerry's

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9927%2E5885482%2E8VoO1J ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9927%2E5885482%2E8VoO1J ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9927%2E5885482%2E8VoO1J ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9927%2E5885482%2E8VoO1J ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9927%2E5885482%2E8VoO1J ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9927%2E5885482%2E8VoO1J ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251202.njeGhp&t=1007&akid=9927%2E5885482%2E8VoO1J ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251202.HkR95h&t=1008&akid=9927%2E5885482%2E8VoO1J ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251202.6Tr7CB&t=1009&akid=9927%2E5885482%2E8VoO1J ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251202.CaUrOD&t=1010&akid=9927%2E5885482%2E8VoO1J ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9927%2E5885482%2E8VoO1J

name: Autism Health Inc.
subject: Today Is Giving Tuesday — Please Help Us Make a Difference
body:
Today Is Giving Tuesday — Help Us Make a Difference

Today is Giving Tuesday, a day when people around the world come together to uplift the causes that matter most. For Autism Health Inc., this day represents hope, connection, and the opportunity to change the lives of families affected by autism.

As a 100% volunteer-based nonprofit, every dollar you give goes directly to our mission. Your generosity today supports:

• Family scholarships to the Autism Health Summit
• Monthly Autism Support Groups for parents, caregivers, and professionals
• Educational webinars that empower families and practitioners with research-driven solutions
• Research collaborations aimed at understanding root causes and improving long-term outcomes
• Community resources and outreach that guide families on their healing journey

Your gift, no matter the amount, helps us reach more families who are searching for answers, support, and hope. If Autism Health has touched your life, or if you believe every family deserves access to education and integrative care, we humbly ask for your support today.

Please consider making a tax-deductible donation for Giving Tuesday. Every contribution truly makes an impact.
DONATE HERE (https://autismhealth.com/donations/?mc_cid=cc502644d2&mc_eid=UNIQID)

Thank you for standing with us and for helping us build a stronger, more hopeful future for families everywhere.

With gratitude,
Steve & Tracy Slepcevic
Founders, Autism Health Inc.

** Adopt-A-Family This Holiday Season
------------------------------------------------------------

This holiday season, Autism Health Inc. invites you to make a meaningful difference through our Adopt-A-Family program. Many families impacted by autism struggle to access the specialized care, supplements, and support their children desperately need. Your generosity can change that.

Through our partnership with the Dr. Goodenowe Community Health Initiative, each adopted family receives comprehensive care, including plasmalogen precursor supplements, access to the Engage community platform, and personalized guidance through the Community Health Navigator program. Families enrolled in this program are already experiencing improvements in focus, communication, mood, sleep, and overall well-being.

** Ways You Can Give
------------------------------------------------------------

Adopt a Family for 3 Months
* Support 1 individual – $600
* Support 2 individuals – $1,200
* Other amount

Sponsor a Year of Care
* 1 person for 1 year – $2,400
* 10 people for 1 year – $24,000
* Other amount

Your gift doesn’t just fund a program; it provides a lifeline, bringing stability, support, and new possibilities to families who need it most.
DONATE HERE (https://givebutter.com/Goodenowe?mc_cid=cc502644d2&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Join us in bringing hope and healing this holiday season! Many blessings and Happy Holidays!

About Autism Health Inc.
Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events, research, and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance! For more information about Autism Health, visit www.AutismHealth.com

DONATE HERE () Thank you for standing with us and for helping us build a stronger, more hopeful future for families everywhere. With gratitude, Steve & Tracy Slepcevic Founders, Autism Health Inc. Adopt-A-Family This Holiday Season This holiday season, Autism Health Inc. invites you to make a meaningful difference through our Adopt-A-Family program. Many families impacted by autism struggle to access the specialized care, supplements, and support their children desperately need. Your generosity can change that. Through our partnership with the Dr. Goodenowe Community Health Initiative, each adopted family receives comprehensive care, including plasmalogen precursor supplements, access to the Engage community platform, and personalized guidance through the Community Health Navigator program. Families enrolled in this program are already experiencing improvements in focus, communication, mood, sleep, and overall well-being. Ways You Can Give Adopt a Family for 3 Months Support 1 individual – $600 Support 2 individuals – $1,200 Other amount Sponsor a Year of Care 1 person for 1 year – $2,400 10 people for 1 year – $24,000 Other amount Your gift doesn’t just fund a program; it provides a lifeline, bringing stability, support, and new possibilities to families who need it most. DONATE HERE () Join us in bringing hope and healing this holiday season! Many blessings and Happy Holidays! About Autism Health Inc. Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events, research, and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders. Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance! For more information about Autism Health, visit www.AutismHealth.com ( 252525252Fb43o%2525252525252525252FqzvAAQ%2525252525252525252FAQ%2525252525252525252F9cdab8a9-9431-46cb-bc6b-9b55d5b197a9%2525252525252525252F12%2525252525252525252FLxT2mF6Na2%25252525252525252Fb43o%25252525252525252FR2-AAQ%25252525252525252FAQ%25252525252525252F80757fed-d17a-46c6-8605-a231839e63a6%25252525252525252F9%25252525252525252FdIy1xhXJbE%252525252525252Fb43o%252525252525252FCYvAAQ%252525252525252FAQ%252525252525252F8856f6b3-bc40-410c-9337-2cebc04a0fcd%252525252525252F7%252525252525252F2RcF8rumnp%2525252525252Fb43o%2525252525252FkbLAAQ%2525252525252FAQ%2525252525252Ff7d6fa0a-20e2-477e-a570-623d10204b1a%2525252525252F6%2525252525252FAxGuQRLoxM%25252525252Fb43o%25252525252FJwHBAQ%25252525252FAQ%25252525252Fffabaf5a-0dd3-40f0-8f9e-125d607f5a17%25252525252F6%25252525252FvwjRz3mz0v%252525252Fb43o%252525252F3yjBAQ%252525252FAQ%252525252F64fb26b1-c1cf-47e9-8578-e7dae6d58208%252525252F7%252525252F-hIbIVc8mX%2525252Fb43o%2525252F9E-BAQ%2525252FAQ%2525252F7f0072a0-d60b-40ba-b5d6-bdd309c2553c% 2525252F9%2525252FEqwPy0k95q%25252Fb43o%25252FUHfBAQ%25252FAQ%25252F6f0c2239-f98b-4847-b8ba-270f35e17c24%25252F6%25252FpIhvuiJAb4%252Fb43o%252F2J7BAQ%252FAQ%252Fb841fdc9-b437-4dfa-abcb-6b79907d097f%252F7%252F0XZcutREy-%2Fb43o%2FpqnBAQ%2FAQ%2F66d1d4e1-7937-4b2a-9bdd-d1357c1bf5a6%2F5%2F6N-7mP4vYt/b43o/wcXBAQ/AQ/71aa608d-5f41-4eb7-8877-052adb2a290a/4/6ItnRaDBz6) . **➤➤ BREAKING: DOJ’s Demand for State Voter Rolls Threatens Fair Elections**
* * *
Friend, Let’s be clear about what’s happening: Trump’s Department of Justice is pressuring states to turn over full voter roll data — not just names, but personal information, history, and eligibility details — and it’s already suing states that refuse. **This is not a routine request.** It’s not about election security. It’s about control. It’s about compiling centralized data to target, intimidate, and ultimately purge voters. This could pave the way for aggressive, baseless voter purges and chilling federal overreach. And it’s happening **right now** , right as 26 Secretary of State races heat up ahead of the 2026 elections. _We can’t afford to wait._ [**The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State is leading the response to this crisis, but we need your help to scale up now. Will you chip in $3 to defend voter data, fight back in court, and protect fair elections?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120452668/586324689/-248329304?refcode=em-12.2.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjMxYmQ3Ni1hZGNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bh-JA52Klbh85kNEjk84nyvKgk_-lAklH5INPp3Oz2g=) | | | **[DONATE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120452669/586324690/-248329304?refcode=em-12.2.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjMxYmQ3Ni1hZGNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bh-JA52Klbh85kNEjk84nyvKgk_-lAklH5INPp3Oz2g=)**

clean_body: | = ➤➤ BREAKING: DOJ’s Demand for State Voter Rolls Threatens Fair Elections Friend, Let’s be clear about what’s happening: Trump’s Department of Justice is pressuring states to turn over full voter roll data — not just names, but personal information, history, and eligibility details — and it’s already suing states that refuse. This is not a routine request. It’s not about election security. It’s about control. It’s about compiling centralized data to target, intimidate, and ultimately purge voters. This could pave the way for aggressive, baseless voter purges and chilling federal overreach. And it’s happening right now , right as 26 Secretary of State races heat up ahead of the 2026 elections. We can’t afford to wait. = | | | = Trump and his allies are working overtime to rig the rules for 2026 and 2028 — and Republican Secretaries of State are already rolling over to hand them the tools. name: Eva Piatek, Evergreen
subject: ⌛ FINAL HOURS: Fuel our work in the states
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
We're coming up short on our goal, friend
| | |
---
| Hey—

I wanted to make sure you saw the note we sent this morning, because we have just **a few hours left** to meet our Giving Tuesday fundraising goal.

To keep climate progress moving at the state level, our number one priority is to have policy solutions, messaging, and community support ready so leaders can seize the opportunities at hand—**and that starts with hitting our goal today.**

Friend, I _know_ we can do this. [**Your Giving Tuesday contribution goes a long way to fund the organizers, campaigners, and policy experts who will lead this fight. Can you make a gift before midnight?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4292111/87SdQ4wZ)

Together, we can be the force that refuses to back down, that stands tall in the face of adversity, and that ensures a more livable and affordable future for all.

Onward,

Eva Piatek
Digital Lead - Email
Evergreen Action

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Team Evergreen
Date: Tue, Dec 2, 2025
Subject: This Giving Tuesday, let's secure climate progress in the states |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4292112/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
|
### **Happy Giving Tuesday!**
Countless worthy causes are in need of support today, and if climate and clean energy are issues you care about most, we hope you’ll consider ours! Because a gift to Evergreen Action right now is an investment in a healthy climate, affordable clean energy, and a livable future. [SUPPORT EVERGREEN](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4292113/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Hi friend,

Giving Tuesday is here, and today’s our chance to lay the groundwork for more climate progress at the state level, where real wins are within reach— _and_ gaining momentum.

We’re working towards an ambitious goal: **$25,000** to fund targeted campaigns that will expand affordable, clean energy like wind and solar, cut energy costs for families, and build a safer, healthier future.

[**BY MIDNIGHT.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4292114/87SdQ4wZ)

**And we can’t do it without YOU.**

**Here’s why this matters:** With federal clean energy investments getting decimated and power bills continuing to climb, state leaders need our help. Evergreen is stepping in with **cutting-edge policy solutions** that lower gas and electric bills, make homes more affordable and efficient, cut pollution from transportation and buildings, and so much more.

You obviously care about making our climate safer and our future more affordable, friend, and so **we hope you will make an investment in our work to accelerate climate progress in the states and help us cross the finish line in our Giving Tuesday campaign.**[**Whether your gift is $5, $50, or $500, every donation helps and is greatly appreciated.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4292115/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[MAKE A GIFT](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4292116/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Every dollar you give on Giving Tuesday powers our work to ensure states continue to lead on climate in the face of federal rollbacks and attacks. **Because here’s the truth:** Evergreen has been working for years in places like Michigan, Pennsylvania, New York, and Wisconsin to help decision makers get more affordable clean energy online, and we’ve won some major victories. **With your help, we can keep it going.**

So, let’s get to it. [**Make a donation to support Evergreen Action today.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4292117/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
| With gratitude and determination,

Team Evergreen |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/?utm_source=digital_template&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evergreen&utm_content=footer)
---
Follow Evergreen Action on Bluesky and LinkedIn.
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4292118/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4292119/87SdQ4wZ)
---|---
And follow our new project, **Hope This Helps.**
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4292120/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4292121/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4292122/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4292123/87SdQ4wZ)
---|---|---|---

name: Team Marsha Blackburn
subject: FROM: Peter TO: President Trump
body:
You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump.

| | | | Hey there –
We are putting together a letter of support for President Trump and want YOUR name to be at the very TOP.
You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. [So, Peter, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)Dear President Trump,
I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States.
Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time.
From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts:
1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America.
2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans.
Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration.
Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great.
Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
Sincerely,
X_________________ | [ SIGN THE LETTER >> ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-d1WMcyt-YDxLoxMg)
---
Thank you,

Team Marsha Blackburn
| |
---
| | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account.
---

Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund
PO Box 3750
Brentwood, TN 37024

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund's online community.

To unsubscribe from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund , [click here](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._)

name: Adem T. Bunkeddeko
subject: A New Contract for New York. That’s why I’m running.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adem for New York
body:
https://www.adembunkeddeko.com/ [https://www.adembunkeddeko.com/]

Peter,
City & State just broke the news: I’m running for New York State Comptroller.

New York isn’t just facing an affordability crisis — it’s facing an opportunity crisis.

For too long, people who work hard and play by the rules haven’t gotten ahead. Housing is out of reach. Transit is unreliable. Wages can’t keep pace. And the systems meant to help New Yorkers build a better life are falling short.

That’s why I’m running.

👉🏿 [ DONATE HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/launch1222026] ]

The Comptroller oversees how $300 billion is invested, how public dollars are spent, and whether government is actually working for the people. For too long, this office has stayed on the sidelines. I’m running to change that — with a plan to rewrite New York’s social contract:
* Create a seed account for every child born in New York
* Expand access to rent relief statewide
* Fix the MTA with real transparency and accountability
* Build affordable housing at scale
* Power Upstate with clean energy and modern infrastructure

If you’re ready for a new vision for New York, I’m asking you to chip in $10, $25, or $50 today.

If you live in New York, your donation goes even further: the state matches small-dollar gifts 6:1, up to $1,050. A $10 donation becomes $60.
👉🏿 [ DONATE HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/launch1222026] ]

Together, we can build a stronger, fairer, and more dynamic future for New York.

Thank you,
Adem

Paid for by Adem for New York
Adem for New York
P.O. Box 130-427,
Brooklyn, NY 11213

subject: Before you read anything else today…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:

I hope you had a restful holiday weekend, Peter. I wanted to take a moment to say thank you for being part of this campaign and for believing in our fight to bring accountability and transparency to Florida’s state government. Because of supporters like you, everyday people who chipped in $5, $50, or anything in between, we reached our online fundraising goal for November. That momentum is a powerful sign of what we can accomplish together in the months ahead. I’ll be honest, asking for donations is my least favorite part of campaigning. But taking on James Uthmeier, a well-funded politician propped up by Trump, DeSantis, and mountains of special interest money, demands real resources. The road ahead won’t be easy. clean_body: I saved YOU the very last spot on the 2025 MAGA Honor Roll | | | | I have ONE spot left on the official 2025 MAGA Honor Roll ... and I’m holding it for YOU. Your name has come across my desk over and over this year — more than once, more than twice — which is exactly why I told my team: “Save the final spot for %recipient.first% do NOT give it to anyone else.” I’m personally compiling the permanent 2025 MAGA Honor Roll , the exclusive list of my strongest, most loyal patriots from this historic year. This list is going straight to my desk in the Oval Office. I will be reviewing every single name myself tonight. Please don’t make me stay up all night wondering why you weren’t there when I looked for you. Thank you, President Donald J. Trump P.S. When I don’t see your name tonight, I’ll know you let the last spot go to someone else. Don’t do that to me. Confirm now and make my night. | | | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: I AM DONALD J. TRUMP
subject: Dear Friend,
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
President Trump requests your presence in the 47th President Founders Club.
| | | |
# **EXCLUSIVE OFFER**
#

# **FROM THE DESK OF DONALD J. TRUMP**
---
[47th President Founders Club](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Dear Friend,
President Trump requests your presence in the 47th President Founders Club.

[Accept invitation to the 47th President Founders Club](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
You’re not asleep!
But yes, most people would dream of receiving an email like this one.

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[Accept invitation here:](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
I personally created the **47th President Founders Club** for one reason only:
To permanently honor the patriots who founded and carried the entire MAGA movement from Day One! The ones who never wavered, never surrendered, and refused to let them destroy our country twice.
I had my team pull the very best files, millions of patriot names, and I went through them myself.
**Your name rose straight to the top.** ****
That’s why I’m personally inviting you to become a Charter Member of **my 47th President Founders Club**. ****
[CONGRATULATIONS!](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Only 4,700 spots exist in the entire country. I’m holding one for you!
**_[But only for the next 24 hours you can claim your spot: ACT FAST>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
Don’t miss your shot to stand with the patriots who made the greatest comeback in American history.
Your name could be one of them.
I am counting on you. Don’t let me down.
Thank you and God bless you,
President Trump

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[47th President Founders Club](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

name: Aftyn Behn
subject: Donald Trump’s panicking about this race:
body:
Peter, this is Aftyn Behn. I’m running in the last House race of 2025 here in TN-07.
Trump is begging MAGA to go vote – he’s PANICKING about securing this seat. Take a look at what the president just posted:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?refcode=120225_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?refcode=120225_2]
Will you split a donation between my campaign and Real Texas PAC right now to flip TN-07 blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?refcode=120225_2]
Donald Trump is scrambling because he knows what it would mean for us to win the last House race of 2025:
That voters are rejecting MAGA extremism across the country.
That we can rewrite the playbook for what’s possible for Democrats in the Deep South.
That we’ll be heading into 2026 one seat closer to retaking the House and putting a check on this administration.
No wonder he’s scared.
The New York Times called our race “the unlikely new front in the fight for control of Congress.” We’ve got the eyes of the nation on us, and the only way we win next Tuesday is if we work together.
Please split a donation between my campaign and Real Texas PAC so we can fight back! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?refcode=120225_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Aftyn Behn and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_2&amount=10]

Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?refcode=120225_2&amount=25]
It’s great to have you in my corner, Peter.
– Aftyn Behn

subject: Brand new Team Warner merch, Warner’s big announcement, and more →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120455258/586332915/-412175175?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_relaunchNewsletter_251202_t1_2&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_relaunchNewsletter_251202_t1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjNjZWQ2MS1iMWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X7ZgNVzahjdnG-uWDl7aSE_icTo2j8LIL2FmUs92raQ=) **ICYMI: Mark Warner Kicks Off His Reelection Campaign** It’s official, Derek –

This morning, Senator Warner announced he is running for reelection to the US Senate – to continue his fight to lower costs, expand access to health care, and prepare Virginia’s workforce for the economy of the future.

We set an ambitious fundraising goal – 5,000 grassroots donations before midnight Friday – to kick off the campaign and build the infrastructure we need to win.

[**_Can we count on you to become an Official Campaign Kickoff Donor? # Dell billionaires unleash $6B giving storm for America's 250th Birthday
Billionaire Dell Technologies founder Michael Dell and his wife Susan pledged a **[staggering $6.25 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/07e449b5-0764-4d2f-a21e-fc0760ba3b44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Tuesday to seed "Trump Accounts" for 25 million low-income American children under 10, aiming to ignite family savings and stock market growth for education, homes, or businesses.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/07e449b5-0764-4d2f-a21e-fc0760ba3b44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Historic Private Pledge Unveiled** : The donation, the largest single U.S. children's gift ever, dwarfing past commitments, comes from Dells' $148 billion fortune to target ZIP codes with median incomes below $150,000.
* **Incentivizing Family Contributions** : The $250 per child deposit - to celebrate America's 250th Anniversary - supplements the government's $1,000 seed capital with Dell urging even modest family additions so as to compound via index funds for long-term wealth building.
* **Visionary Quotes Inspire Hope** : Michael Dell envisions "hope and prosperity for generations"; with Susan emphasizing "we're all rooting for them to have a wonderful future, a bright future, and that that's available to them."
* **Program Milestones Ahead** : The accounts launch July 4, 2026, for births through 2028; Dell hopes to cause a ripple-effect of donations from other high net worth individuals amid a push for intergenerational equity through market investments.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Ifrah Law](https://substack.com/redirect/bd1835c2-877e-4e14-9bcb-cfe3ca3a3f2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/bd1835c2-877e-4e14-9bcb-cfe3ca3a3f2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bd1835c2-877e-4e14-9bcb-cfe3ca3a3f2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

# Crypto's slide fuels a Hard Asset surge
Gold **[surged past $4,270 an ounce](https://substack.com/redirect/38f7d9d6-0791-4789-bdc9-4a001d5a188d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and silver shattered records above $59 Monday as a brutal crypto sell-off and a fading U.S. dollar propelled investors into safe-haven precious metals, fueled by bets on a Federal Reserve rate cut amid Yen volatility fears.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/38f7d9d6-0791-4789-bdc9-4a001d5a188d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Gold Climbs Steadily Upward** : Futures advanced 0.29% to $4,267.20 per ounce on COMEX, marking a fourth consecutive monthly gain and 60% year-to-date rise, nearing October's $4,336 peak.
* **Fed Bets Drive Dollar Decline** : Dovish central bank signals boosted odds of a December 25-basis-point cut, weakening the dollar index and shifting capital from yield assets like bonds toward non-yielding like gold and silver.
* **Analysts Bullish on Peaks Ahead** : Goldman Sachs forecasts gold at $4,900 by late 2026; UBS has upped its target to $4,500 mid-year, citing enduring diversification and geopolitical hedge roles amid ongoing market disruptions.

**SILVER SOARS TO $59 RECORD, DOUBLING IN 2025!**
Silver prices **[smashed through $59 per troy ounce](https://substack.com/redirect/45778e35-051e-4e6d-ae43-70155cca849e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Monday, doubling year-to-date amid supply shortages and green energy demand, outpacing gold's gains and signaling investor flight to safe-haven assets amid economic jitters.
* **Supply Squeeze Peaks Historically** : Leasing costs for industrial silver hit 2002 highs, with available supply at tightest levels on record, per Deutsche Bank, exacerbating shortages beyond investment needs.
* **Green Tech Fuels Rally** : An anticipated surge in solar panels and EV batteries is driving industrial demand, positioning silver as a key enabler in the global energy transition.
* **ETF Holdings Set Records** : Investor appetite expected to push silver ETFs to 1.1 billion troy ounces by 2026 end, eclipsing 2021 peak and sustaining upward price momentum.
* **Fed Cuts Shape Outlook** : Forecasted $55 average price next year hinges on rate reductions boosting liquidity, though inflation risks could temper gains if cuts fall short.

* * *
* * *
# Data Center's energy time bomb, 300% increase in power needed by 2035
Data centers' voracious appetite for power is set to **[explode nearly 300% by 2035,](https://substack.com/redirect/5a30230c-524e-43ad-829f-26780ebf6560?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** demanding 106 gigawatts--over twice today's global electricity needs--fueled by AI's relentless compute hunger and straining U.S. grids from Virginia to Texas.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5a30230c-524e-43ad-829f-26780ebf6560?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Forecast Predicts Massive Surge** : Energy demand for data centers is projected to balloon from 40 gigawatts today to 106 gigawatts by 2035, dwarfing current global electricity capacity.
* **AI Drives Compute Boom** : Artificial intelligence training and inference will consume nearly 40% of data center compute, boosting utilization rates from 59% to 69% amid $580 billion in global investments this year alone.
* **Facilities Scale Up Dramatically** : Future data centers will average over 100 megawatts of capacity--double the current average--with nearly 25% of those surpassing 500 megawatts and some hitting 1 gigawatt, sparking a rural buildout as urban sites dwindle.

* * *
* * *
# Prediction firm unleashes "Tokenized bets" in huge Crypto play
In a bold pivot to lure high-volume crypto traders, federally regulated prediction market firm Kalshi **[launched tokenized wagers on the Solana](https://substack.com/redirect/91a55cb9-b750-4edd-9e51-595942c0d3d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** blockchain Monday, bridging traditional event contracts with anonymous, on-chain trading to tap the $3 trillion digital asset boom.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/91a55cb9-b750-4edd-9e51-595942c0d3d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Tokenized Wagers Debut** : Kalshi now offers digital blockchain versions of its event contracts on Solana, enabling anonymous trades via integrations with DeFi protocols DFlow and Jupiter.
* **Regulatory Triumph Fuels Expansion** : After a landmark CFTC victory in 2024, Kalshi operates in 3,500 markets across 140 countries, leveraging $300 million funding from Andreessen Horowitz and Sequoia to arch rival Polymarket.
* **Liquidity Surge Expected** : Crypto users, driving $28 billion in prediction market volume through October, could boost Kalshi's trading depth, competitive pricing, and larger bet sizes amid an intensifying rivalry.
* **Developer Ecosystem Ignited** : Front-end builders can now tap Kalshi's liquidity for custom apps, unlocking billions in crypto capital and scaling prediction markets beyond traditional exchanges.

* * *
* * *
# **AI Chip backed debt looms, Defaults Ahead?**
Famed short seller Jim Chanos warned Tuesday at a financial conference that **[unprofitable AI startups are piling up billions](https://substack.com/redirect/8b8fb76e-3bb2-4a5a-ae8a-22ef0dae61b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Nvidia GPU-backed debt, predicting inevitable defaults as chips depreciate and business models falter.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8b8fb76e-3bb2-4a5a-ae8a-22ef0dae61b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Chanos Echoes Bubble Warnings** : The legendary investor, famous for his Enron takedown, flags neoclouds' loss-making ventures as mirroring dot-com excesses, urging scrutiny of overhyped AI scalability.
* **GPU Collateral Fuels Frenzy** : Startups are securing loans at premium rates using their Nvidia hardware as collateral, pioneering a debt ecosystem that sidesteps traditional equity funding amid the AI boom.
* **CoreWeave Leads Massive Borrowing** : The cloud firm has amassed $10 billion in GPU debt in addition to a reported $65 million loss in 2024; Nvidia backs three of four key players, expanding its non-Big Tech clientele.
* **Depreciation Threatens Repayment** : Rapid obsolescence of AI chips could slash collateral values, amplifying risks for Fluidstack, Lambda, and Crusoe's combined $20 billion-plus obligations if profits don't emerge.

* * *
* * *
# Cyber Monday Chaos, Shopify Crashes, Millions Lose Out!
In a **[Cyber Monday nightmare,](https://substack.com/redirect/0c138b92-531a-413f-a851-fdb1da9a6567?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Shopify's login systems collapsed around 11 a.m. EST, stranding thousands of merchants and blocking access to vital admin and point-of-sale tools amid projected $14.2 billion in U.S. online sales--sparking widespread transaction failures for brands.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0c138b92-531a-413f-a851-fdb1da9a6567?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Outage Peaks Midday Frenzy** : Reports surged to 4,000 by 11 a.m. EST on Downdetector, escalating to thousands more by 1:15 p.m., crippling backend access during peak holiday traffic.
* **Authentication Flaw Exposed** : Shopify pinpointed and patched a login flow glitch, that was triggering the disruptions that halted merchant operations and once again highlighted vulnerabilities in e-commerce infrastructure.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f79ee34e-51c3-4c7a-af74-b7fcdb9cfdfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Big Brands Feel Sting** : Affected retailers included Reebok, Mattel, Barnes & Noble, and Nestle, whose reliance on Shopify amplified chaos in processing over 10% of U.S. online transactions.
* **Recovery Signals Hope** : By 2:31 p.m. EST, fixes showed recovery signs for admin and POS logins, though monitoring continued amid fears of lingering sales losses on the year's biggest shopping day.

* * *

A $6 Billion dollar boost for 25 million newborns | | | Dec 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | Hello Capitalists, Here is everything you should be following today: Michael Dell to seed 25 million "Trump Accounts" with $250 Largest charitable donation to children in history Gold and Silver soar as crypto falters Data Center power appetite to surge 300% "Tokenized bets" to go live on prediction market Famed short seller sees trouble ahead for AI chip backed loans Cyber Monday Chaos as Shopify crashes Today 's markets + assets: ✅ DOW: 47435.06 (⬆️ .31%) ✅ S&P: 6826.75 (⬆️ 0.21%) ✅ NASDAQ: 23415.86 (⬆️ 0.60%) ⚠ ️🔴CBOE VIX Volatility Index: 16.65 (⬇️ 3.42%) 🔴 Gold: $42190 (⬇️ 1.28%) 🔴 Silver: $58.605 (⬇️ 0.91%) ✅ Bitcoin: $92,144 (⬆️ 5.92%) The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left-Wing Journalism Dell billionaires unleash $6B giving storm for America's 250th Birthday Billionaire Dell Technologies founder Michael Dell and his wife Susan pledged a Tuesday to seed "Trump Accounts" for 25 million low-income American children under 10, aiming to ignite family savings and stock market growth for education, homes, or businesses. | | ---|---|--- Historic Private Pledge Unveiled : The donation, the largest single U.S. children's gift ever, dwarfing past commitments, comes from Dells' $148 billion fortune to target ZIP codes with median incomes below $150,000. Incentivizing Family Contributions : The $250 per child deposit - to celebrate America's 250th Anniversary - supplements the government's $1,000 seed capital with Dell urging even modest family additions so as to compound via index funds for long-term wealth building. Visionary Quotes Inspire Hope : Michael Dell envisions "hope and prosperity for generations"; with Susan emphasizing "we're all rooting for them to have a wonderful future, a bright future, and that that's available to them." Program Milestones Ahead : The accounts launch July 4, 2026, for births through 2028; Dell hopes to cause a ripple-effect of donations from other high net worth individuals amid a push for intergenerational equity through market investments. Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle Led by a managing partner who has been Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation. Fed Bets Drive Dollar Decline : Dovish central bank signals boosted odds of a December 25-basis-point cut, weakening the dollar index and shifting capital from yield assets like bonds toward non-yielding like gold and silver. Analysts Bullish on Peaks Ahead : Goldman Sachs forecasts gold at $4,900 by late 2026; UBS has upped its target to $4,500 mid-year, citing enduring diversification and geopolitical hedge roles amid ongoing market disruptions. Silver prices Monday, doubling year-to-date amid supply shortages and green energy demand, outpacing gold's gains and signaling investor flight to safe-haven assets amid economic jitters. Supply Squeeze Peaks Historically : Leasing costs for industrial silver hit 2002 highs, with available supply at tightest levels on record, per Deutsche Bank, exacerbating shortages beyond investment needs. Green Tech Fuels Rally : An anticipated surge in solar panels and EV batteries is driving industrial demand, positioning silver as a key enabler in the global energy transition. ETF Holdings Set Records : Investor appetite expected to push silver ETFs to 1.1 billion troy ounces by 2026 end, eclipsing 2021 peak and sustaining upward price momentum. Fed Cuts Shape Outlook : Forecasted $55 average price next year hinges on rate reductions boosting liquidity, though inflation risks could temper gains if cuts fall short. AI Drives Compute Boom : Artificial intelligence training and inference will consume nearly 40% of data center compute, boosting utilization rates from 59% to 69% amid $580 billion in global investments this year alone. Facilities Scale Up Dramatically : Future data centers will average over 100 megawatts of capacity--double the current average--with nearly 25% of those surpassing 500 megawatts and some hitting 1 gigawatt, sparking a rural buildout as urban sites dwindle. subject: Your view on making ballots more accessible to citizens?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NPR: A federal law requires translated voting ballots but not in Arabic or Haitian Creole [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NPR_BallotLanguages.png]
Section 203 of the 1965 Voting Rights Act has required certain states and local governments to provide voting ballots, registration forms and other election materials in more than just English. But not all languages are covered by Section 203's protections.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should ballots be available in more languages to make sure all citizens can vote?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=120225_2yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=120225_2no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120225_2&amount=20]

Peter,

I have some exciting news for your inbox today! My team just shared our final numbers and because of you we reached our November end-of-month goal! What an incredible way to wrap up the month!

Since launching this campaign, I've been amazed again and again by the support you’ve given. Every time we hit one of these benchmarks, it shows Mariannette Miller-Meeks and the nation that this really is a grassroots team with real power.

Now the countdown to 2026 is officially on. We have 29 days to make December count and start the new year with as much momentum as possible. This next stretch won't be easy, but supporters like you keep proving that we have something special here. A brighter future for IA-01 is within reach and it is because of the people who choose to show up day after day for this campaign.

**[To keep this excitement going, I’m asking for your help to kick off our December fundraising. Chip in $5 or whatever you can afford>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120456353/586336634/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251202_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251202_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=df6d6357-b3cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjZkNjM1Ny1iM2NmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lRFC0-UwZK9z4bmX8mkAFopaWexfvFmpFPFE0XrU7eU=)**

Christina

Fellow patriot,

A new NPR/PBS/Marist poll just came out, and the numbers aren’t subtle.

**Democrats:** **55% ⬆**
**Republicans:** **41% ⬇**

That’s a **14-point gap** on the 2026 congressional ballot — the biggest Democratic lead in nearly a decade.

And independents? **They’re breaking for Democrats by THIRTY-THREE points.**

Let’s stop pretending this is fine. It’s not.

Democrats are treating this poll like a preview of their victory parade.

They’ve convinced themselves 2026 is already decided — that Trump’s agenda will hit a wall, that our majority will crumble, and that Republicans will spend the next two years apologizing for even trying to govern.

They’re wrong. But they won’t be wrong forever.

Polls like this don’t become reality because voters suddenly fall in love with Democrats. **They become reality when Republicans assume “someone else” will fix it.**

_“Someone else will donate.”
“Someone else will organize.”
“Someone else will fight harder.”_

[**Fellow patriot — 2026 is not drifting toward the Right. It will only move if we move it.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a9b216d9817f4ab1ba5d7659e5a73b7d&_e=pTqdKLNiYHHB0umpKSl6FXHFJExjwEiv5caZnxYDqYkXPOzS0HyL4FFL53Euu0eUw2Tl3vJznipuOBeHufCHYDpEDHcofmIVJw9D5niNsymlsnQBMV2XxPNFEX8GFPj6is1qzp4Me-eMALAwvVJzwcK0kr42eq0r92h_3FIho9VK_bKvCtoFBD-Icv0t2EfjqeuIrbSHQRNI697kcUjqAokgZRjFORPSDGVolxT6rlSEVs4d4bfrM58b3oaIZSZl_VTFzeggI_eq9DotvEEslEyfFPipaavmV3u5oN5ID3MuOaH0hE_jHR1HbW0AzK7QNM0FETz-fTUJQIgE3wNi30yRfJ8uSPtBAbUmVc7Ww-0nBu_T1Mu851Xutz2GDfNSm86PennB-cerjpNM8RuxEHwzKAgNQwKF1RoTK1lJVOOy4jblKkyA67X6Q-hmdpXPaq4DqRIvJt4ZIcH63CvJum0gPvvgjaA-n2xXj8KsxWbMTQINu-vdP-MK5_wfMsAKdFoPB6Y5IsvQJx3H_BxTVPWfXt2rarv_wkaqdJPk0_Rq6p5zcKTOBFQXE9_ybAId6E6nZvclO3-C5AOnrJr6Ttuhl5V9J941GRj4nDtg2regijIJ4aIo21QvcjVM6eBaOD2b0rGFSRk3MYwY7v60_Z-c_7bybfGCMuJaO9aPaeGZgYPslWrFKEdRhzhinUehpVZnhIMiSME3uARn4mM5o1UJFlWNNr5fxqZhKwO0jew%3D)

[**But momentum doesn’t appear out of thin air — it’s built.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a9b216d9817f4ab1ba5d7659e5a73b7d&_e=pTqdKLNiYHHB0umpKSl6FXHFJExjwEiv5caZnxYDqYkXPOzS0HyL4FFL53Euu0eUw2Tl3vJznipuOBeHufCHYDpEDHcofmIVJw9D5niNsymlsnQBMV2XxPNFEX8GFPj6is1qzp4Me-eMALAwvVJzwcK0kr42eq0r92h_3FIho9VK_bKvCtoFBD-Icv0t2EfjqeuIrbSHQRNI697kcUjqAokgZRjFORPSDGVolxT6rlSEVs4d4bfrM58b3oaIZSZlApedMydDOXro3DwGgwIRnzX-MVHfKGgmE1gwR4aDVUqhiZlER5t9I9GtIECiE0xcjDCOYfZZTxrytcZ5rtKUBNE5XZfvvYWkMSnchVIzHFA6yClJlaONJ9GCbIdAXkYGuG7a23JIvZtEHmzqApP8h4Cjuv5qcpCmmTocw26kKq3nuieD6I9gbVxfY-sJva-3-MESv2hJODLWyubicKuj4CQa4ILFHov_eLdN9uxhwEg4z3pei6qPrx4hLSLn_4ntOXGnFuVVQ7eUVgG7_DRsXcAuTG2okL-eLPSFs61C94qPxV-QsjNbJ6tImWvCtxgHfezfhff3WgzXfRRa2_Waqs4_CHl4vreJOEtE9PV5g7z29DuvARGl_CifNfborrfOyzQzEwAMu0zPWH03ZaiEcsHbJLFrwAB-Na3z7bntAcDmWrtYivw4bJyYI4ylHVz1piDD7772EedcTKJZmefzypbaeI2LXxPtwrpTPqy7C6U%3D)

clean_body: Polls like this don’t become reality because voters suddenly fall in love with Democrats. | Fellow patriot, A new NPR/PBS/Marist poll just came out, and the numbers aren’t subtle. Democrats: 55% ⬆ Republicans: 41% ⬇ That’s a 14-point gap on the 2026 congressional ballot — the biggest Democratic lead in nearly a decade. And independents? They’re breaking for Democrats by THIRTY-THREE points. Let’s stop pretending this is fine. It’s not. Democrats are treating this poll like a preview of their victory parade. They’ve convinced themselves 2026 is already decided — that Trump’s agenda will hit a wall, that our majority will crumble, and that Republicans will spend the next two years apologizing for even trying to govern. They’re wrong. But they won’t be wrong forever. Polls like this don’t become reality because voters suddenly fall in love with Democrats. They become reality when Republicans assume “someone else” will fix it. “Someone else will donate.” “Someone else will organize.” “Someone else will fight harder.” I’m in the Senate to change this trajectory, not watch it collapse in slow motion. And right now, I need you in that fight with me. For America, Bernie Moreno FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Brett Lindstrom
subject: Outside groups are targeting us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress
body:
Operatives are pouring money into Nebraska. We need to respond fast.
| | | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.-ig/s1k67849725)
---
| | Peter,
I need to alert you to something serious. National liberal groups are quietly moving huge amounts of outside money into Nebraska, and they’ve flagged **my race as a top target.** ****
Before I go further, please take a moment to help us push back:
---
[Counter outside interference →](https://link.win.lindstromforne.-ig/s5uec166327)
This is not a rumor. It’s already happening. These groups are using national donor networks to overwhelm local voters and tilt our election in their direction. They believe Nebraska won’t respond and that they can buy influence here without anyone pushing back.
We cannot let that happen.
If we don’t act quickly, their spending will drown out Nebraska voices and reshape the outcome of this race long before Election Day. Your support right now is the only way to match their influence.
Please step up if you can:
**[Fight back against outside groups →](https://link.win.lindstromforne.-ig/s9kabb738cc)**
We’ve set a goal of bringing in **500 supporters in the next 12 hours** to show that Nebraska grassroots won’t be pushed aside by national operatives. Every contribution moves us closer.
Nebraska elections must belong to Nebraskans. I’m counting on you to stand with me and protect the integrity of our race.
Thank you,
Brett Lindstrom
[STOP OUTSIDE INTERFERENCE HERE →](https://link.win.lindstromforne.-ig/s3v362c987a)
| | |

name: Chris Pappas
subject: 💇 They’re attacking my haircut
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
If this race is going to be won by a hair, then I’m ready.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3811%2E582294%2EEX4Pin)
We’ve said this race could be _won by a hair_ — but I didn’t expect Republicans to take that literally.
Do you remember back when **Governor Chris Sununu** (that’s right, my opponent’s brother) took to the airwaves to attack me? Not for my values or my record, but for... my haircut.
His exact words?
_“He needs a blow dryer and a little bit of hair gel... it’ll make a world of difference.”_
_**That’s what the GOP is focused on.** _Not on protecting our rights and communities. Not on lowering costs. **My hair.** If that’s the best they’ve got, it speaks volumes.
This race is about New Hampshire. Not hair gel. But the attacks have continued to come. And with corporate super PACs and national Republicans lining up to try to buy this seat, it’s a safe bet they’ll say or do anything if they think it will help them beat us.
**[Will you chip in $5 today to help us keep this Senate seat blue and focus on what really matters to Granite Staters?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251202_1_haircut.UbUK5s&refcode=em20251202-1&t=2&akid=3811%2E582294%2EEX4Pin)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251202_1_haircut.EWSl8P&amount=5&refcode=em20251202-1&t=21&akid=3811%2E582294%2EEX4Pin)**
Thanks for being in this fight with me.
With gratitude,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251202-1&t=22&refcode2=3811_582294_EX4Pin&akid=3811%2E582294%2EEX4Pin)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=3811%2E582294%2EEX4Pin)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3811%2E582294%2EEX4Pin)

name: Pat
subject: re: Question #3 -->
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
This is time-sensitive.
| | | Hey there -- it's Pat, the Research Director here at the DSCC. I'm following up on an email we sent a few days back: **Did you miss question 3 of my Trump approval survey?**

**Incomplete surveys may not be counted, and I want to make sure _your voice_ is heard. Please, before midnight, be sure to finalize your response.**

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Giving Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When you think of an organization you’d like to give to today, I hope you will consider choosing GIFFORDS PAC
#

Today is Giving Tuesday, the day Americans across the country give back by making donations to support causes they believe are making a difference.
**I know there are many worthy causes out there. But when you think of an organization you’d like to give to today, I hope you’ll consider choosing GIFFORDS PAC to support us in our ongoing efforts to end gun violence:**
**[DONATE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251202-1-b&t=1&akid=11079%2E3935704%2E0g7y57)**
While a lot of people might think it was my own shooting that inspired me to commit my life’s work to ending gun violence, that wasn’t the case. The shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut was the reason I decided to devote myself to this fight.
And while I was still in the midst of my own recovery, when I saw the unspeakable events of that day unfold, I was determined to take action. So my husband Mark and I founded GIFFORDS — known at the time as Americans for Responsible Solutions.
We have come such a long way since the first days of GIFFORDS nearly 13 years ago. Back then, most elected officials avoided talking about gun violence at all costs. It was considered too politically divisive.
Now, we have been able to bring gun safety to the forefront of the national conversation.
I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made, and I hope you are too. But we still have so much work ahead of us to make sure every person in our nation is safe from the threat of gun violence.
[**In honor of Giving Tuesday, I am personally asking you to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC. When we say that a majority of our fundraising comes from people like you donating to emails like these, we really mean it.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251202-1-b&t=2&akid=11079%2E3935704%2E0g7y57)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&amount=3&refcode=em251202-1-b&t=21&akid=11079%2E3935704%2E0g7y57)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-q42025.XBpxZs&refcode=em251202-1-b&t=22&akid=11079%2E3935704%2E0g7y57)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-q42025.bzPEeG&refcode=em251202-1-b&t=23&akid=11079%2E3935704%2E0g7y57)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-q42025.BnaACt&refcode=em251202-1-b&t=24&akid=11079%2E3935704%2E0g7y57)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-q42025.3xF0Vo&refcode=em251202-1-b&t=25&akid=11079%2E3935704%2E0g7y57)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&refcode=em251202-1-b&t=26&akid=11079%2E3935704%2E0g7y57)**
---
****
Thank you so much for all that you do for the movement to end gun violence.
My very best,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=11079%2E3935704%2E0g7y57) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: TOP Education Fund
subject: 📣 Help build a better Texas this Giving Tuesday! 📣
body:
https://topedfund.org/ [https://topedfund.org/]
Peter,
Texas Organizing Project Education Fund (TOPEF) is a c3 nonprofit that engages Black and Latino Texans on issues that impact our daily lives, working to strengthen communities and boost civic engagement.
That’s why we’re proud to participate in Giving Tuesday alongside other nonprofits also driving positive change and improving lives.
From hosting informative workshops for voters, to championing equitable policies at the local level, TOPEF’s on-the-ground efforts have been seen and felt across Texas for over 15 years .
CONTRIBUTE NOW to support TOP Education Fund this Giving Tuesday! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-education-fund-had?refcode=2022_11_29_giving_tuesday_button1]
Pushing for this positive change that directly impacts people in the neighborhoods we organize is possible because of your ongoing support.
CHIP IN to help us build a brighter future for ALL Texans! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-education-fund-had?refcode=2022_11_29_giving_tuesday_button1]
Together, let’s continue to hold true to our values, build on our successes, and shape our state into one where EVERY person – no matter their age, race, or background – can truly grow and thrive.
– Texas Organizing Project Education Fund
