name: Roy Cooper
subject: about Medicaid
body:
I need you to join me in the fight.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=84%2E124072%2E6DewBw)
Peter — Two years ago, we opened the path to get more than 690,000 North Carolinians access to the quality health care they deserve through Medicaid Expansion. I was proud to be the Governor who got to sign it into law. [ ](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2107?t=6&akid=84%2E124072%2E6DewBw) I can tell you that getting there wasn’t easy — it took nearly a decade of hard work and negotiation — **but it’s been a game-changer for this state, just like we knew it could be.** **[Peter, I fought like hell to get Medicaid Expansion done for North Carolina, and I’m ready to fight like hell to protect Medicaid for all Americans as the next Democratic Senator from North Carolina, but I need your help. Can you pitch in any amount today to send me to Washington?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2107?t=7&akid=84%2E124072%2E6DewBw)** Look, far-right Republicans passed an outrageous bill that guts Medicaid and gives a tax break to the wealthy. It’s the definition of greed. The most profound cuts are set to start taking effect in about a month — and we already know what will happen. Here in North Carolina and across the country, entire health care systems will be disrupted for _everybody,_ not just folks who use Medicaid. Rural hospitals will be especially hard hit, leaving entire communities in the lurch when they need care. **Unacceptable.** We proved that there’s a different path. A better choice. We proved that making Medicaid _more_ affordable and accessible makes things better for everyone. **We did it here, and we can do it for this country. I’m ready for the fight.** **[Join me and invest in our work. Pitch in what you can today.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2107?t=8&akid=84%2E124072%2E6DewBw)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2107?t=9&akid=84%2E124072%2E6DewBw)
---
Thanks,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2107?t=10&akid=84%2E124072%2E6DewBw)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=84%2E124072%2E6DewBw)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=84%2E124072%2E6DewBw)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=84%2E124072%2E6DewBw)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=84%2E124072%2E6DewBw)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=84%2E124072%2E6DewBw)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=11&akid=84%2E124072%2E6DewBw)

I can tell you that getting there wasn’t easy — it took nearly a decade of hard work and negotiation — but it’s been a game-changer for this state, just like we knew it could be. Look, far-right Republicans passed an outrageous bill that guts Medicaid and gives a tax break to the wealthy. It’s the definition of greed. The most profound cuts are set to start taking effect in about a month — and we already know what will happen. Here in North Carolina and across the country, entire health care systems will be disrupted for everybody, not just folks who use Medicaid. Rural hospitals will be especially hard hit, leaving entire communities in the lurch when they need care. Unacceptable. We proved that there’s a different path. A better choice. We proved that making Medicaid more affordable and accessible makes things better for everyone. We did it here, and we can do it for this country. I’m ready for the fight. | Thanks, Roy Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. ** mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper Victory Fund PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal. Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible. The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. name: Team Walz
subject: Donald Trump is coming for Minnesota
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
He’s doubling down on his disgusting attacks.
#
Peter,
In case you missed it, Donald Trump spent Thanksgiving attacking Governor Walz and Americans with disabilities.
[](https://act.timwalz.com/go/190?t=1&akid=214%2E34582%2EcVRUOZ)
He’s always been petty. This just isn’t the behavior of someone who’s focused on serving the American people. This is a President who’s unwell.
In Minnesota, we’ve shown that we can get big things done when we come together and build each other up, not tear each other down with childish insults.
We’re working every day to build the campaign we need to win this race and keep Minnesota moving forward. And nothing we do is possible without your support.
**[Will you chip in $5 right now to help us fight back and show that we can move forward, together, with a shared purpose of bringing Minnesota together?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251202.qtJsOy&amount=5&refcode=em20251202-214&t=2&akid=214%2E34582%2EcVRUOZ)**

Hi there, Coming out of the Thanksgiving holiday, I’ve been reflecting on all that we’ve accomplished together -- and I just wanted to say **thank you**. Because of you, we hit our November fundraising goal -- and we’re heading into the final month of the year with serious momentum. That’s no small thing in a race this competitive. This season is all about gratitude, and I’m deeply grateful for the movement we’re building together -- as neighbors, organizers, teachers, students, and working people who believe in something better for the Central Valley. clean_body: | = Hi there, Coming out of the Thanksgiving holiday, I’ve been reflecting on all that we’ve accomplished together -- and I just wanted to say thank you. Because of you, we hit our November fundraising goal -- and we’re heading into the final month of the year with serious momentum. That’s no small thing in a race this competitive. This season is all about gratitude, and I’m deeply grateful for the movement we’re building together -- as neighbors, organizers, teachers, students, and working people who believe in something better for the Central Valley. = Real people building real power. This campaign is powered by people like us. No corporate PACs. No billionaire donors. Just real people stepping up -- again and again -- to demand change. So folks, whether you =, signed up to , shared our posts on =, =, or , or talked to your friends and family about the stakes of this race -- thank you. We're building real power here. And I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on this team. Onward, Randy | | = | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

clean_body: The experts said it was impossible, but we are leading every Democrat and Republican in the polls. Now, we need to go on offense to protect our momentum. Peter, One by one, we are knocking down the milestones that the "experts" said were impossible for a Republican in California. THE MEDIA: The nation is watching. NBC, ABC, LA Times, and our friend Lara Trump are talking about the momentum we are seeing on the ground. THE VOTERS: People are rejecting the establishment (on both sides) and joining our grassroots movement. We have the momentum. We have the message. And right now, we have the lead. But I know that offense is the best defense. The cost of winning is that I am now everyone's target. The Democrats are going to come after me with everything they have. They want to shrink my lead before the Primary. I intend to widen it. I am not asking for money to "survive" their attacks; I am asking for the resources to dominate this race. Help me go on offense. Chip in any amount you can right now to help me expand this lead and flip our state. body:

**This may be our last message.**
They’ve come after us. **HARD**.
_The regime doesn’t want this getting out. _
But before they shut us down completely, we need to know:
[Are you with Trump? Are you with MAGA? Are you one of the true Patriots who still believe in this movement?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[YES - I'M STILL MAGA
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) _The clock is ticking. The censorship is real. The crackdown is here._
[ TAKE THE OFFICIAL MAGA ID POLL NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
This isn’t a game.
They’ve labeled us “the enemy.”
They’ve weaponized the system.
But they haven’t broken us.
If you’re reading this, you ARE the resistance.
Hold the line.
Stay in the fight.
And for President Trump’s sake – [TAKE THE POLL.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[TAKE THE MAGA ID SURVEY

body:
https://www.savetheredwoods.org [https://www.savetheredwoods.org]
https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1 [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
Peter,
I wanted to make sure you saw Tim’s email about Giving TREESday, one of the most inspiring days of the year for all of us at Save the Redwoods League.
When you give today, you’re doing more than protecting redwoods. You’re investing in long-term climate resilience, wildlife recovery, and stronger communities across the redwood range.
Your generosity fuels real progress. If you haven’t already, please take a moment to make your Giving TREESday gift before midnight.
The link to give is here. [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
Every donation will be tripled to help make sure the redwood forests and the people and wildlife who depend on them can weather any storm.
Photo of Georgia Young [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/STRWL/STRWL/1/89574/images/Georgia-Young%201.png] With thanks,

**New Dems are 20 of the 24 frontline members in Congress!** That means we're leading the charge to defend some of the most competitive seats in the country.

**We’ve endorsed candidates** – like Paige Cognetti in PA and JoAnna Mendoza in AZ – that will be key to flipping the House.

We’re running on an agenda that speaks to hardworking Americans – lowering costs, defending Social Security, and fighting for affordable healthcare

name: Chris Ahuja
subject: War-Crimes Allegations Demand a Response. Brad Sherman Gave None.
body:
We deserve better in Congress.

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=39f9319386&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | | Dear Peter,
**This week’s reports alleging Pete Hegseth’s involvement in possible war crimes are deeply troubling.** Congress has broad constitutional authority to oversee the executive branch. When credible allegations of war crimes emerge, Congress has both the power and the responsibility to demand accountability.**Brad Sherman sits on the House Foreign Affairs Committee (HFAC), overseeing international law, treaties, and human rights obligations — yet he said nothing.****No call for oversight.****No demand for transparency.****CA-32 deserves leadership that will act.** I will demand accountability, insist on oversight, and protect America’s moral standing in the world. It’s that leadership — and refusal to stay silent — that is energizing our campaign. **We are building the strongest challenge Brad Sherman has faced in decades.** His inaction over the years has motivated people across our district — and nationwide — to join our campaign and support real leadership in Congress for CA-32.[**Your donation fuels our rapid-response efforts, grassroots organizing, and coalition-building. Give $25, $50, or whatever you can.**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=81694d8666&e=5a6ee82cdb) CA-32 deserves a representative who takes action. Brad Sherman just stays silent. [**Join us in making a difference together and bring a new voice to CA-32,**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=c6c2a6bca3&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---

| |

**Let’s go!
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=a612988b0a&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja****Democrat for Congress, CA-32**

Folks, November has come to a wrap with the busy Thanksgiving holiday. But I wanted to pause and reach out to you about what we accomplished together. Folks, your grassroots support fuels our mission of **Bright Hope** , so I just want to say two words: **Thank you.** I am so grateful for everybody who has supported our campaign, whether it was donating from a text message, sharing our message, or simply opening this email. As tough as this is to hear, **we have a lot more progress left to make to fight back against an extremist MAGA agenda.** And the fight has just begun. name: Dawn Moore
subject: Standing up
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1006%2E1086043%2E2wIjbb)
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251202-1.p162CP&refcode=em-20251202-1&t=2&akid=1006%2E1086043%2E2wIjbb)**
Hi Peter, it’s Dawn, Gov. Moore’s wife and first lady of Maryland.
**_When I tell you Wes has our backs, I mean it._**
He cares deeply about all people — and he shows it every single day.
One of the things I love about my husband is that he will always stand up for others. **Literally.**
When we were on our first trip together, we missed a train and had to take the next one overnight. So that I could get some sleep, he let me have the only remaining seat on the train. And he slept STANDING UP.
That’s how I know he’ll be a fighter for Maryland — because he’ll stand up for all of us, Peter. Even when Washington makes it harder, Wes can stay in the fight with your support.
**[So Peter, are you with me? Can you support Wes with a $5 contribution to his reelection campaign today?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251202-1.p162CP&refcode=em-20251202-1&t=3&akid=1006%2E1086043%2E2wIjbb)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251202-1.p162CP&amount=5&refcode=em-20251202-1&t=22&akid=1006%2E1086043%2E2wIjbb)**
Thanks for everything that you do. It means the world to us, Peter.
With gratitude,
Dawn

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251202-1&t=23&refcode2=1006_1086043_2wIjbb&akid=1006%2E1086043%2E2wIjbb)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=1006%2E1086043%2E2wIjbb)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1006%2E1086043%2E2wIjbb)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Something’s weighing on my mind, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Your support keeps me going.
#
My opponent has been gaining on me in the polls. Far-right actors are attacking me online. National GOP groups are pouring money into NC to defeat me and our people-first campaign.
_This is all weighing on my mind, Peter._
I know we have a tough race ahead of us — the most competitive of my career. The coming months won’t be easy.
**But here’s what keeps me going:** We’ve earned financial support from tens of thousands of folks across the country. More than 90% of donors are giving $100 or less. Even more are sharing news of our campaign online.
Together, we’re building the momentum we need to win the most competitive U.S. Senate race in the nation. I’m deeply grateful to everyone who has joined us so far.
**[I’m asking for you to join our fight by splitting a contribution between our campaign and State Democrats Committee today. Would just $5 fit in your budget right away?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98358?refcode=em20251202-9790&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9790%2E614464%2EJs3XKU)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98358?refcode=em20251202-9790&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9790%2E614464%2EJs3XKU)**
I appreciate your strong support.
Roy Cooper

name: Charles Booker
subject: Do you agree with these three words?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hood to Holler, Inc, hoodtotheholler
body:
Here’s how I think about the health care premium debate | | | Hey, It’s Charles Booker. The big debate that caused the government shutdown was about bringing down the cost of health insurance premiums. And of course the people need relief with those ACA tax subsidies. But ultimately, relief is the floor, not the ceiling. This is not the debate that this moment calls for. Here’s how I think about this: Instead of just trying to make premiums more affordable, let’s get rid of them entirely. Let’s get rid of out-of-pocket costs. Let’s pass Medicare for All. [**Please, add your name if you agree that it’s time to renew the call for Medicare for All in America, including dental and vision care. And together, we will fight to make it a reality.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39e78s85V7jwo0U8rXtkHuTgAs-lfUCiz97BgYY6cS6bR8ktqvfseey3MGRNAgFuM_Ow3QViB9OCOGSHD3cOVYa8ie8J2d17NeSHAEE6KvmUgTUfj_b7f9XJecVv9RHHHOgMF7Kq2zWn8WdWhOww4XF7tCoEypbH-A8C3YAgqJYsPbrrXkQP32ibulySoksIKtehH-PTF_Y33kES5KFPY2TUkMHZKY0czLjaJA5N5OF_CtncPce7VKtMBMRZHchFaQSgwoRXolpsbGHfSl7_Xv0vfC41hOihuGQqzOkgy6jW_CLvVMYJAS9o1lepHDxfgA/4m3/O7WbxEz0Q-SBgYAzoZm0RQ/h0/h001.ZhvlsskR-SCNEYCx0iBOzHphqEl_TK5oaEVkN-MizQw) It is a damn shame that we still don’t have universal healthcare in the United States of America. As a country, we pay twice as much for our healthcare as any other industrialized nation. The current system is expensive, wasteful, and only serves to line the pockets of Big Pharma and for-profit insurance companies — it’s got to go. This is personal for me, just like I know it’s personal for families across the country. As a Type 1 diabetic, I rely on insulin to stay alive. But years ago, I had to ration my care, choosing to use my last dollars to feed my daughters instead of getting my expensive insulin. As a result, I nearly died of diabetic ketoacidosis. The doctors told my family it didn’t look like I was going to make it. I didn’t even have the strength to lift my arms from the hospital bed and give my daughters what could have been my last hug. [**Not having enough money for medicine should not be a death sentence. Healthcare is a human right, and that’s why I fight for Medicare for All. Add your name if you’re in this fight, too.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39e78s85V7jwo0U8rXtkHuTgAs-lfUCiz97BgYY6cS6bR8ktqvfseey3MGRNAgFuM-CnskIatASFwtfomafrGCrnFLoDbSgulfLYaSkVyvHhFBfbjtmJM8vOLrSjhsimgQAH-okFPM1nx-d0eq6faRNRyh3rpNreIyIBsxQ0zhl0khc3FXMBN8uXx8Eu5eBVaNdVv5s4A3gfVMQHPG0Vo5uCcxSju2bjUuNfwBL9GveCkucjlFtxAJGmhnWWsfeVNiji1jrxMZKvnca9U8fDW9pix6kd0qWXorOopBVEgeJAawH5zuNU5CGyrDehlAEpTA/4m3/O7WbxEz0Q-SBgYAzoZm0RQ/h1/h001.6fWbPsqhxf9wa5ctJdFgmORMqnG6TeYy877rfHGOIBw) Thank you, Charles | | Paid for by Hood to Holler, Inc, hoodtotheholler.org, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
---
| | Sent via [ActionNetwork.org](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.vJH41MPG4bgUd6h6NGKFpj-Lrvy5aFcFyt94Rovp4kU/4m3/O7WbxEz0Q-SBgYAzoZm0RQ/h2/h001.pHkI7eqaqcgb-kk9s9zbsptHYYnOlhqlz6Og_5IKxvE). Fellow Conservative,

The SEAL creed begins: _**“I do not advertise the nature of my work, nor seek recognition for my actions.”**_

I’ve lived that line since the day I was pinned with my trident after graduating from BUDS.

Three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman.

**Six more deployments as a SEAL officer—Middle East, Pacific, and Africa. 70+ countries.**

Places that don’t make the evening news.

I never needed a megaphone.

I needed a plan, a team, and the discipline to execute when lives were at stake.

Minnesota needs the same quiet professionalism in the Senate. That’s why I’ve tossed my hat in the ring,_**in hopes of becoming the Republican nominee in what is shaping up to be Minnesota’s closest Senate race in a generation.

_[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ad783a3f11e94886b9dc90f912cceae8&_e=LWsrq0DQafiMUpu1gDcXoFfpb99M79NV9FD_gh7sCA6jbme5bh79Ejzw1M4xyGrJ-JWk1J2x94TddKbaUR2I0cdm1haKbO0wBnOX-fzp5tB8BWP7gm-CH2DVGKRtSwFfbrNYs5L2Ed_f9ZIUw4z90cNxlywZfGfTVz5_dRKtSMXzukmgcNPq3XQ9q-pioqcAKSYtNGrqOUe4k6nxQ4x345Lx4JOZtYZgeLkKqqIJ5p0NJrTSmNXCfi9vdS-J4HkJYNKtaNxmJtUnmJNP8UHvTMz6iRcWpNxqJomTNNGXqfdGuBKbAZuw2RPfH29kEy08kncYmH-QlkAWmRnUbNUQ5G9uR6Tyi1wEhuKn82pBC5Gwbkn2XBFcCs9SWhxlfmhG-zKZCOhiUTtayD6ENXWtcgWL1f9ZBpWa-4r1QuxwhzhSaGH8C23CNbgCtiPVg8PV27i_yLrJ1E6CtV9nEX1yXhUsojhoCewWCONBHATAPb8yniLnP1OD_ZwiXZKvgqgmkteWbp_UdumcNiIslZVfnsPWgddxgR6U-jH3EWjBvmwBehpWAHuGWdLSJIf38K7SvushivJDrW2Dki30rQE-JUYcb7QzKVSFGBsWR8ux0hbq_U8NW2i6NMfJ05SWUgXD63cfNqscWUeh9nHPGoWuqxoqWu8-8v-JjMEHEgO-_xOzCJ0ulKqYgQIGE9pg7KCA9K8mhozZnVyT873UcM1NYP5aaZ-xHKtQfr6miOkmFPRZL9LlST3jtVgpLQhN1i2F)_
**_ [**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ad783a3f11e94886b9dc90f912cceae8&_e=LWsrq0DQafiMUpu1gDcXoFfpb99M79NV9FD_gh7sCA6jbme5bh79Ejzw1M4xyGrJ-JWk1J2x94TddKbaUR2I0cdm1haKbO0wBnOX-fzp5tB8BWP7gm-CH2DVGKRtSwFfbrNYs5L2Ed_f9ZIUw4z90cNxlywZfGfTVz5_dRKtSMXzukmgcNPq3XQ9q-pioqcAKSYtNGrqOUe4k6nxQ4x345Lx4JOZtYZgeLkKqqIJ5p0NJrTSmNXCfi9vdS-J4HkJYNKtaNxmJtUnmJNP8UHvTOST0-p1JS6kpbR7f9AGffBoO5p2BdwF_pViblS4U4nVCNr7Vu3MQZmwIgJRK3_WGKuj8C_6Pe4_2Et7Emkyr-NmfWSDvV7GKQmFG-AAEDbKdpvK6gTZgGU54IHFEd21lREO_zALkO8j1WbB-VYMX6gk5ShLF4Olltt4so4zFtmhJy5rvXfNhhyZnpahXIhMub8AapTY7e18wvjKG3CssshUqxSS_Ea6Ux9mT-eSzVfH6VBiUy0I-fVUhx9IAotqrD7gsXvJ9xki1hRP84jj7dNbgyygAhalpAADxcxy8Vk7SOfqA0GuRxidYSrIiPrRJSWtrn6nQncw11eRs8t9hG9L1lPXREfL1BEYCLjkevLAhTnw6PwMBDuYLIdLIsgI9gxHzI5gimi6qBUb3OjlfiB1G0mNtUCfe8edzFhVOoUF4C74AOF0gzfXYxfkwEaPPZXGQkqshQnOd7_skAFPqUA-WOWRmbriq9b7nUip3I0o)

_**While career politicians scream on cable news, carjackings in Minneapolis are up 74% since 2020.**_

Rural hospitals in Greater Minnesota are closing.

**Illegal immigrants with rap sheets walk free because Walz-Flanagan and Ilhan Omar sued to gut ICE detention.**

My opponent’s loudest moment?

Filing lawsuits against police while businesses burned. I’m bewildered why anyone would put their future in the hands of left-wing lunatics with no real-world experience, yet here we are.

Just this past week, **Bernie Sanders endorsed Peggy Flanagan for U.S. Senate in hopes of adding to his cabal of progressive stalwarts who will never compromise and don’t understand on any level that socialism doesn’t work.**

I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, Minnesotan.

I don’t advertise. I deliver.

The left’s own poll shows a generic Republican within 2 points of flipping this seat Republican.

_**That’s the closest any race for this seat has been in over 17 years.**_

**The national GOP is watching.**

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ad783a3f11e94886b9dc90f912cceae8&_e=LWsrq0DQafiMUpu1gDcXoFfpb99M79NV9FD_gh7sCA6jbme5bh79Ejzw1M4xyGrJ-JWk1J2x94TddKbaUR2I0cdm1haKbO0wBnOX-fzp5tB8BWP7gm-CH2DVGKRtSwFfbrNYs5L2Ed_f9ZIUw4z90cNxlywZfGfTVz5_dRKtSMXzukmgcNPq3XQ9q-pioqcAKSYtNGrqOUe4k6nxQ4x345Lx4JOZtYZgeLkKqqIJ5p0NJrTSmNXCfi9vdS-J4HkJYNKtaNxmJtUnmJNP8UHvTCF1gKD81nFtOpVciiO4XdtTjvyWJ-dxvGm44icGrgBfY11q1Bobwy-CdVJsSXQx9k51r_H46i37z55Y3cHkts_oVOp8s3nHROXUT4MQvScgb0rNjhAaxQAyPFravwNib416CAcHw2cG6VAEWZv4u7ZA2QpnDSkpWm8XfMmQWXc_ZhyEezF04Ky4ylt_ZyTpiWK9DQ6a48gZ4XHL6ZcGNNu2QdP3AAQai1dGYf6iFCQj9qmblfDG6a23dflu-HtWsVgDJmiESe-xYeYgq8T4JbSyfemWmrh1ZoZajgT32OGolyJeVQyHYOUCYk4FOEoMM7RjacINONsBPT54fLDMmUr1nNnujIQF0iic_vE5T3TrhQxvUwRkg1ATRmSRkWK9V1NFDqB-SFNbjAuXq8BFfZrkBmMRja66dknPmM6T7sKtgr8ZfFlyF9pbeiR0iTXjFx0Hzi4NTAiEAfQEMTZrEOy7ZKffSzZJZImYl6-ViWsH)

Just this past week,_**Bernie Sanders endorsed Peggy Flanagan for U.S. Senate in hopes of adding to his cabal of progressive stalwarts who will never compromise and don’t understand on any level that socialism doesn’t work**_.

That’s where you come in. Unlike the progressive darling I’m running against, _**I don’t have any famous backers supporting my campaign, just a hope and a wish that conservative patriots like yourself will see this note and find that I’m worth investing in.**_

clean_body: The SEAL creed begins: “I do not advertise the nature of my work, nor seek recognition for my actions.” | Fellow Conservative, The SEAL creed begins: “I do not advertise the nature of my work, nor seek recognition for my actions.” I’ve lived that line since the day I was pinned with my trident after graduating from BUDS. Three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman. Six more deployments as a SEAL officer—Middle East, Pacific, and Africa. 70+ countries. Places that don’t make the evening news. I never needed a megaphone. I needed a plan, a team, and the discipline to execute when lives were at stake. Minnesota needs the same quiet professionalism in the Senate. That’s why I’ve tossed my hat in the ring,in hopes of becoming the Republican nominee in what is shaping up to be Minnesota’s closest Senate race in a generation. While career politicians scream on cable news, carjackings in Minneapolis are up 74% since 2020. Rural hospitals in Greater Minnesota are closing. Illegal immigrants with rap sheets walk free because Walz-Flanagan and Ilhan Omar sued to gut ICE detention. My opponent’s loudest moment? Filing lawsuits against police while businesses burned. I’m bewildered why anyone would put their future in the hands of left-wing lunatics with no real-world experience, yet here we are. Just this past week, Bernie Sanders endorsed Peggy Flanagan for U.S. Senate in hopes of adding to his cabal of progressive stalwarts who will never compromise and don’t understand on any level that socialism doesn’t work. I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, Minnesotan. I don’t advertise. I deliver. The left’s own poll shows a generic Republican within 2 points of flipping this seat Republican. That’s the closest any race for this seat has been in over 17 years. The national GOP is watching. My socialist opponent’s record? Filing lawsuits against police while businesses burned. I’m bewildered why anyone would put their future in the hands of left-wing lunatics with no real-world experience, yet here we are. Just this past week,Bernie Sanders endorsed Peggy Flanagan for U.S. Senate in hopes of adding to his cabal of progressive stalwarts who will never compromise and don’t understand on any level that socialism doesn’t work. That’s where you come in. Unlike the progressive darling I’m running against, I don’t have any famous backers supporting my campaign, just a hope and a wish that conservative patriots like yourself will see this note and find that I’m worth investing in. Every dollar proves Minnesota is ready for results, not noise. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan P.S: Deterrence works when your adversary believes you’ll act. China believes me. Bernie fears me. FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/2/2025
body:
Fort Collins event connects youth gender care concerns to upcoming Colorado ballot measures
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** The state [paused all new CDLs for non-citizens](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after new federal restrictions, launching an audit that leaves 1,745 temporary-status drivers in limbo. Sen. Michael Bennet faced fresh [campaign-finance complaints](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) alleging improper expense-sharing and undisclosed travel. Colorado also joined 21 states[ suing the USDA over SNAP rules](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) they say wrongly cut lawful permanent residents off from food benefits. And a Fort Collins Protect Kids Colorado forum warned of a “classroom-to-clinic pipeline,” [spotlighting youth gender-medical concerns](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and previewing three proposed 2026 ballot measures.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** Nationally, Trump’s fast-moving agenda clashed with a slow-moving Congress: more than 200 executive orders issued, [only 28 codified](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). At COP30, global climate commitments [continued to crumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as major nations pulled back amid soaring energy costs. A new study revealing over [5,000 liquor and smoke shops approved to accept SNAP](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) triggered USDA reforms over fraud concerns. And Americans defied expectations with a [record-breaking $11.8 billion in Black Friday online spending](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, December 2, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Fort Collins event connects youth gender care concerns to upcoming Colorado ballot measures](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
“Is it really true that when a confused hurting kid goes to the doctor the doctor turns the knife around and puts it on them and profits from it,” Colorado physician Dr. Travis Morrell asked a Fort Collins audience on November 20. “It is true.”
His remarks were part of From Heartbreak to Hope, an event hosted by Protect Kids Colorado at Dayspring Christian Church that brought together parents, detransitioners, attorneys and policy experts to examine what speakers called a growing collision between gender medicine and parental rights in Colorado.
Protect Kids Colorado Executive Director Erin Lee opened the evening by describing her family’s experience inside a Northern Colorado school. She said her daughter was pulled into what she called “the classroom to clinic pipeline,” beginning with “pornography disguised as lessons” and moving into a secret social transition conducted without parental knowledge.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado Audits 1,745 Immigrant CDL Holders After New Federal Restrictions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Colorado halts immigrant CDLs after new Trump rules:** Following federal action to tighten commercial-license eligibility, the state paused all new and renewal CDLs for non-citizens, including refugees, asylum seekers, and DACA recipients.
* **State audit finds 1,745 CDLs held by immigrants with temporary status:** Colorado confirmed the number of active licenses issued to drivers without permanent legal residency as it reviews compliance with federal safety and security standards.
* **Move follows national safety concerns after deadly crash:** The federal crackdown was triggered by a fatal incident involving a commercial driver who made an illegal U-turn, prompting states to reassess who should be cleared to operate heavy trucks on public roads.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Allegations of Improper Spending Mount Against Bennet Campaign](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Bennet hit with three campaign-finance complaints:** Filed in September and November, the complaints accuse Sen. Michael Bennet of improper fundraising and spending tied to his 2026 governor bid.
* **Senate funds used to boost governor run:** Complaints say Bennet raised and spent money simultaneously for his 2028 Senate race and 2026 gubernatorial bid, with Senate travel and staffing costs allegedly covering governor-campaign activities.
* **Travel spending raises red flags:** A California fundraiser showed no governor-campaign travel disclosures, while Bennet’s Senate committee logged 92 travel expenses—suggesting undisclosed or improperly shared costs in violation of state law.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**Standing Firm — The Full Armor of God**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 30** _There’s a moment in every spiritual battle when you realize that the goal isn’t to fight harder—it’s to stand stronger. When Paul wrote, “after you have done everything, to stand,” he wasn’t calling for passive endurance; he was calling for a posture of steadfast faith, hope, and perseverance— anchored, alert, and armored in Christ. Your faith is the rock on which you stand, unwavering and secure._
__
[**Jason Crow Is Playing With Fire — And Colorado Should Be Asking Why**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY HEIDI GANAHL | NATIONAL | NOVEMBER 28** _When a sitting United States Congressman tells the military to prepare to disobey orders, that’s not politics. That’s not oversight. That is the first brick in the road to a color revolution — and Colorado’s own Jason Crow is laying it proudly._
__
[**Colorado’s clash with federal law: Why Tina Peters’ case poses a Supreme Court question**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 28** _What began as a state prosecution of former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters now sits at the junction of presidential pardon pertaining to federal election law and state authority. Colorado barred key evidence from the jury, sealed portions of the grand jury record, then fought to keep those materials from appellate review._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](submit@rockymountainvoice.com).

---
🤔**DID YOU KNOW?** **Jamestown, Virginia** was the first permanent English settlement in America.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**

---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Every step we take towards making the State our Caretaker of our lives, by that much we move toward making the State our Master." – Dwight D. Eisenhower

Colorado barred key evidence from the jury, sealed portions of the grand jury record, then fought to keep those materials from appellate review. __ Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share? Email submit@rockymountainvoice.com. | | 🤔DID YOU KNOW? Jamestown, Virginia was the first permanent English settlement in America. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "Every step we take towards making the State our Caretaker of our lives, by that much we move toward making the State our Master." – Dwight D. name: Shocking
subject: Trump calls for execution of Democrats
body:
He’s completely lost his mind.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UnylPebicA8rrVAGxKmXd-UXKUPqhDSRk45_5uYRl7hIJ-PI6f2BURCHFX934uPnCT6gdA4hCVl_SdzaMc1v8uT4RGFvCnTJETxEFEtmTFbX7dHJq99cWnAb7ZTbxLRUTw5jscNOTEWIUGslBzQjOZdymfgYfbe3UNQAw4yPqbJobS-pjj0JFGybrg5tfHQCZamU-f1h38i4v-trtAVzMW-TlXSapT1M&c=uniyZwF-2QvTXmt16awnNP-Ww5BKODnAfh_Yr2u1fZPKamEWwiofcw==&ch=3jKnqKgN-bRhbpkHc3XwpBSa61Fe8YIGb4ghDsuZHp8kvtLu29ln6Q==)
---
|
Peter,
Donald Trump crossed a line he can't walk back--openly calling for elected Democrats to be executed for urging our soldiers to reject illegal orders he might try to give.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UnylPebicA8rrVAGxKmXd-UXKUPqhDSRk45_5uYRl7hIJ-PI6f2BURCHFX934uPnCT6gdA4hCVl_SdzaMc1v8uT4RGFvCnTJETxEFEtmTFbX7dHJq99cWnAb7ZTbxLRUTw5jscNOTEWIUGslBzQjOZdymfgYfbe3UNQAw4yPqbJobS-pjj0JFGybrg5tfHQCZamU-f1h38i4v-trtAVzMdSA3UF6J4wj&c=uniyZwF-2QvTXmt16awnNP-Ww5BKODnAfh_Yr2u1fZPKamEWwiofcw==&ch=3jKnqKgN-bRhbpkHc3XwpBSa61Fe8YIGb4ghDsuZHp8kvtLu29ln6Q==)
---
| This isn't new. Ever since he came down the escalator in 2015, Trump has unleashed violence, hate, and chaos in our politics. He has demanded that Democrats be arrested, silenced, and destroyed for standing up to him. And every time he does it, he pours gasoline onto the fire of political violence already sweeping this county.
And I've experienced it firsthand. Every day, my social media feed is flooded with violent and racist threats. I was tear gassed and hit with a car by Trump's personal gestapo, ICE, at a peaceful protest in Broadview. I've watched Black and brown families kidnapped off the street of my neighborhood with no due process.
This is Trump's America and he's only striving to make it more violent.
Trump is unraveling before our eyes--angry, erratic, possibly dementia-raddled, and cornered by a collapsing economy. Just look at his ties to pedophile and human trafficker Jeffrey Epstein. Look at the overwhelming blowback he's received from the violence ICE is unleashing on our communities. He's completely lost his mind.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UnylPebicA8rrVAGxKmXd-UXKUPqhDSRk45_5uYRl7hIJ-PI6f2BURCHFX934uPnCT6gdA4hCVl_SdzaMc1v8uT4RGFvCnTJETxEFEtmTFbX7dHJq99cWnAb7ZTbxLRUTw5jscNOTEWIUGslBzQjOZdymfgYfbe3UNQAw4yPqbJobS-pjj0JFGybrg5tfHQCZamU-f1h38i4v-trtAVzMaj6Gea00VRI&c=uniyZwF-2QvTXmt16awnNP-Ww5BKODnAfh_Yr2u1fZPKamEWwiofcw==&ch=3jKnqKgN-bRhbpkHc3XwpBSa61Fe8YIGb4ghDsuZHp8kvtLu29ln6Q==)
---
| Democrats cannot meet this moment with timidity. We need fighters willing to confront Trump's fascism head-on--before more blood is shed. That's the fight I'm taking to Congress as the next representative for IL-9. If you're with me, I need your support today:
[Can you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us stop Trump's violent movement and defend our Democracy?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UnylPebicA8rrVAGxKmXd-UXKUPqhDSRk45_5uYRl7hIJ-PI6f2BURCHFX934uPnqEuNW8BfFkr0qPwd7XwXLmKpqdqw85hVcL7W167R29nFoIMLcRvY6FysOpYelHVqzRZUl_cbWmZ3VwC8U-wsT2HjlL3o__S83WpvJwSyn7H3w52IRkPgGigdZ3660Z1ksrJKvDaEe4bL4m7PuKr7tznRxD0kPfYw0_xCZ6xzaNRew8QYnvl3cQ==&c=uniyZwF-2QvTXmt16awnNP-Ww5BKODnAfh_Yr2u1fZPKamEWwiofcw==&ch=3jKnqKgN-bRhbpkHc3XwpBSa61Fe8YIGb4ghDsuZHp8kvtLu29ln6Q==)

Right now, this is the most important district in the entire country in the battle for the House majority.

| |

It’s Frank Mrvan and I need to share an urgent update with you. **Over the holiday weekend, Indiana Republicans caved to Donald Trump, announcing their intention to vote on mid-decade redistricting in Indiana.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120462619/586355759/-1863517620?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.02_Mrvan-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNiMDUxOGMtYmVjZi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9oCPoUjgbqQ16yOzTGHxKkIrVB6go2kZ5c08kctjZxM=) They’ll head to a special session to vote on their new proposed gerrymandered map which would make Indiana’s 1st Congressional District R+12. Take a look: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120462620/586355760/-1863517620?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.02_Mrvan-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNiMDUxOGMtYmVjZi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9oCPoUjgbqQ16yOzTGHxKkIrVB6go2kZ5c08kctjZxM=) I wish I could tell you exactly what will happen next. The truth is, right now, it feels like a coin flip. I can’t say with certainty which way things will go, but I do know this: **every bit of support we can rally in the next crucial days will make a real, measurable difference for Indiana.** We’ve already seen the power of this team. Thanks to your support, we’ve been able to put significant pressure on the GOP’s special session, slow their momentum, and make our voices heard. **But this fight is far from over.** The coming days are critical, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Every ounce of energy, every phone call, every contribution helps keep the pressure on and hold the line. **Right now, Indiana’s 1st Congressional District is the most important in the entire country in the battle for the House majority.** **[Because of the incredible support of this team, we’ve put major pressure on the GOP’s special session — but this is the most important moment of this yet. With all that said, can you split a donation of $5 or any amount between my campaign and Marlene Galán-Woods' before midnight to help us continue to hold the line in these critical days?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120462621/586355761/-1863517620?amount=5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.02_Mrvan-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNiMDUxOGMtYmVjZi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9oCPoUjgbqQ16yOzTGHxKkIrVB6go2kZ5c08kctjZxM=)** | If you’ve saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your split contribution between Frank Mrvan and Marlene Galán-Woods will be processed immediately:

clean_body: Right now, this is the most important district in the entire country in the battle for the House majority. | | It’s Frank Mrvan and I need to share an urgent update with you. Over the holiday weekend, Indiana Republicans caved to Donald Trump, announcing their intention to vote on mid-decade redistricting in Indiana. = They’ll head to a special session to vote on their new proposed gerrymandered map which would make Indiana’s 1st Congressional District R+12. Take a look: = I wish I could tell you exactly what will happen next. The truth is, right now, it feels like a coin flip. I can’t say with certainty which way things will go, but I do know this: every bit of support we can rally in the next crucial days will make a real, measurable difference for Indiana. We’ve already seen the power of this team. Thanks to your support, we’ve been able to put significant pressure on the GOP’s special session, slow their momentum, and make our voices heard. But this fight is far from over. The coming days are critical, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Every ounce of energy, every phone call, every contribution helps keep the pressure on and hold the line. Right now, Indiana’s 1st Congressional District is the most important in the entire country in the battle for the House majority. = | If you’ve saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your split contribution between Frank Mrvan and Marlene Galán-Woods will be processed immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = I can’t thank you enough for all your support. Frank Mrvan | To learn more about Marlene, visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. name: Stop MAGA
subject: The plot to rig the 2026 midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ngi7AUE6KR5Tud8xSZAx6yR5oij6cehvxHEp__RuHxFsRMJx1l1fxjHxg82EY6k1pw0knLTcG8cH4Z2df3K_BRbNgKsnASgzy4UeNWf93yjVgGKstWGkSqAeTlHAsrXK3Nqp_AAb63kXAkctnQoTxrrP0fJtr1Krwv2zAuJXcH573XqJR9BfAcb97Ye4J4U7Z61L81RdGNw-T6bhzwDKuVNxuCOdgPrf&c=GCtjVOwpyLEloxladrtzwTncraB5UnB2GnmDIXxWZE-QNiflZQ4Ihg==&ch=LLZNmYPKbMD4hy_Al9Y7D4kO7pzllMdZAtFAaMwn5LUdjls7dqh1ag==)
---
| Peter,
Soldiers are in our streets. ICE is kidnapping our neighbors from their homes. Grocery prices are skyrocketing, healthcare costs have spiraled out of control, and our economy sits at the brink of collapse.
The first year of Trump's presidency has been a disaster and Americans are pissed.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ngi7AUE6KR5Tud8xSZAx6yR5oij6cehvxHEp__RuHxFsRMJx1l1fxjHxg82EY6k1pw0knLTcG8cH4Z2df3K_BRbNgKsnASgzy4UeNWf93yjVgGKstWGkSqAeTlHAsrXK3Nqp_AAb63kXAkctnQoTxrrP0fJtr1Krwv2zAuJXcH573XqJR9BfAcb97Ye4J4U7Z61L81RdGNx3p06u6KjoBff3yyt0XoGW&c=GCtjVOwpyLEloxladrtzwTncraB5UnB2GnmDIXxWZE-QNiflZQ4Ihg==&ch=LLZNmYPKbMD4hy_Al9Y7D4kO7pzllMdZAtFAaMwn5LUdjls7dqh1ag==)
---
Meanwhile, Trump couldn't care less--he's throwing lavish Great Gatsby-themed parties for the elite at Mar-a-Lago, demolishing the East Wing to erect a ballroom in his name, and even remodeling the White House in gaudy, gold-plated decor.
Despite historic unpopularity and massive losses in elections across the country in November, Trump continues to practically mock Americans.
He sees the polls. He hears the backlash. But he isn't fazed. That's because Trump and MAGA are planning to cheat to keep their stranglehold on power, the will of the people be damned.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ngi7AUE6KR5Tud8xSZAx6yR5oij6cehvxHEp__RuHxFsRMJx1l1fxjHxg82EY6k1pw0knLTcG8cH4Z2df3K_BRbNgKsnASgzy4UeNWf93yjVgGKstWGkSqAeTlHAsrXK3Nqp_AAb63kXAkctnQoTxrrP0fJtr1Krwv2zAuJXcH573XqJR9BfAcb97Ye4J4U7Z61L81RdGNy_KxMuDicaXWNS9vXE77j_&c=GCtjVOwpyLEloxladrtzwTncraB5UnB2GnmDIXxWZE-QNiflZQ4Ihg==&ch=LLZNmYPKbMD4hy_Al9Y7D4kO7pzllMdZAtFAaMwn5LUdjls7dqh1ag==)
---

Trump's plot to rig 2026 is already in motion. Gerrymandered maps have now passed in Texas, North Carolina, and Missouri to lock in GOP control, and a push for redistricting is currently underway in Indiana and Florida with more red states soon to follow.
Last month, California voters approved a ballot measure to fight fire with fire, countering the GOP's schemes. But that math alone isn't enough to overcome the red-state onslaught.
That is where Fair Fight Colorado comes in: we are launching the ballot measure that will give every Coloradan a chance to vote on a new Congressional map to level the playing field and protect our democracy.
We have the power to stop Trump's power grab, but we need to move fast.
Getting this on the ballot requires an astronomically expensive push for signatures and a statewide campaign to combat the lies MAGA is about to spew. They will throw everything they have at stopping us because they know this map is the firewall against their permanent majority.
[We need you in this fight with us: will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us fight fire with fire?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ngi7AUE6KR5Tud8xSZAx6yR5oij6cehvxHEp__RuHxFsRMJx1l1fxjHxg82EY6k1UXPiS95q9AQCCpF0Mekp9BXFRVB4jsQPUXMAflo5I48IUL0of9SkiDkon5yMnoM7TlDDy4xvzNrduJ9M_rpKnRaMcXIUGnbbKasr9L91CRzzD-V5xC648iOyBvtMhBucjxjbuK3HYJJC3CCS34b-oOrYViVeRgcXnv_gGwcW39Y=&c=GCtjVOwpyLEloxladrtzwTncraB5UnB2GnmDIXxWZE-QNiflZQ4Ihg==&ch=LLZNmYPKbMD4hy_Al9Y7D4kO7pzllMdZAtFAaMwn5LUdjls7dqh1ag==)

name: Marialana
subject: FLIP FL-7 FOR FREE
body:
No donation needed. Join me this weekend!

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kinterforcongress.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f6a723b5c3bc1add1f7a8ca4d&id=606769abb5&e=d995135712)
| |
## Help flip FL-7 for FREE!
---
| |

Are you ready to flip Florida's 7th District and send a representative to Washington who actually fights for you?

We have two powerful, **FREE** ways for you to help get Cory Mills out of office this very weekend.

**1\. SATURDAY (12/6): Petition at the "Save Health Care" Rally** Join us to gather critical petition signatures while standing up for affordable healthcare. This is exactly the kind of "Community First" advocacy our campaign is built on.

* **Time:** 10:30 AM – 1:00 PM
* **Location:** Meet at Colonial Town Park Shopping Center, 7025 County Road 46A, Lake Mary, FL

**2\. SUNDAY (12/7): Joint Canvass with Seminole County Dems** We are teaming up with the Seminole County Democratic Party to hit the streets!
* **Time:** 12:00 PM – 2:00 PM
* **Location:** Available upon RSVP

**Reply directly to this email if you are interested in joining us for either (or both!) events. Tell me what size shirt you wear for a Kinter For Congress T-shirt for petitioning!**
**We will provide all the materials, training, and support you need.**

---
| |
### **Why petition?**
---
| |

There are two methods to gain ballot access in Florida, collect petitions or pay $10,440 dollars to the state. I will always prefer to invest that money back TO YOU, through food drives, clothing drives, and mutual aid events to uplift our working families and communities.
---
| |
So join me in collecting petitions, and fighting for a better Florida for Floridians.
**In Solidarity,****Marialana Kinter**

---
|
---
| |

Everything you've just read is a direct result of our grassroots supporters. If you're inspired by what we've built, please consider making a contribution today to help us keep this movement growing.

---
| [DONATE NOW](https://kinterforcongress.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f6a723b5c3bc1add1f7a8ca4d&id=5df147db5b&e=d995135712)

## Together, I know we can rebuild our future.

#

Peter, We’re just a few weeks away from 2026 — a critical midterm election year where we have the opportunity to elect a Democratic Senate majority that will stand up to Donald Trump and fight for working families. But before we get there, we’re facing our last end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2025 at the end of this month. When our numbers are released to the public in January, reporters, pundits, and our opponents will look to see who has grassroots support behind them. **We’re counting on you to help us show them we have the momentum on our side.** Mazie and her Democratic colleagues are fighting every day to defend people’s health care, ensure families can afford to put food on the table, hold Trump accountable, and so much more. Republicans are taking the opposite approach, working to deliver for billionaires at the expense of hardworking people and doing whatever it takes to protect Donald Trump — **which is why we need to vote them out.** **[A surge of grassroots contributions before our end-of-year deadline will make a difference and help show our strength as we enter the election year, and with all that’s at stake, we can’t afford to let this opportunity pass us by. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: A man cruising down the highway — hands nowhere near the wheel — just chilling with his laptop.| | | | December 02 | | | | | Tesla Self-Driving Footage Stunned Everyone | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. A man cruising down the highway — hands nowhere near the wheel — just chilling with his laptop. No driver. No fear. Just confidence. And then... how I see technology’s next phase. You have to see this for yourself before it disappears. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. _"MARGIN-OF-ERROR RACE"_**
Peter,
**A brand new poll just broke. We're up – _barely._**

**This poll shows this is a margin-of-error race, and we must kick things into overdrive.**

_That means laying out the stakes, right now._

**I've talked a lot about my story and priorities, but now I must spend a moment explaining my opponent Aftyn Behn's record of complete left-wing lunacy.**
