* * *
* * *
### The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication
### Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism
[Support What We Do](https://substack.com/redirect/a8c1ed51-81ee-496d-8b92-e63ecb588870?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
As the cofounder of The Policy Circle, I've convened roundtables around the country -- with educators, parents, business leaders, and women from all walks of life -- to explore what truly prepares someone to thrive.
One word keeps coming up: _**[literacy](https://substack.com/redirect/d94080a9-188a-45f3-8ee2-e858c1d473f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_.
Not just the ability to read, but the ability to understand, reason, and participate confidently in the world. Literacy is far more than decoding words; it's the foundation of civic engagement, economic mobility, and personal independence.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7106f611-83f4-4db8-a605-54ff825693cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Early Literacy: Learning to Read**
The first four years of school shape everything that follows. This is when children learn to read -- or start to fall behind. The science of reading gives us a clear roadmap: structured phonics, decoding, and language comprehension.
Yet many districts still lag behind. A national survey found that only 28% of educators said their training "significantly included" the science of reading -- meaning most teachers enter classrooms without the tools to teach reading effectively. Schools of education also too often neglect evidence-based methods, leaving new teachers unprepared to identify and support struggling readers.
Furthermore, early identification of dyslexia -- which affects an estimated 5-10% of the population -- remains inconsistent. When diagnosed early, children can develop strategies to overcome dyslexia and build confidence. But too often, those struggles go unnoticed until reading gaps become entrenched.
**[The ExcelinEd Early Literacy Policy Playbook](https://substack.com/redirect/c47605cc-e2d4-412a-a812-1ebf05efeaf6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** underscores that "early literacy success begins with prevention, not remediation." As Dr. Kymyona Burk, Senior Policy Fellow at ExcelinEd, has emphasized, the key is equipping teachers with the knowledge to recognize reading challenges and intervene before failure occurs -- through structured instruction, universal screening, and targeted, one-on-one support.
**Knowledge Literacy: Reading to Learn**
By fourth grade, students are expected to read to learn. Comprehension now depends on what they already know -- their vocabulary, background knowledge, and ability to connect ideas.
It's hard to make sense of a text about baseball if you don't know what a home run is. The same applies to history, civics, and science. Without a knowledge-rich curriculum that builds sequential understanding, students can read words fluently yet fail to grasp meaning.
**[As E. D. Hirsch Jr. argues](https://substack.com/redirect/bb21dbea-e03d-42bf-9925-1bee12f70026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in How to Educate a Citizen, "children (and adults) gain new knowledge only by augmenting what they already know." Knowledge, he explains, is the scaffolding on which comprehension rests. When students lack shared background knowledge -- of the world, of culture, of civic life -- they are excluded from deeper learning and, ultimately, from citizenship itself.
This gap quietly erodes confidence and curiosity. It's why so many students lose interest in learning -- not because they don't care, but because comprehension without context is exhausting.
**Functional Literacy: Reading for Life**
By high school, literacy becomes the measure of independence. The numbers are sobering: according to the 2024 Nation's Report Card, the average reading score for 12th graders fell to 285 out of 500 -- a three-point drop from 2019 and the lowest level ever recorded, with only 35% of students reading at or above proficiency.
Illiteracy is not just an education issue -- it's a societal one. Research indicates that over 70% of incarcerated adults in the U.S. cannot read above a fourth-grade level (Governors Foundation for Early Literacy). That means seven in ten people behind bars entered adulthood unable to navigate the **[basic literacy demands of life](https://substack.com/redirect/6f5ae578-1f47-4121-882f-0d802c45fd4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** -- from filling out a job application to reading a legal notice.
Functional literacy extends beyond reading. It is the ability to understand a medical form, a legal contract, interpret a financial statement, or evaluate a policy proposal. It is both financial and civic literacy -- the skill to manage personal decisions and engage in public life with confidence. Without these skills, people are left vulnerable in systems built for those who can comprehend complex information.
Literacy, in this sense, is the bedrock of freedom.
**Literacy in the Age of AI**
Artificial intelligence is **[reshaping how we learn, work, and process information.](https://substack.com/redirect/ede77e7f-ecb3-4747-b767-eb29c1fd2c39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** It can personalize instruction, detect learning gaps early, and offer new tools to support teachers. But it also raises the stakes for human comprehension.
As The Policy Circle's AI, Education & Literacy brief explores, digital literacy now means understanding how technology shapes what we see and believe. Algorithms curate our information diet. Chatbots summarize what we read. When machines generate and filter knowledge for us, discernment -- the ability to question, compare, and think critically -- becomes the new frontier of literacy.
AI can assist, but it cannot replace the uniquely human ability to reason. In a world where technology is rewriting the act of reading itself, the ability to read wisely has never mattered more.
I've come to see literacy as the quiet force behind every other measure of progress. It opens doors to confidence, curiosity, and citizenship. Without it, opportunity narrows and anxiety fills the gap.
This isn't just about reforming education; it's about ensuring that every person -- from a first-grader learning phonics to an adult deciphering a contract -- can fully participate in the world around them.

** • [The Policy Circle: Literacy Brief](https://substack.com/redirect/d94080a9-188a-45f3-8ee2-e858c1d473f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
** • [AI, Education & Literacy in the Age of Choice and Career Paths](https://substack.com/redirect/ede77e7f-ecb3-4747-b767-eb29c1fd2c39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
** • [Financial Literacy Brief](https://substack.com/redirect/6f5ae578-1f47-4121-882f-0d802c45fd4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

** • [Core Knowledge Foundation: E.D. Hirsch Jr.](https://substack.com/redirect/bb21dbea-e03d-42bf-9925-1bee12f70026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

clean_body: Literacy is far more than decoding words; it's the foundation of personal independence. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Literacy is far more than decoding words; it's the foundation of personal independence. | | | Dec 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism As the cofounder of The Policy Circle, I've convened roundtables around the country -- with educators, parents, business leaders, and women from all walks of life -- to explore what truly prepares someone to thrive. One word keeps coming up: . Not just the ability to read, but the ability to understand, reason, and participate confidently in the world. Literacy is far more than decoding words; it's the foundation of civic engagement, economic mobility, and personal independence. | | ---|---|--- Early Literacy: Learning to Read The first four years of school shape everything that follows. This is when children learn to read -- or start to fall behind. The science of reading gives us a clear roadmap: structured phonics, decoding, and language comprehension. Yet many districts still lag behind. A national survey found that only 28% of educators said their training "significantly included" the science of reading -- meaning most teachers enter classrooms without the tools to teach reading effectively. Schools of education also too often neglect evidence-based methods, leaving new teachers unprepared to identify and support struggling readers. Furthermore, early identification of dyslexia -- which affects an estimated 5-10% of the population -- remains inconsistent. When diagnosed early, children can develop strategies to overcome dyslexia and build confidence. But too often, those struggles go unnoticed until reading gaps become entrenched. underscores that "early literacy success begins with prevention, not remediation." As Dr. Kymyona Burk, Senior Policy Fellow at ExcelinEd, has emphasized, the key is equipping teachers with the knowledge to recognize reading challenges and intervene before failure occurs -- through structured instruction, universal screening, and targeted, one-on-one support. Knowledge Literacy: Reading to Learn By fourth grade, students are expected to read to learn. Comprehension now depends on what they already know -- their vocabulary, background knowledge, and ability to connect ideas. It's hard to make sense of a text about baseball if you don't know what a home run is. The same applies to history, civics, and science. Without a knowledge-rich curriculum that builds sequential understanding, students can read words fluently yet fail to grasp meaning. in How to Educate a Citizen, "children (and adults) gain new knowledge only by augmenting what they already know." Knowledge, he explains, is the scaffolding on which comprehension rests. When students lack shared background knowledge -- of the world, of culture, of civic life -- they are excluded from deeper learning and, ultimately, from citizenship itself. This gap quietly erodes confidence and curiosity. It's why so many students lose interest in learning -- not because they don't care, but because comprehension without context is exhausting. Functional Literacy: Reading for Life By high school, literacy becomes the measure of independence. The numbers are sobering: according to the 2024 Nation's Report Card, the average reading score for 12th graders fell to 285 out of 500 -- a three-point drop from 2019 and the lowest level ever recorded, with only 35% of students reading at or above proficiency. Illiteracy is not just an education issue -- it's a societal one. Research indicates that over 70% of incarcerated adults in the U.S. cannot read above a fourth-grade level (Governors Foundation for Early Literacy). That means seven in ten people behind bars entered adulthood unable to navigate the -- from filling out a job application to reading a legal notice. Functional literacy extends beyond reading. It is the ability to understand a medical form, a legal contract, interpret a financial statement, or evaluate a policy proposal. It is both financial and civic literacy -- the skill to manage personal decisions and engage in public life with confidence. Without these skills, people are left vulnerable in systems built for those who can comprehend complex information. Literacy, in this sense, is the bedrock of freedom. Literacy in the Age of AI Artificial intelligence is It can personalize instruction, detect learning gaps early, and offer new tools to support teachers. But it also raises the stakes for human comprehension. As The Policy Circle's AI, Education & Literacy brief explores, digital literacy now means understanding how technology shapes what we see and believe. Algorithms curate our information diet. Chatbots summarize what we read. When machines generate and filter knowledge for us, discernment -- the ability to question, compare, and think critically -- becomes the new frontier of literacy. AI can assist, but it cannot replace the uniquely human ability to reason. In a world where technology is rewriting the act of reading itself, the ability to read wisely has never mattered more. I've come to see literacy as the quiet force behind every other measure of progress. It opens doors to confidence, curiosity, and citizenship. Without it, opportunity narrows and anxiety fills the gap. This isn't just about reforming education; it's about ensuring that every person -- from a first-grader learning phonics to an adult deciphering a contract -- can fully participate in the world around them. Further Reading: • • • • • Sylvie L egere is a co-founder of The Policy Circle, an entrepreneur, the author of Trust Your Voice: A Roadmap to Focus and Influence, and the host of the podcast Trust Your Voice. | | ---|---|--- The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism You're currently a free subscriber to . name: Mark Warner
subject: Why I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-warner_em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-warner_em]
Folks –
Today, I’m officially kicking off my reelection campaign – to keep up the fight for Virginia’s families, to stand up to the policies in Washington that are skyrocketing the cost of living, and to continue to bring people together to get it done.
And my friend, Jay Jones, said I should reach out to you directly – because I’ll need you to join me in this important work. I need your bold ideas, your enthusiasm, and your commitment to making life better for your kids and grandkids with me on the campaign trail.
And yes, I need your support in the form of a $5, $15, or $25 contribution. Your donation today – split between my campaign and Jay Jones – is an investment in the future we’re building together. My team set a goal of earning 5,000 donations this week to kick off our campaign with the grassroots strength we need to win. Every donation, no matter the size, helps us build momentum, reach voters, and get the job done. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-warner_em?amount=5]
DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-warner_em]
Look, I’ve always been focused on what’s next, on what’s on the horizon. I started a cell phone company back when everyone was still using landlines.
When I was first elected governor, it was on the promise to move Virginia forward. And we did.
And, in the Senate, I’ve been focused on the challenges our country faces next:
* Expanding broadband and economic opportunity to rural America.
* Preparing our intelligence communities for 21st-century threats in our increasingly interconnected world.
* And standing up to Trump’s policies that raise prices and gut health care while he hands massive tax breaks to billionaires.
But our work is far from over.
Since the AI revolution, we’ve seen the job market in a free fall – while prices continue to rise. And Donald Trump and his crowd in Washington? They don’t have a clue what to do about it. They don’t even seem to care.
Instead of being paralyzed by fear – or worse – making futile attempts to turn back the clock, we need to ensure that innovation gives everyone a fair shot.
This moment calls for big ideas. A systematic economic re-tooling to prepare for the impacts of artificial intelligence, a complete overhaul of affordable housing and childcare, and universal health care coverage.
We need a vision to chart a new path and effective leadership to get it done. That’s why I’m running for reelection to the United States Senate.
And I’m asking you to join me. Will you step up today to become one of the 5,000 donors my campaign is counting on before Friday? Split a donation between my campaign and Jay Jones to become an Official Campaign Kickoff Donor >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-warner_em]
DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-warner_em]
Our work starts now.
More soon,
Mark Warner

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States
Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia

name: Team McBride
subject: Grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Thank you for having Sarah’s back.
#
Before we say anything else:
Thank you.
Just days ago, it looked like we might fall short of our November fundraising goal. But this grassroots team showed up, and we hit our goal. Sarah and our entire team are truly grateful for you.
Those on the other side were really hoping we’d fall short. After nearly a year of pushing back against their chaos and cruelty, they thought grassroots supporters would be too worn down. **They counted on us giving up. But we didn’t._You_ didn’t.** And for that, we cannot thank you enough.
**Now we face our biggest test yet.**
**The final FEC deadline of the year is on December 31.** After which, we’ll file our last public fundraising report of Sarah’s first year in Congress and the last one before the 2026 midterms begin.
Every dollar we raise and how many people chip in will be public for everyone to see. And you can bet that the same MAGA Republicans who’ve attacked Sarah all year long will be watching closely, hoping to spot any signs that their attempts to tear her down have worked.
Let’s prove them wrong with a strong report and a message they can’t ignore:
_**Sarah’s supporters are energized, united, and standing with her as she protects our care, fights to reclaim the House, and continues delivering for Delaware.**_
[**Can you pitch in $5 to Sarah McBride’s re-election campaign to help us start December strong and post a powerful final report?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251202-1.87taHN&refcode=em20251202-2553&amount=5&t=1&akid=2553%2E21716%2ErXDReZ)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251202-1.87taHN&amount=5&refcode=em20251202-2553&t=20&akid=2553%2E21716%2ErXDReZ)**
Thank you again for standing with us!
— Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251202-1&t=21&refcode2=2553_21716_rXDReZ&akid=2553%2E21716%2ErXDReZ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=22&akid=2553%2E21716%2ErXDReZ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=23&akid=2553%2E21716%2ErXDReZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2553%2E21716%2ErXDReZ)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

migrants.

junkies."

clean_body: Background on Kristi Noem's call to stop immigration from countries that "send killers." [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] DHS chief Kristi Noem wants full travel ban on ‘every damn country’ she says sends ‘killer’ migrants to US [] Source: New York Post [] Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem proposed a “full travel ban” on unnamed countries “flooding” the US with dangerous migrants. “I am recommending a full travel ban on every damn country that’s been flooding our nation with killers, leeches, and entitlement junkies." [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] January 23, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues Chicago Mayor for Records on Pledge to Resist Trump’s Mass Deportation Efforts [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch sued Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson for records regarding his vow to resist the Trump administration’s mass deportation and other immigration law enforcement activities. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] October 21, 2025 ICE Exposes “Grave Consequences of Sanctuary Policies” Arresting 1,400 Criminal Aliens in 3 Weeks [] Source: Judicial Watch [] As the mainstream media continues to ignore the benefits of the Trump administration’s crackdown on illegal immigration, federal agents keep arresting murderers, rapists, drug traffickers, gang members, and child sex predators welcomed into the United States or released from local jails under Biden. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] October 30, 2025 Trump Task Force Catches 3,000 Cartel and Gang Members, 1,000 Guns, 91 Tons of Drugs in Weeks [] Source: Judicial Watch [] “Many of these aliens unlawfully within the United States present significant threats to national security and public safety, committing vile and heinous acts against innocent Americans,” the president’s January order, titled “Protecting the American People Against Invasion,” states. name: Team Deb
subject: It's Deb's birthday!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
We're inviting YOU to celebrate with Deb’s birthday! | | |
---
Friend, today is an exciting day here at our campaign headquarters ... it's Deb's birthday, and **we want YOU to celebrate with us by signing her birthday card!**
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/haaland-birthdaycard-2025/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&refcode=jtk-31-su-fl&t=1&akid=6013%2E400544%2E-iUqyv)
| | [🎉 SIGN DEB'S BIRTHDAY CARD! 🎉](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/haaland-birthdaycard-2025/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&refcode=jtk-31-su-fl&t=2&akid=6013%2E400544%2E-iUqyv)
---
Here on Team Deb, we’re inspired every day by Deb’s remarkable journey. She raised her child on her own as a single parent, relied on food stamps, overcame homelessness, and went on to become one of the first Native American women elected to Congress and the first Native American cabinet secretary in U.S. history.
**Now, as someone who has experienced and understands the challenges so many New Mexicans are facing, Deb is running for governor to make life easier for our families and the future brighter for our kids.**
**[If you believe in Deb’s vision for a better, fairer future for everyone, we hope you’ll take a moment to add your name and wish her a happy birthday._We’re hoping to share thousands of messages with her tonight!_](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/haaland-birthdaycard-2025/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&refcode=jtk-31-su-fl&t=3&akid=6013%2E400544%2E-iUqyv)**
| | [🎉 SIGN DEB'S BIRTHDAY CARD! 🎉](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/haaland-birthdaycard-2025/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&refcode=jtk-31-su-fl&t=4&akid=6013%2E400544%2E-iUqyv)
---
Thank you,
Team Deb

|

---

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: DTE and Consumers Energy won’t like this…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1390%2E251025%2EnY1oYO ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1390%2E251025%2EnY1oYO ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

I want to tell you about something important happening here in Michigan,
and then, ask you to join me.

It’s called MOP Up Michigan, and it’s a statewide ballot initiative
that’ll finally ban regulated utility monopolies like DTE and Consumers
Energy from pouring cash into our politics.

For too long, these utility giants have poured millions into state-level
races to influence laws, dodge accountability, and stall the transition to
cleaner, more affordable energy. They use loopholes that let dark-money
groups run unlimited ads without telling us who’s paying for them.

Meanwhile, our energy bills keep going up, and up, and up.

But MOP Up Michigan will fix this by closing shady loopholes and giving
power back to the people — that’s why I’m proud to endorse this ballot
initiative. [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/survey/mop-up-michigan-petition/?source=em20251202-1390&t=1004&akid=1390%2E251025%2EnY1oYO ]Will you join me in supporting MOP Up Michigan by adding
your name today?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/survey/mop-up-michigan-petition/?source=em20251202-1390&t=1005&akid=1390%2E251025%2EnY1oYO ]Sign On ››

Peter, I’m the
only candidate in this race who has never taken a dime from utility
corporations or any corporate PAC. My loyalty is, and always will be, to
working people, not the companies that have treated our state like an ATM.

When we get corporate money out of politics, working people win, and
that’s what MOP Up Michigan is designed to do.

If we want a government that fights for us — not for the biggest check in
the room — then we have to show up for efforts like this.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/survey/mop-up-michigan-petition/?source=em20251202-1390&t=1006&akid=1390%2E251025%2EnY1oYO ]Will you join me in endorsing MOP Up Michigan today?

In solidarity,

Abdul

P.S. If you haven’t heard, I’m holding a virtual town hall with my good
friend, Bernie Sanders, tonight at 7 PM EST. It’ll be livestreamed on my
YouTube, [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/643?t=1007&akid=1390%2E251025%2EnY1oYO ]linked here. You should tune in!

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1008&akid=1390%2E251025%2EnY1oYO
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1009&akid=1390%2E251025%2EnY1oYO

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120466977/586369426/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDg1NWQ1MS1jN2NmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vkcR4Y45YrsLo3-npKFFtU-aUh9gZKYvhTMzGRcnlYs=&emci=5edc8841-bbcf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=8d855d51-c7cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, Last week was quite a week for our country. If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI has asked to question me and other members of Congress. All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear. If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, folks. I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None. If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming. And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please: [_**Split a donation between Martin Heinrich and me. And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Martin Heinrich will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Mark | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I wanted to inform you of some news

body:
Peter - I wanted to inform you sooner rather than later.
I've come to truly appreciate your consistent record.
With everything you've given to our movement, there was no question in my mind that I needed to send you this message ASAP.
I'd hate to see this opportunity pass you by.
That's why as soon as the House GOP Platinum committee flagged your profile, I knew I had to extend both a message of gratitude and of urgency!

1. **THANK YOU! I am so proud of everything we have accomplished and how far you 've come in your support for the House GOP, Peter. We would not be able to deliver on our America First agenda without you!**
2. **You 're now eligible for PLATINUM STATUS! Will you please accept this status and add this critical accomplishment to your GOP legacy?**

name: Team KTR Communications
subject: KTR Blasts Hobbs for Pushing Anti–School Choice Agenda
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KARRIN FOR ARIZONA
body:
Vows to Protect School Choice and Raise Academic Standards

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/karrinforarizona/schoolchoice?e=ebfb0fda52)
---
[|
---](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=19f1e2786f&e=ebfb0fda52)
| | | | | |
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASEDecember 2nd, 2025 **KTR Blasts Hobbs for Pushing Anti–School Choice Agenda** _Vows to Protect School Choice and Raise Academic Standards_ **Phoenix, AZ** — Today, Trump-endorsed conservative candidate for Governor Karrin Taylor Robson issued the following statement in response to [new reports](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=a0a04f1a26&e=ebfb0fda52) that Governor Katie Hobbs plans to restrict Arizona’s school choice program: “Arizona’s public schools are failing our kids. We are ranked 50th, and most third graders cannot read or write at grade level. The problem is not school choice. The problem is a public system that is not delivering results, yet Katie Hobbs is attacking the program that is actually helping families. School choice has allowed thousands of Arizona families to escape failing schools and get their children the education they deserve. As Governor, I will protect school choice, defend parents’ rights, and make Arizona’s education system the strongest in the nation. I will put parents in charge, raise academic standards, and demand better outcomes, starting with improving third grade reading. We should be expanding opportunity for kids, not restricting it.”
---
| |
**About Karrin Taylor Robson** Karrin Taylor Robson is a lifelong conservative, business leader, and mother running for Governor of Arizona with President Trump’s endorsement.
Just like President Trump, Karrin is not a politician; she is a self-made business executive who has built one of the state’s leading land-use and economic development firms. Her work has helped bring jobs, opportunity, and growth to Arizona while cutting through bureaucracy and fighting government overreach. She’s also served on key military and education boards that impact Arizona families every day, including for more than 20 years on the Air Force Chief of Staff’s Civic Leaders Group.
A proud wife, mother of four, and grandmother, Karrin is running for Governor to keep our communities safe, fix, root out waste, fraud, and abuse in Arizona, and she will always have President Trump's back.
---
|
---

name: Team Cori
subject: Put people first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251202_slate_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251202_slate_actrs]
Slate just asked: “How can Democrats make their comeback?”
And they point to someone with the answers: Cori Bush.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251202_slate_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251202_slate_actrs]
Because here’s the problem: too many Democrats stopped listening to their communities. Instead, they started listening to consultants, pollsters, and billionaires.
Meanwhile, families have been crying out for help while corporate interests write the checks and call the shots.
That’s how we lose elections. That’s how we lose people’s trust.
Cori’s solution is simple and powerful: put people first. Listen to our communities, not big money. Prioritize wallets, not donors. Be loud, be bold, and fight for what’s right – even when it’s not popular.
That’s what Cori’s campaign is all about.
When you're loud, bold, and fight for what's right, those billionaires will come for you. They've done it before, and they'll do it again. That's why it's so IMPERATIVE that we hit our goal this month – the first real test to show we have the grassroots strength to take on the same big-money machines that spent $15 million trying to silence Cori last year.
If we don't have the resources to take them on, we won't be able to win for families, and that means building a real campaign right this second.
If we want a comeback built by the people and not bought by corporate PACs, it starts right here, right now.
Can you chip in before midnight on Friday to help Cori fight for the people of St. Louis and for a Democratic Party that actually listens? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251202_slate_actrs]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=x_251202_slate_actrs] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=x_251202_slate_actrs]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=x_251202_slate_actrs] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=x_251202_slate_actrs]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_251202_slate_actrs] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_251202_slate_actrs]
The work isn’t finished. But together, we can finish it, and bring the people’s voice back to Congress.
In solidarity,
– Team Cori
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251202_slate_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251202_slate_actrs] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Join Team Cori today and sign up to volunteer. [https://www.coribush.org]

name: Team Griswold
subject: Letter to Pam Bondi And Kristi Noem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251202-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251202-email]
Peter –
In recent months, the Justice Department has requested voter data from states across the country. There is concern that the data will be shared with the Department of Homeland Security to run it through an unproven “citizenship check system.”
Federal officials from the Justice Department and DHS have given mixed explanations regarding the data, leading to confusion and uncertainty that Democratic Secretaries of State are determined to clear up.
Jena is standing up to the Justice Department. Because of the unprecedented nature of these requests and because voter information should not be used for partisan games, Jena led the effort to bring ten Secretaries of State together to send a letter asking the administration to clarify how the data will be used, who it will be shared with, and how federal agencies will comply with the law.
Jena will always fight to protect Coloradans from federal overreach. Chip in now to help elect a champion for our rights as the next Attorney General. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251202-email]
Thank you for standing with us in this fight.
Team Griswold
Follow Jena Online:

name: Ilhan for Congress
subject: “Ilhan Omar is garbage”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Trump just can’t stop attacking Ilhan.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1975%2E791427%2Ecs5qEq)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251202-1-180&t=2&akid=1975%2E791427%2Ecs5qEq)
Friend — Trump just can’t stop attacking Ilhan.
We explained to you how these racist attacks from Trump led to ongoing harassment and constant threats to Ilhan’s life, requiring us to hire our own security.
We told you how Trump’s rhetoric is putting a target on the backs of innocent Somali-American families in Minnesota and across the country who already face hate from the far-right.
Now Trump is calling Ilhan “garbage” and adding that immigrants like her are “garbage” too. **It’s disgusting and dangerous.**
And more so, it’s a distraction from the fact that Trump’s first year in office **has been a disaster.** The cost of living continues to rise, millions are losing their healthcare, and ICE has waged a terror campaign in our cities. The American people are waking up to Trump’s incompetence, and he is desperate to create a distraction.
So, friend, we are reaching out today to ask this grassroots team to help us show that thousands, or even millions, of people stand with Ilhan Omar as she faces down Trump’s attacks and continues to fight for our agenda of healthcare, housing, education, and a safe and affordable life for all Americans, regardless of where they were born.
**[Chip in $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can afford to Ilhan’s campaign today. We want to prove that this movement has Ilhan’s back and is ready to meet these racist, hateful attacks with a powerful grassroots campaign that can defeat Trump and the far-right.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251202-1-180&t=3&akid=1975%2E791427%2Ecs5qEq)

name: John James
subject: I need to tell you the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
We missed the goal. The deadline is extended. I need you now.| | | Friend, It is John James. _**I will not sugarcoat this.**_ **We failed to hit the $25K goal before the deadline.** We were close, but close does not win races. Close does not stop the attack ads that are already pouring into Michigan. Close does not convince the national Left that we are strong enough to defend this state. They saw the shortfall. They are celebrating it. They are telling their donors that our movement is slipping. _I refuse to let that be reality._ [**That is why I extended the deadline. One last chance to turn this setback into the moment we shock everyone watching this race.**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=eb00579218c644f49ef4e816c4dcc9a6&_e=mlvapKbHSwuCOoxiJB0eQVjUZ1t8j42it5OXp-11jOV8qB1jBUJpdreVVrMkXuq3eLDzP_CzYK_u3ypz0TBBSanv1lmFPe_0Q4k8S40y8v9PF6mVbM3H_XkAk45MnbG4Ova4wQqLEECFHa1WuZ5BMLiAaXz2KwTrPPznaaupxvRddQWmmCFF95Dvv6swKGGLhHyvA0Jpfv1r0wQqELFnm5YRRTh2Kqu-GfgcRLkiHhugurQUK3-ENl-F9mVgMWLdQfgh7UbOnKT9kw5VdtaXjMrMQJ97FKSYM3ZgPO1MrOJUvt-7eldZRyghTRhsSUN8p5xi6OLt8WMHvGabXGivOUD_qMNjN7BnMgDK06wSdem8Xy7zjWIMNbOzikpPNoF0nI1yVmMqArdz6YqFhiAJy8NFMAgHsbRHj_-RK8DeARI%3D) Right now I need supporters who refuse to back down.
---
[ **HELP CLOSE THE GAP** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=eb00579218c644f49ef4e816c4dcc9a6&_e=mlvapKbHSwuCOoxiJB0eQVjUZ1t8j42it5OXp-11jOV8qB1jBUJpdreVVrMkXuq3eLDzP_CzYK_u3ypz0TBBSanv1lmFPe_0Q4k8S40y8v-pAbyBcx5YsfrCrfm4pyK2pcDZXepQZ1ZOI3AP3mtculOm2TL8qL6z21zyXr4AJQg-A2TmWEXBvY-NzLIu-MnE9yYxMK-_2l1A_FqZYQYM1Kblgjja8NZJIc3TQcmv5EQ3i5Zpg6Kv1sBykKt9Gp6QIfMNIS8KBETdQpAYNOT8FBEeBgfii7ODRVuveVHg1RDE6_0mJEm65YvSpQxTQ97bIynX4_lwxwB3yry_QmCblg7BXbUwAJUsLnuVxAiv5KUmh_Xjs2kkcChEnTvHeMajdWy1ieU0mGeUqfSf3r1awWl5xa0hyzXIqxtIxn3BpDY%3D)
---
I have led missions where failure was not an option. I know what pressure feels like. I know what it means to dig deep when everything is on the line. **And I know this.**

name: Katie Porter
subject: Mail I got from my supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Reading these notes is always a highlight of my day.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40517%2E3422442%2EUZNDIJ)
Peter,
You might not know this, but some of our supporters donate by mailing checks directly to our campaign office. Sometimes they even include a personal letter!
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251202_1_ak.rOBKJ_&refcode=em20251202-40517&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40517%2E3422442%2EUZNDIJ)
I wanted to share a few passages from letters we’ve recently received that really stuck with me:
“As a lawyer/mom myself, I have always admired your **dedication and GRIT**.”
“May you bring **facts + reason** back to politics”
“Keep fighting. We are behind you. **Thank you for standing up for what is right** ”
Reading these notes is always a highlight of my day. They ground me in this work and remind me why I’m running for governor: everyday Californians are struggling to get by and need someone to fight for them.
Politics can be especially nasty. We’ve already had attack ads against us this cycle, and more will come. But these letters make it clear we’re building a people-powered movement that can take on anything that comes our way.
**[I’m counting on your continued support to build a campaign that can win the primary and general elections. Can you chip in $5 or whatever makes sense for you today?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251202_1_ak.rOBKJ_&refcode=em20251202-40517&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40517%2E3422442%2EUZNDIJ)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251202_1_ak.rOBKJ_&refcode=em20251202-40517&t=23&akid=40517%2E3422442%2EUZNDIJ)
Thank you,
Katie Porter
P.S. If you would like to contribute by check (or send in a letter), you can mail it to our PO Box:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616-5176

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251202-40517&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40517_3422442_UZNDIJ&akid=40517%2E3422442%2EUZNDIJ)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40517&t=25&akid=40517%2E3422442%2EUZNDIJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40517)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40517&t=26&akid=40517%2E3422442%2EUZNDIJ)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

subject: Why do so many dogs die before their time?
body:

* * *

| Why do so many dogs die before their time?

These are age old questions that many researchers have been trying to figure out for years, but according to one expert's experience, almost **ALL aspects of a dogs health can be influenced by adding the right foods to their diet and avoiding the wrong ones.**

She's put together [**this report**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/face75b24c0647a5a00343a380ca3e35-ef800db68b564d0d94e2f0d3a55373eb/63) which reveals **these simple 2 steps that can help support any dogs mobility, odors, poops, skin, breath, and even their dental health**. P.S. This video also reveals why do dogs lick their paws, eat grass, get itchy skin, or get mushy poops. So if your dog has experiencing any of those it's even more important you watch the video below.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Tobias Read
subject: No legal authority. No transparency. No way.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251202em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251202em]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I’m writing because something deeply troubling is happening inside our federal government, and every voter in Oregon deserves to know the truth.
The US Department of Justice has been requesting your private voter information — including your date of birth, partial Social Security number, and driver’s license number — without legal authority, without transparency, and without any explanation of how they intend to use it.
I refused to hand over that data.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/CfMP30xwgUWZNBhKV-mlDw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CfMP30xwgUWZNBhKV-mlDw2]
No legal authority. No transparency. No way.
What’s more, now we’ve learned that the USDOJ has already been sharing personal voter data with the Department of Homeland Security and funneling it into the SAVE program — a system that watchdogs have repeatedly called inaccurate, insecure, and unreliable.
This is exactly why I said no from the start. And why I’m still saying no — even as they sue me for it.
I will not allow your personal information to be misused to intimidate voters, target immigrants, or tear families apart. That will never be Oregon’s way.
Along with Colorado’s Secretary of State and eight other Secretaries of State across the country, I’ve demanded answers directly from the Attorney General and the Secretary of Homeland Security.
But the federal government needs to hear from you too.
If you agree that personal information should not be used to intimidate voters, target immigrants, or tear families apart, please add your name to my petition now: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CfMP30xwgUWZNBhKV-mlDw2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CfMP30xwgUWZNBhKV-mlDw2]
Oregonians — and all Americans — deserve to know how their data is being used.
We’re standing up because your privacy, your rights, and your vote matter.
Thank you for being part of this fight.
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251202em]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=9wFeSIaSiUda2AiLqgm08BO49B59xQ0j1TEzKqNwkwYQz3V5LataXtUncJvAPIrQeC422oWbyIHY5keWGgC%2FSILASJSJDvanACyfsMtHWxqfmUYQ7d7LLYMOdVA1eh%2BAzR5tjuzeofjETFrOdbUTKtAMJ3AcRXEB5fiW3uDQ0Fdrdcn3PHDK7HsXvYEYmu8MZfBojQPtFCdvRdl4Tp%2B8kCa8i83i9OfXKCdei80OwaqswJxq7SFeJVWxKVMsMBpMAbW9KXIAxEyip7W%2FlE6lDdBoUUna%2FcT09Vg8bqJNeRLaoEvCbcPzNg1dUbwc0NJqicu0lBCR57IPbiJYSMZypD9e6LSLnoOwrRubTR%2B2LtfaL1KxXfgIOcuWLWQW1MAvQQxJRCaahxTRvttm5uLD6A4eMBRDwNXmpTCYPyeDPB%2BYwSN%2BLGGekalIEU7bZNRm .

name: Janet Mills
subject: null, I’m going to fight like hell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I could never live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1473%2E49239%2E3hUcQQ)
| | |
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9256?t=2&akid=1473%2E49239%2E3hUcQQ)
null, I didn’t plan to run for Senate. But I could _never_ live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover.
Trump is putting Maine, our country, and our democracy in danger every _single day,_ and Susan Collins isn’t doing a thing about it.
**So I’ve officially announced my Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate to defeat Susan Collins. MAGA donors will spend millions to protect this seat and their majority.[Will you split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Haley Stevens' campaign right now to help me win in Maine and flip the Senate blue? >> ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9257?t=3&akid=1473%2E49239%2E3hUcQQ)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9256?t=4&akid=1473%2E49239%2E3hUcQQ)
---
null, I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.
My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, the first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor.
I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished.
But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. **Frankly, I could never live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love.**
_And null, I'm the only Maine Democrat to win a statewide election in the last 20 years.
_
So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you.
This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda.
**[Please, help me prove to Donald Trump and Susan Collins the power of this campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Haley Stevens' campaign – whether it’s $100 or $1, I need you in this fight with me.>> ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9256?t=5&akid=1473%2E49239%2E3hUcQQ)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Janet Mills and Haley Stevens will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9258?t=6&akid=1473%2E49239%2E3hUcQQ)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9259?t=7&akid=1473%2E49239%2E3hUcQQ)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9260?t=8&akid=1473%2E49239%2E3hUcQQ)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9256?t=9&akid=1473%2E49239%2E3hUcQQ)
---
Let’s win this thing.

– Janet Mills
Governor of Maine
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9261?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1473%2E49239%2E3hUcQQ) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9262?t=11&akid=1473%2E49239%2E3hUcQQ)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=12&akid=1473%2E49239%2E3hUcQQ)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

| | Hi Friend, Happy Giving Tuesday! Did you know that Asheville and the surrounding WNC counties consistently rank among the highest in the state for non-profits per capita? It's because that’s who we are – neighbors who show up for each other by feeding families, expanding healthcare, protecting our mountains, and doing what needs to be done. It's extraordinary. But it's also a reminder: when everyday people have to do this much, someone in Washington isn't holding up their end. Dr. Hudspeth is running to change that. Before this campaign, he led the largest community health center in NC-11 — serving nine rural counties, quadrupling access to care, and balancing the budget. He knows how to bring people together and build solutions that last.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: AIPAC is targeting me with paid ads.
body:
This is a moral test for our party — and I won’t back down.
#
AIPAC just launched paid ads on Facebook and Instagram targeting my district and calling me a liar.
They’re asking people to disbelieve what they have seen on their own phones with their own eyes.
Let me be clear: **Any politician who caves to special interests on Gaza cannot be trusted to stand up to Big Pharma, private health insurance, defense contractors, or price-gouging corporations.**
[**Before I explain, can you rush $3 to show that you have my back?**](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22100?refcode=LN_12012025%3Frefcode%3Dem20251202-1382&t=1&akid=1382%2E2118727%2EmuaMZH)
[****](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22100?refcode=LN_12012025%3Frefcode%3Dem20251202-1382&t=2&akid=1382%2E2118727%2EmuaMZH)
I will not be intimidated. I will continue to advocate for the recognition of Palestinian statehood and peace in the Middle East.
That is what real leadership requires: courage to say what’s right even when the pressure is enormous.
But I can only keep going if you have my back.
I don’t take PAC money.
I don’t take lobbyist money.
I don’t take corporate money.
**People like you fuel this campaign. You are the only reason I have the power to stand up to big-money special interests.**
**[Will you rush a donation of $3 or more to show AIPAC and every establishment power-broker that this grassroots movement isn’t going anywhere?](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22100?refcode=LN_12012025%3Frefcode%3Dem20251202-1382&t=3&akid=1382%2E2118727%2EmuaMZH)**
**[DONATE $3](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22100?refcode=LN_12012025%3Frefcode%3Dem20251202-1382&t=4&akid=1382%2E2118727%2EmuaMZH)**
**[DONATE $25](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22101?refcode=LN_12012025%3Frefcode%3Dem20251202-1382&t=5&akid=1382%2E2118727%2EmuaMZH)**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22102?refcode=LN_12012025%3Frefcode%3Dem20251202-1382&t=6&akid=1382%2E2118727%2EmuaMZH)**
**[CUSTOM AMOUNT](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22103?refcode=LN_12012025%3Frefcode%3Dem20251202-1382&t=7&akid=1382%2E2118727%2EmuaMZH)**
Thank you for your support, your activism, and all that you do.
Onward,
Ro

**LeftNet is an online political network fighting for progressive causes and candidates focused on social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=8&akid=1382%2E2118727%2EmuaMZH)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/update_your_information/?t=9&akid=1382%2E2118727%2EmuaMZH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leftnet.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=1382%2E2118727%2EmuaMZH)

Email us: [team@leftnet.org](mailto:team@leftnet.org)

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Kick Off 2026 with Me at Federal House!
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
Hi Friend,
As 2025 comes to a close, I’m already looking ahead to the year ahead — and I’d love for you to start 2026 with me!
Please join me for a New Year Reception on Thursday, January 8, 2026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jazzjan8?refcode=email_251202_fedhouse_blast1] , from 2:00–4:00 PM at Federal House Bar & Grille in Annapolis .
This gathering is a great opportunity to reconnect, share priorities for the upcoming legislative session, and discuss how we can continue building on the progress we’ve made together. Your support has helped us deliver real results for our community, and together we can make 2026 our strongest year yet.
You can RSVP or contribute online here: bit.ly/JazzJan8 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jazzjan8?refcode=email_251202_fedhouse_blast1]
If you prefer to contribute by check, please make it payable to:
Friends of Jazz Lewis c/o Rice Consulting
17 W. Courtland St., Suite 210
Bel Air, MD 21014
Let’s kick off the new year, and the new session, with purpose and momentum. I hope to see you on January 8th!
Warm regards,
Jazz

By Authority: Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account

Bethesda, MD 20827

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. |
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120470324/586380591/1412513779?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.02_OTS-Mark-Kelly-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzIwODA3My1jZWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XMkPYEHf2O8xv4AhOqWGXQfP5H3PLazZO0vpP_Lck8o=) Folks, This has been quite a week for our country. If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI has asked to question me and other members of Congress. All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear. If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, folks. I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None. If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming. And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please: **[Split a donation between Off the Sidelines and me. It would mean a lot.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120470327/586380594/67485243?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.02_OTS-Mark-Kelly-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzIwODA3My1jZWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XMkPYEHf2O8xv4AhOqWGXQfP5H3PLazZO0vpP_Lck8o=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Off the Sidelines PAC will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120470329/586380597/67485243?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.02_OTS-Mark-Kelly-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzIwODA3My1jZWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XMkPYEHf2O8xv4AhOqWGXQfP5H3PLazZO0vpP_Lck8o=)

If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming. And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Off the Sidelines PAC will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Mark © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

name: Mohan Seshadri
subject: Your New 2026 Resolution: Become a Member!
body:
https://www.apipennsylvania.org [https://www.apipennsylvania.org]
Dear Peter,
This November, the extended government shutdown left many of our community members struggling. Around 1 million Philadelphians are on the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), which was suspended after November 1st for over a week. Our food banks, which were already stretched to their limit before the shutdown, felt the pressure.
To fill this gap, community organizations stepped in. While SNAP was shut down, we partnered with the Asian Food Collective [https://www.asianfoodcollective.org/] , Asian Americans United [https://www.aaunited.org/] , and the Chinese Christian Church [https://esm.cccnc.org/] to meet the needs of our communities. We collected and distributed culturally appropriate food to hundreds of our neighbors, keeping them fed as the weather grows colder.
We take care of each other, and keep our communities safe. And this fight is happening on many levels — as we are on the ground meeting pressing needs, our allies in the state legislature are working to bridge funding gaps, and our congressional representatives are pushing Republicans in Congress to keep their hands off our healthcare.
Going into 2026, our work becomes more and more important. We’re building up our power to make sure we can keep taking care of each other, in our neighborhoods and at the ballot box. Becoming an API PA member is the best way for you to get involved, and stand shoulder to shoulder with our communities! [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/membership?am=20.00&contactdata=fUue1FgdkQn0FXln6G+i4THI0UQcOMAE7fYYECMBjLe+V24YFJWLuxKkTpTasrrizyDfZMlrRIKVHvMjwCwvvbX7vobN/ESz/SwSp6AJN4IjU0Qg0qnZ2t/sdgtkQipTyoWzsWsbQ0Zao4f+sjbIJpb0WhasI99mWXSpmqxASFI=]
Become a Member! [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/membership?am=15.00&contactdata=fUue1FgdkQn0FXln6G+i4THI0UQcOMAE7fYYECMBjLe+V24YFJWLuxKkTpTasrrizyDfZMlrRIKVHvMjwCwvvbX7vobN/ESz/SwSp6AJN4IjU0Qg0qnZ2t/sdgtkQipTyoWzsWsbQ0Zao4f+sjbIJpb0WhasI99mWXSpmqxASFI=]
In Solidarity,
Sakae Kikuchi
Organizing Director
Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance

name: NDRC
subject: BREAKING: Indiana Republicans unveil a wildly gerrymandered map
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
In the face of violent threats and a coordinated intimidation campaign, some Indiana Republicans are ready to cave to White House demands.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120470889/586382368/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0MzZmMzAyLWQwY2YtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=syl9IzyCcEQSQInFlVFkHU0HP-nWOmzLMzoiuNc9YKo=&emci=13a0c547-cecf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=4436f302-d0cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, There’s a huge development in Indiana. After the governor and several state legislators were targeted with bomb threats, swattings, and other threats of violence over the last few weeks, Indiana Republicans have unveiled a new congressional map that would give Republicans a 9-0 advantage — and the state house is set to vote on it this week. Look, Indiana voters don’t want this mid-decade redraw. Most state lawmakers don’t want it. But Washington Republicans are _desperate_ to unfairly rig the midterm elections. And this seemingly coordinated intimidation campaign being waged against lawmakers resisting the effort shows how far they’ll go to get their way. And some Indiana Republicans are all too willing to take their marching orders from Donald Trump. Let’s be crystal clear: When lawmakers bend to the will of a bully and threats of violence instead of listening to their own constituents, democracy falters. Public trust is eroded. And our government is co-opted by a handful of politicians rather than guided by the will of the people. **We have to remind these Indiana lawmakers that they still work for us — the people — not for politicians, and that attempts to silence voters will only backfire.** [**Rush in a donation to help us keep up the fight in Indiana and wherever map manipulators try to rig the midterm elections.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120470890/586382369/-1027206931?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_IndianaMap_email_20251202-NDRC-Tier1-IndianaMap_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251202-NDRC-Tier1-IndianaMap_&utm_campaign=IndianaMap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0MzZmMzAyLWQwY2YtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=syl9IzyCcEQSQInFlVFkHU0HP-nWOmzLMzoiuNc9YKo=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The consequences of what happens next in Indiana are profound. If Republicans force through a mid-decade redraw, this would be one of the most blatant examples of state lawmakers kowtowing to Washington rather than their own voters.
And it would represent an alarming indication that threats of violence can effectively move lawmakers. Trump has threatened to primary any Indiana Republican who didn’t go along with his map redraw scheme. Trump called out Indiana Governor Mike Braun on Truth Social. Now the governor says he and his family have received threats.
**This is what we’re up against, Peter. And we simply cannot let this intimidation campaign prevail.**
[**Chip in what you can to help us stand up for democracy and fight back in Indiana and across the country where Trump is turning up the pressure to cheat his way to victory in 2026.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120470897/586382403/-1027206931?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_IndianaMap_email_20251202-NDRC-Tier1-IndianaMap_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251202-NDRC-Tier1-IndianaMap_&utm_campaign=IndianaMap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0MzZmMzAyLWQwY2YtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=syl9IzyCcEQSQInFlVFkHU0HP-nWOmzLMzoiuNc9YKo=)

clean_body: In the face of violent threats and a coordinated intimidation campaign, some Indiana Republicans are ready to cave to White House demands. | Peter, There’s a huge development in Indiana. After the governor and several state legislators were targeted with bomb threats, swattings, and other threats of violence over the last few weeks, Indiana Republicans have unveiled a new congressional map that would give Republicans a 9-0 advantage — and the state house is set to vote on it this week. Look, Indiana voters don’t want this mid-decade redraw. Most state lawmakers don’t want it. But Washington Republicans are desperate to unfairly rig the midterm elections. And this seemingly coordinated intimidation campaign being waged against lawmakers resisting the effort shows how far they’ll go to get their way. And some Indiana Republicans are all too willing to take their marching orders from Donald Trump. Let’s be crystal clear: When lawmakers bend to the will of a bully and threats of violence instead of listening to their own constituents, democracy falters. Public trust is eroded. And our government is co-opted by a handful of politicians rather than guided by the will of the people. We have to remind these Indiana lawmakers that they still work for us — the people — not for politicians, and that attempts to silence voters will only backfire. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The consequences of what happens next in Indiana are profound. If Republicans force through a mid-decade redraw, this would be one of the most blatant examples of state lawmakers kowtowing to Washington rather than their own voters. And it would represent an alarming indication that threats of violence can effectively move lawmakers. Trump has threatened to primary any Indiana Republican who didn’t go along with his map redraw scheme. Trump called out Indiana Governor Mike Braun on Truth Social. Now the governor says he and his family have received threats. This is what we’re up against, Peter. And we simply cannot let this intimidation campaign prevail. = — Team NDRC = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. The votes are in: We are having a Christmas Party!
Please join us on Tuesday, December 9th at our family home in Golden at 6:30 PM for some festive fun!
Please wear your best ugly sweater for a chance to win a prize and come prepared for an ornament exchange.
